Very nice set of pencils, they color beautifully in adult coloring books, especially for very intricate coloring. However if coloring larger areas, they do take a lot more time to blend so start/stop lines are not visible, but it can be done. (I'd recommend using Primascolor pencils for coloring books with mermaids, fairies, ect...) I tested them against Crayola, Prang, Rose Art, and Prismacolor Soft Core Pencils. They color so much smoother than the Crayola, Prang, and Rose Art. They definitely are not a replacement for Prismacolor pencils, they are still a step below them. The pencils sharpen very nicely just using the Prismacolor Scholar sharpener (it's the green one). Where as for my Prismas I have to use the black sharpener. I have the 72 pencil set, about 20 of the colors are very close to each other, almost duplicates even. It could of easily been a 48-50 pencil set if they rearranged the colors included in the 48 pencil set they offer. I did purchase the metallic 12pk set as well which I'm waiting to be delivered. I found a color chart online, and modified it to included which pencils come in the different sets. I've included the pictures in my review.
Cute shoes! for the price is worth getting. I do not have narrow feet and the size I ordered fit me well. I always got half a size up. Long wear, depending on the activity, the shoe is comfortable.

I received a free sample of this running belt in exchange for a fair and honest review. I really like how I can carry my keys, phone and a few dollars with my hands free and not have to have a pouch bouncing around while I'm walking or running. It doesn't ride up when I'm moving around and I love the color also. I've had many compliments on it and several people have asked where I got it because they'd like to get their own.

I'd tell anyone tired of flimsy liners to grab this one. It's thick, crystal clear, and hangs perfectly without blowing around. Ideal for guest bathrooms where you want a clean, open look that holds up.

Okay, initially sent in a five-star rating, but this is why I hate to commit to a review early on; I've had this light installed for just a few months and it has failed. Constant on/off of the light once is gets to dusk; had to shut it off altogether. I wish I had looked at the negative reviews first because I wouldn't have bought this. I'm not planning on getting any satisfaction from the company because apparently, they don't honor warranties, but I will try. It's too bad; it seemed to be just what I wanted.

I'm blown away by how quiet the shutter is, perfect for candid street shots without spooking anyone. The manual focus ring feels buttery smooth, making zone focusing a breeze. Colors straight out of camera have a lovely, rich warmth I didn't expect.
Top was too big and butt was too tight. Wish it had more flow because it looks really pretty on the model.

What a great Conclusion to a great series. Tara has definitely saved the best for last with Betrayed. Dom has to make a difficult choices and uncover the truth about the past but at what cost? Can he keep this deep dark family secrets from his wife without loosing her or will this secret destroy his family, his marriage, his business and everything that matters to him. Baby V has found peace with the man of her dreams, but she won't have him withdrawing from her or keeping secrets that may keep them apart. In this last book we find out what a honorable and protective man Dom is and how much he truly loves Baby V. This is the kind of love that you dream about for yourself or you want for your daughter. What a great love story and conclusion. I received a complimentary copy in exchange for an honest review. Review by Melissa K for HEA Fanatics
This thing punches way above its price, held up great during a full weekend of heavy use.
Got this for my 4-year-old and it's way sturdier than I expected, he's been playing nonstop.
Looked way better online, but in person it's thin, poorly stitched, and barely held up through one wear.

The first one worked so well that we decided to pick up another one. I love the auto-off feature that keeps me from draining batteries. I can shoot a rifle with these on although they still have a tendency to get in the way. Great for indoor ranges because I can double up with plugs and these and still hear the person next to me without the extra noise that usually accompanies indoor ranges.

Totally worth every penny. For under ten bucks, I got nonstop tension, a gutsy heroine, and a slow-burn connection that felt real, not forced. The pacing is relentless, action scene after action scene, but with enough quiet moments to breathe. Honestly, I've paid more for books half as engaging. Solid bang for your buck.
Julie Smith's voice is magnetic, just wish this tale lasted longer.

This book completely blindsided me in the best way. I went in with no expectations and ended up losing sleep because I couldn't stop reading. The atmosphere is so thick you can almost feel the cold Swedish winter seeping off the pages. What really got me was how the story slowly peels back layers of a twisted family history while building this unlikely partnership between the two main characters. Their dynamic felt raw and surprisingly human, not forced at all. The mystery itself is dark and genuinely unsettling, but it never feels cheap. It's one of those rare reads where you finish and immediately want to talk to someone about it. I've already handed my copy off to a coworker with a simple warning: clear your weekend.

I was thinkinf about gettinf my carpet cleaned professionally until I caught this on sale. I figured, why not. I was disgusted at hiw filthy my carpet really was. I read in another review that it'll be best to first go over the carpet in the rinse mode to first loosen the dirt before switching over to the wash cycle. I probably changed rhe water 5 times before getting to wash bc this was pulling up so much gunk even though my carpet didn't even look bad! I found the accessories a pain at forst in regards to having to pull the water tubing part of the hose back out after I was finished. However, other than that, I am happy. This hoover does wonders and I love it. Will probably go back over my carpet weekly until the water tank comes out completely clear. Do small sections at a time. I was at it for hours in amazement.

Bought this as a gift for my niece's 7th birthday and she was thrilled. I'd definitely recommend it to parents looking for a creative, screen-free activity that doesn't leave a mess behind. Perfect for crafty kids.
So easy to put together! It's sturdy and it is high enough that it leaves plenty of storage spece below the bed. I highly recommend this base to go with a memory foam mattress.
I loved this episode and I was cheering for Manny along with everyone else!

A little on the small size but as to be expected since it says that it is fitting... its also pretty thin and feels more like costume material which for some reason I didn't expect.. still cute, it'll work!

I've had this glass top on my 29-gallon setup for about six months now. The glass itself has held up fine with daily use, no chips or cracks, but I'm noticing the plastic hinge is starting to get a little brittle. It still opens and closes, but I worry about long-term durability with regular handling. The back strip doesn't sit quite flush against the rim, which leaves a small gap I've had to cover. It works, just not as solid as I'd expect after less than a year of normal wear and tear.

I've worn these for about three weeks now, mostly walking my dog on gravel trails and pavement. The leather is holding up well and I actually really like the padded collar, makes a noticeable difference on longer walks, no rubbing at all. My only real gripe is the insole feels a bit flat after a few hours, so I swapped in a cheap drugstore insert and it's been smooth since. The olive color looks better in person, kind of a muted, dusty green that goes with everything. I normally wear a 9 in sneakers and got an 8, and they fit perfectly with medium-weight socks. Not life-changing, but solid, comfortable boots for the price.

I've had this paperback riding around in my bag for over a month now, through rain, coffee spills, and a very curious toddler, and the spine hasn't cracked at all. Pages are still crisp, cover barely shows wear, honestly impressive for how much I've manhandled it. The story itself took me by surprise. It starts slow, digging deep into the messy, real-life baggage soldiers carry home, which felt heavier and more honest than your typical whodunit. By the time the mystery threads started weaving together, I was already fully invested. Reread a few sections just to catch details I missed the first time, and the binding held up perfectly. Solid, lasting read.

My daughter usually wears Vans without issue, but these gave her nasty blisters on her heels the first few wears. We solved it with thicker socks and a bit of breaking in. Now she's fine and loves the style. I'd recommend them to anyone willing to deal with a short break-in period, just don't expect instant out-of-the-box comfort.
This movie is so horrible it really will make you SCREAM!!! "AH, turn it off!" Great for laughs as "B" horror movie go.

This bag is great. I have all kinds of bike bags because none really worked that well for my needs. They were either, two small or inconvenient to use. This one has a tremendous amount of space without using the expansion. It is also shaped well so it doesn't interfere with pedaling. ie your thigh doesn't hit it. Not only do I have the normal tools but I have put my big ass kryptonite chain and lock in the bag, all without using the expansion and I still have room to put a wallet and keys in there! I never use exclamation points by the way. The mounting/compression straps and connectors work well. It seems durable as well. It is so great that I plan to buy two more for other bikes.
These are really not the items I was expecting. They have bells in the them which I was not aware of and I worry about my dogs accidentally consuming the bell.
Thought I'd need to adjust it, but it clicked right in and feels rock-solid.

I grabbed this as a last-minute gift for my son's birthday, and the shipping was shockingly fast, arrived two days early in a sturdy box with zero damage. Opening it was a treat; the packaging felt premium, with everything snug in molded foam and the Bat-copter itself looking way cooler in person than in the photos. The matte black finish and detailed sculpting gave it an immediate "wow" factor before we even powered it on. First impression was just pure excitement, my kid's jaw dropped. It feels solid, not flimsy, and the remote paired instantly. Honestly, I was almost jealous watching him unbox it.

I initially bought a medium size for my pug/terrier mix. WAY too small for his broad chest. I ended up returning it and purchased an XL for him. It fits wonderfully and seems to be comfortable for him, with room to adjust if I need it. This is a great harness!
What can you say--- cheap and it works as intended.
I'm very pleased with my purchase and would definitely recommend this product to others.

Chaplin mocked Hitler rather well for me but this is completely different to that. It pities the ignorance as much as mocks and hits a perfect balance. Chris Morris is now a true genius in my book. The Day Today would've been enough but now this...brilliant. The Christian fundies are so ripe for mocking next....and then? So much ignorance to mock.

I've had this filter running on my 55 gallon freshwater setup for over six months now and it's still dead silent and pumping strong. The build feels solid, no cracks or leaks even after a few accidental bumps during tank cleans. I love that I can stuff it with whatever media I want, though honestly the stock sponges last way longer than I expected before needing a rinse. I also grabbed the skimmer attachment and it keeps the waterline crystal clear. Zero complaints, just reliable performance day in and day out.
This series kept me hooked from the very first chapter to the last.

I bought this in blue as well. It fits well and has good weight without being overpowering or too clingy. I did buy it in small and I usually take an 8 but because it was very full, I thought the small would fit fine. It does.
Unable to find this size in any stores, medium in the 45 piece package....My dogs teeth are beautiful....no need for doggie dentures....

A kindle single. A true story that is longer than a magazine article, but shorter than a regular book. Four stars for good portrayal of Simon Lewis's life and information about traumatic brain injury and blindsight. It felt like a good magazine article. Recommended for those who deal with anyone with brain injuries as it gives an internal view into their world's new mindset. Quote: "With all internal regulators of my brain damaged, I felt everything simultaneously." Quote from the writer, Chris Colin about Simon, "What life has in store for him isn't clear. But he seems to accept this." Great interaction between writer and Simon Lewis. I appreciated how Chris unfolded Simon's story, educated us about traumatic brain injury and blindsight, then carried us into Simon's changed perspective of the world. Very intriguing! Simon Lewis is inspiring in his fight for recovery! Chris Colin is an excellent writer. Recommended for inspiration in overcoming difficulties and for those dealing with traumatic brain injuries.

The box arrived looking like it had been drop-kicked across the country, totally crushed. Pulled the boots out and the left heel already had scuffs and the stitching was loose. No padding inside the package at all. First impression was straight-up sloppy, and honestly they didn't look any better on my feet.
Still holds up beautifully, and my niece is now obsessed too. Perfect pick for a cozy family movie night with any generation.

I'll admit, I was bracing for the usual disappointment when this arrived, but the packaging alone had me optimistic. It came in a sturdy, crisp box with the shirt folded neatly between layers of tissue paper, no creases, no weird factory smell. The fabric felt substantial right out of the package, and slipping it on was a genuine surprise: the shoulders sat perfectly without that tight pull I've come to expect, and the cut skimmed my torso without billowing like a tent. Shipping was crazy fast too, ordered late Thursday and it was on my doorstep by Saturday morning. First impression? This is the shirt I've been hunting for years.
The scene where Captain Jack faces his past was so emotionally raw, I loved how the show can shift from a ridiculous alien chase to something deeply human without missing a beat.

I put this on a brick wall over my fireplace, next to a painting of a Autumnal forest that is mostly red. Looks great. The clock is silent, keeps perfect time and is easy to read. I really am glad I got it.

I've reread this one three times now and the spine is still tight, no creases or loose pages. The story hits just as hard on a second pass too. Solid build, held up through coffee spills and a beach trip. Worth every penny.

I picked this up mainly to keep my rechargeables in good shape, and it's been a total workhorse. The display is clear and gives me the exact info I want without feeling cluttered or confusing. It handles both my 18650s and AAs with zero hassle, and the slots aren't too tight. Honestly, I just pop the batteries in and let it do its thing, couldn't be simpler. Really happy with it.
Very disappointed in this product. Couldn't wait to get it. Everything "sticks" in it

For the money, this thing's a steal. Holds up great after a couple hundred shots, barely shows wear. My only gripe is pulling arrows out takes some muscle, especially for younger kids. Bought a cheap arrow puller and now it's smooth sailing. Solid buy for backyard practice without breaking the bank.

I've been using these wafers for my bristlenose pleco and a small gang of corydoras for a few months now. The container lasts a surprisingly long time, which makes the cost per feeding really reasonable compared to some other brands I've tried. My fish go nuts for them within seconds of them hitting the gravel, and I appreciate that they hold their shape long enough for the bottom feeders to get their share before breaking apart. The ingredients list seems solid for an everyday staple, and everyone in the tank looks healthy and active. Only minor gripe is that if I accidentally overfeed, I do need to do a small water change to clear things up, but that's on me. Overall, really happy with the bang for my buck here.

The box arrived a day earlier than expected and was well-packed, no dents or crushed corners, which I always appreciate for accessories like this. Right out of the package, the cover felt smooth with a nice matte finish that doesn't pick up fingerprints immediately. The magnetic closure is snappy and secure, and it fit my tablet perfectly on the first try without wrestling the corners. It's slim enough to slip into my bag easily but still feels substantial in hand. I'm giving four stars because I need more time to see how the edges hold up over daily use, but first impressions are solid.

Barry shines in this "men are from mars," battle of the sexes romp. Dave Barry makes you laugh without ever once becoming mean-spirited. If you have ever been married to a real 'guy' - or dated one - you will recognize the type from the first page on, and laugh out loud at Barry's depiction. Reading Dave Barry on the Kindle is downright addicting!
Snaps in tight but wish it came in a two-pack.
Got this for my daughter and she's obsessed. So much content for what I paid.
My package arrived two days early in perfect condition. The compact design and sleek finish instantly impressed me, feels sturdy, not flimsy. The soft touch and clean look are exactly what I wanted.

Arrived two days early and the box was solid, no dents, foam padding kept everything snug. Unwrapping it felt like opening a premium kit. Right away I noticed the smooth black finish and how sturdy the brackets felt in hand. All hardware was neatly bagged and labeled. Honestly, the first impression was so clean I was excited to start mounting before I even checked the instructions.

Went in with low expectations but this one surprised me. It demands patience early on, yet the payoff feels earned. Not perfect, but the layered story and flawed characters stuck with me longer than I thought they would.

Its funny how the internet, most especially the social media has become a crucial thing in our lives that it can even affect a relationship. Now a days, it has become one of the common reasons why a lot of things go wrong, even why a man would not want to commit (Read the book and you would understand what I mean). It was a wonderful book, although written for women to get their man committed. It was not at all one-sided.
Bought this for my nephew's birthday and he hasn't put it down. Perfect for any kid who's curious about drones but just starting out.
The mesh is so thin it ripped the first time I used it. My sneakers fell out mid-cycle and banged around loudly.

This is a very dense bone that is 5.5 inches long by about 2 inches wide. My 80 lb greyhound loves it. It's almost too big for him. I do think it cleans his teeth because he has to work so hard gnawing at it to get even the tiniest chunk to come off the end. He only gets through about half of this bone before he's full and tired. Then I remove it and save it for the next day. The 4 stars are because it's messy. It leaves orangish debris on his bed that is sticky and gross, in my opinion, not his:-) He'd give it a 10.

This is the kind of movie that stays with you for a few days, not because it's flashy but because the characters feel like people you've actually met. The lead detective has this quiet weariness that's completely convincing, and his partner brings just enough dry humor to cut the tension without ruining it. I'd hand this to anyone who loves slow-burn crime stories where the investigation matters more than explosions. My dad, who devours old noir paperbacks, would eat this up. I knocked off one star only because a couple of side threads felt a little rushed toward the end, but honestly, that's a minor gripe. Solid, grounded, and surprisingly moving by the final scene.

I love this scale its easy to use I need two! If I would have known that Bed Bath and Beyond also carried this brand I could have saved myself the shipping cost. There are several YouTube videos that will also help answer any questions you may have.

Her books are truly laugh our loud funny. I love them all and I truly have laughed at inopportune times and locations. Bottom line, she is hysterical to read and she will definitely tickle your funny bone.

Fits my 9 and 10 year old grand kids just fine and does the job. Great price, great value, and very adjustable. I read most all the reviews and they told it correctly. Thank you for the reviews on products because that is how we know if they are what we think they are. 10 year-old is 120 lbs.

I've had this Contigo mug for over a year now, and it's survived more drops than I care to admit. I'm clumsy, especially before coffee, and I've knocked it off my desk onto hardwood floors, out of the car onto pavement, you name it. The lid still seals perfectly, no cracks or leaks, and the vacuum insulation hasn't weakened at all. I can fill it at 6 a.m., get distracted by meetings, and it's still piping hot at noon. The finish has a few scuffs, but functionally it's like new. My partner got me a fancier mug as a gift, and honestly I keep reaching for this one instead. It just works.
I love these Lutron dimmers. I have them all over the house.

Picked this up for my muzzleloader and honestly didn't expect much at this price point. Clarity rivals glass that costs twice as much, and the eye relief is super forgiving. Held zero through a rainy weekend sight-in and three hunts. For what I paid, it's an absolute steal. Nikon really nailed the balance of quality and affordability here.

I've always loved this series and was excited to revisit this season, but it's a mixed bag, especially considering what you pay for the whole set. About half the episodes have that sharp, classic humor I remember, but the other half feel like they're spinning their wheels with storylines that don't quite land. For the price, you're still getting a decent amount of content, and there are definitely some laugh-out-loud moments that make it worth a casual watch. Just don't expect the consistent brilliance of earlier seasons. If you're a completist, it's fine to pick up on sale, but at full price it's a bit hard to justify when the quality wavers this much. Not terrible, not great, right down the middle.

Quality made and no leaks for me. Hand held sprayer installed by toilet in minutes and wife very happy. Thank you for making this. Amazon is awesome for allowing us easy and convenient access to these kind of stuff.

I grabbed this on a whim during a Kindle sale and honestly got way more than my money's worth. Grisham builds the whole burnout-and-reinvention arc so naturally you forget you're reading fiction. The pacing never drags, the office banter feels genuine, and when the story finally lands in the courtroom it's electric, you can tell he's completely at home there. For a few bucks I got a weekend I genuinely looked forward to unwinding with. If you want a tight legal drama with sharp dialogue and zero filler, this is a steal at the price.

My wife and I have an historic condo in a circa 1890's building - a truly lovely period place with high ceilings, wide moldings, huge pocket doors, marble fireplaces, wood floors, etc. it cries out for period-piece furniture and "atmosphere" consistent with it's heritage. We both love candles, but they have their drawbacks, from real flames in an older buidling (not a good combination) to dripping, wick-cleaning, etc. Nevertheless, they are worth the effort. When saw these I had to have them. First, they look EXACTLY like real wax candles - and even kind of feel "waxy" (although they are not made of wax). And the electric "candle" light is authentic - and can be adjusted from just "on" to a "flickering" real candle effect. And, best of all, you get a small remote control that you can use to turn them on, turn them off, and set an automatic timer to keep them on for 4 hours, 8 hours, or 24 hours, after which they will turn off. They run on inexpensive batteries, which last forever, and put out zero heat - no fire hazard. And, the look and light and flicking is incredible. The only thing you don't get is a scent - but then again there are other ways to get that besides candles. We love them, and the price is great. Highly recommend.

Not damn this thing is a good deal more gun case than I expected when I bought it. If I went boating I could chuck this thing in the water and tether it to me and it would all be fine on the other end. Tough as nails. Water PROOF, not resistant. Outstanding value.

This leash was exactly what I was looking for. It's an even bigger bonus that it's made in AMERICA, and a small company to boot. The leash is very noticeable- a reflective neon green (like what road workers wear) which is great when walking early morning/evening/night. My dog loves to lunge which creates more PSI on the leash, and this holds up to her exuberance.

Bought refurbished from 6ave. Item is practically brand new, and very clean, also came with the Nikon leaflet. This is a nice versatile lens for carry around, everyday shooting. Here is my first nightscape with this little gem.

I should've listened to the bad reviews. This thing is junk, flimsy plastic, barely lasted a week before the mechanism jammed completely. The lid won't lock and it just feels like a toy. I honestly wouldn't even recommend it to someone I dislike. Save your cash and avoid the headache. Maybe useful as a paperweight, nothing more.

I'd tell anyone with truly narrow feet to grab these, they run slim through the laces but fit my low-volume feet like a glove. The orange color pops, and they're crazy lightweight for all-day wear. Arch support surprised me in a good way. If you're even slightly wide, though, size up or skip. Four stars because they're perfect for narrow-footed walkers, not the average fit.
Not as beginner-friendly as I'd hoped, but once I got past the dense parts, a few tips really improved my browsing routine.

For the price, I expected way more. The material feels thin and flimsy, like it'll tear after a few walks. I get that it's not a premium brand, but even budget collars usually hold up better than this. The little bone charms are cute at first, but they're just cheap plastic that clinks around and gets caught on things. Already seeing loose threads near the D-ring, which is the whole point of a collar. Honestly, I've gotten sturdier ones from the dollar section. It's functional for now, but I doubt it lasts the month. Not a total disaster, just disappointing for what I paid.

All I wanted was something to tell me how many watts my appliances are consuming. I can figure out the cost myself. But it won't tell me what the wattage consumption is. Need to plug it in for a kilowatt hour or so. And how do I translate that back to wattage? Way too complicated, and misses what I had hoped was its basic purpose. Sending it back.
My budgie spends ages tugging the colorful wooden beads, but the bell doesn't chime very loudly.
All six books were great. If you can read them in order.

Finally found a Bluetooth adapter where the pairing button isn't a mushy nightmare. Snappy click, instant connection every time. The aux passthrough is super clean too, zero hiss on my wired headphones.
This was a birthday present for my great neice. This is the theme that she's crazy about.
Box was totally crushed when it got here, and the toy was in pieces before we even opened it.
This was a vital tool for me to complete my repair. IT allowed me to get into a space that a 3/8" drive would not fit
That is going to be my next saying for the next few months. Did not see that coming, if I wasn't a man it would of brought a tear to my eye.

I've followed this series from the start, and while this installment isn't my top pick, it still delivers that sharp, character-driven writing I've come to expect. The pacing felt a little uneven, some transitions seemed rushed, and a few new faces took me a moment to warm up to. That said, the emotional core is solid, and there are some genuinely satisfying moments that tie earlier threads together in clever ways. The dialogue snaps, the atmosphere sticks with you, and even when the plot meanders, I was invested. A solid entry that keeps the bigger story moving forward. Not flawless, but definitely worth the read for longtime fans.

I bought these hoping to save a few bucks instead of going with a brand name filter, but it was a total waste of money. Right out of the package, the threading is so sloppy I couldn't get a proper seal no matter how carefully I lined it up, water sprays everywhere from the connection point. Even when I managed to get it sort of seated, the flow was weak and sputtery. For the price, I expected at least basic functionality, but these feel cheaply made and aren't worth the hassle. I ended up tossing them and buying something pricier that actually works. Complete false economy.
Great brush. Helps to make my SB base resume its best condition after waxing
Perfect for anyone hanging heavy mirrors without the stress.
Required ten minutes of assembly. Long wanted a grinder, don't know why I waited that long. At this price it makes no sense at all to be filing odd parts to debur and fit.

Are people really dum enough to pay this for this cable that costs less than 10 bucks to make? Evidently some people think if they pay more money they will get better quality. NOT true. HDMI 1.4 cables can be had for a decent price (I often catch a special and get them less than 2 for 10 bucks). This is an outrageous insulting offer and the so called hype about this cable is completely wrong. As has been already belabored here, a cable is either going to work or it isn't for HDMI. There's nothing "Ultimate" about this cable. PLEASE DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY. If you have that kind of money to burn I'll be happy to take your money, give you TEN good HDMI 1.4 cables and pocket the rest! DON'T BE A FOOL AND BELIEVE THE HYPE.
my wife's been looking everywhere for this item. Should have known to trust Amazon from the start. She likes them and I liked the price
crazy about the way it works, in fact, nont sure how it works!

The Disney Descendants doll set with Evie and Carlos are two times the fun in a great package. The dolls comes with 2 outfits, 2 pairs of shoes, 1 pair of earrings, and 6 accessories so they each have a change of clothes so you child will have more variety. The Thing i am most impressed with in the richness in color and detail in Evie's hair. The dark blue/purple really pop's and both dolls are a great likeness to their Disney Show character's. The dolls are made from standard plastics and are fully articulated for lots of pose-able playable fun. These would make a great gift for a fan of the show or a little girl who loves dolls.

Yea, pretty basic stuff I guess. I wish I had this info presented to me so organized and clear when I was a teen. I can't even fathom the pain and suffering I could have avoided. A great gift for any young person who matters in your life. Most adults could learn a thing or two as well.

We've had these for about six months now and honestly, I don't know why we waited so long to switch. They're super lightweight but handle daily abuse without chipping or scratching. We run them through the dishwasher constantly and they come out looking brand new every time. Stacking them is a breeze too, they take up way less cabinet space than our old bulky stoneware. Simple, classic look that just works with everything.

The box arrived in just two days and was packed like a tank, thick foam inserts, everything snug, not a scratch on the amp or the transducer unit itself. Unboxing felt premium, and the quick-start card actually made sense for once. I had it bolted to my couch frame and dialed in within twenty minutes. First movie test was *Dune*, and the moment the ornithopters spooled up, my whole seating platform came alive with this tight, rumbly presence that felt way more immersive than I expected. It's not just vibration, it's texture. You feel engine growls and explosions differently, not just one-note thuds. For a gadget I was half-skeptical about, the first night sold me completely. Zero regrets.
Arrived in perfect shape, no dings. Popped it in right away and was hooked instantly.
This book answered a lot of questions that the previous books in this series had raised. It was a good stand- alone but also it fit well into the previous set of stories.
Had this litter box for over eight months now with zero issues. Still looks and works like day one despite daily use and a very energetic cat. Solid construction that hasn't warped or cracked at all.
I've used the built-in LED light way more than expected, makes working in dim corners so much easier. Solid tool all around.
Other than the Discworld series I cannot think of a funnier more entertaining series of novels. Read the entire series and enjoy.
Wore these all summer and they still look brand new, no peeling or scuffs at all.

Bought this months ago and it's still spot-on after weekly use. Took a few drops on concrete, no issues. Solid little tool that just works. Great for peace of mind when drying out the basement carpet.

I've worn these gold swirl earrings pretty regularly for about three months now and they still look just as nice as the day I got them. The leverback clasp holds up well, no bending or loosening. They've survived a few accidental showers and sweat sessions without any tarnishing. Only reason I'm not giving five stars is I wish the gold tone was slightly warmer. Still, solid quality for the price.
The specs are pretty self-explanatory. It's fast and has 8 threads, and you can make it faster if you want. Doesn't come with a CPU cooler like the cheap ones do.
Good enough for quick fixes if you don't mind it sliding around.

The book arrived in a tight bubble mailer with zero corner dings, which I always appreciate. First glance, the cover looks crisp and the print is easy on the eyes. I'm only partway through, but the setup grabbed me fast, Coopers protectiveness and Sasha's vulnerability feel real. Four stars for now since I haven't finished, but the packaging and early chapters are solid.

Put these through a few months of daily use on rusty farm equipment hydraulics and they still lock up tight with zero jaw wobble. The teeth haven't dulled at all either. Honestly surprised how solid they are for the price.

The usual problem with reviewing cat toys is what to say when kitty doesn't like / use the toy. It's hard to evaluate a product made for cats as a human, so normally if I get a toy and Ms Cat does not like it, I say no harm, no foul and usually opine that someone else's cat may like the toy / furniture. Not the case here. The entire premise of this toy is flawed, and I really don't think many cat owners or their pets will have much use for it. First, the cat shown in the picture lounging on the arch of the X must have been a) very much smaller than normal cats and b) carefully trained. My own quadruped is very average sized and she could not at all lounge on this thing without drooping more than a third of her body off of it. Most cats will not willingly assume such a position, so don't think of this as furniture. As a scratching post (and also as a theoretical lounging platform) this is also flawed, as it is very light weight and cheaply made. Cats will not use scratching posts that move around as they try to dig in, and this design is too light weight to offer the stability that a cat seeking to scratch is looking for. My cat tried this once as a scratching post, after I poured catnip over it, and after it slid across the floor as she tried to stretch out, she turned her nose up at it and has not returned to it since. Folks, if you want a scratching post, make sure it is solid and heavy. It will cost more than this does. If you want cat furniture, make sure it is solid and large enough to accommodate your cat. The designers of this product ignored these axioms and used a trained miniature cat to make it look more useful than it is. Two stars, because your cat might like it as a scratching post if you can wedge it somewhere where it can't move around too easily.

This spray was used in conjunction with other flea and tick prevention strategies. I used it to spray bedding that the problem cat would sleep and lay on a lot. The spray bottle is around 6 inches tall and 1.5 inches in diameter. Pros: *Helped supplement flea and tick prevention strategy Cons: *Can cause a reaction in cats if used a normal amount(-1 star) Additional Considerations: Consider other natural means of flea and tick prevention. Whatever you use, you will have to use multiple things in order to get rid of your flea problem. Overall: 4/5 stars (>=.5 rounds up, <.5 rounds down) => 4 stars If you have any further questions regarding the product in my review please leave a comment below and I will get back to you as soon as possible.

I have been an organic apple cider vinegar user for a couple decades now. What started me on it was talking to someone one day about how they would drink a tablespoon of it daily for a chronic heartburn issue. Well, that is all I had to hear to try it. Next time I went shopping I bought some with the mother in it. I am one of the crazy sorts that enjoy it straight up. LOL. However, I do add it to water most days. I can't imagine not having it on hand so when I was offered this, I figured it would be great to try since I've only used Bragg's in the past. The reason for the 4 stars is because I have not found what I feel to be the 'mother' in either bottle. There is some sediment but I haven't found the mother. I am also not to the bottom but when I shake a bottle of ACV the mother usually makes itself known. I'm not an expert and only have the one brand for comparison but I am used to SEEING the mother. I do not use apple cider vinegar with the mother for anything other than food-related. For household cleaning and disinfecting, I just use plain white vinegar. I feel this stuff is too good for that. One of my absolute favorite ways is in the summer with fresh cucumbers. I slice up cucumbers and onions and put them in a bowl with ACV, water, salt & pepper. Let that sit in the fridge and yummo. I always make my own salad dressing with it as well. I received this product at a discount for my evaluation and honest review.

By 2001 the resurgence of slasher movies had fortunately died down and audiences were in the mood for something new. Jeepers Creepers is a return to the old-fashioned monster movies in the style of classic Universal. Those were movies built on suspense and atmosphere rather than gore and multiple kills. Justin Long and Gina Philips play Darry and Trish, a pair of argumentative siblings who are traveling home through the Florida backwaters for spring break. Along the way they are terrorized by an unseen figure driving a ugly truck. Darry sees the figure dumping what appears to be dead bodies into a pipe by an abandoned church. In a moment of agonizing plot contrivance Darry turns around and heads back to find out what's really going on, unawares that he'll give the villain a taste of his fear, thus making him a marked man. Victor Salva layers the movie with homosexual and incestuous subtext, while keeping the monster in the dark for the most part, building fear and mystery about him. The Creeper is a great villain and Salva builds an intriguing mythology about him. The swift running time (the credits roll at the 85 minute mark) prevents things from getting deep or expansive but the sequel builds upon this world and is actually a better movie despite the hate. On its own Jeepers Creepers is an effective but superficial. Plenty of points for being original however. The Blu-ray is in 1.85:1 1080p and it is an improvement on the DVD, however there are just a few too many scenes shot in soft focus which don't give it much of a pop. The black levels are impressive though. It sounds better in DTS HD-MA, and all the extras from the DVD have been ported over.

Everything went without a hitch with the seller but I just wish this mat was bigger than what it is. Probably my fault for not paying attention to the size but I hate when I get out of the tub and I stand on it and it doesn't cover all the water dripping off of me on the mat. Other than that I like how absorbent it is.

I got this for my nephew's third birthday and it's been a total hit. The pages are sturdy enough for his enthusiastic little hands, and the artwork is so warm and inviting. We've made it part of his bedtime routine and he already "reads" along with some parts. Honestly, seeing his face light up is the best part.

These are a solid buy for the money. The cushioning feels plush without being mushy, and I can wear them all day on concrete floors. Style-wise they look way more expensive than they are. My only minor gripe is the arch support sits a little low for my foot, so I tossed in an insert. Still, for the price point, the materials and overall build quality surprised me. Totally worth it.

I am giving it 4 Stars for Now. I have not used it yet. That being said. I paid $9. 95 for a Saws-all from Harbor Freight. it lasted for 3 yrs of constant use. then I gave it to a friend. lolo. People who do not know how to use one. unskilled home owner. can ruin the BEST most EXPENSIVE tool on the Market. When cutting. push the Saw all the way down on the FOOT and apply adequate pressure to keep it there as sawing. do not FORCE the SAW too hard to make the cut. Watch out for BLADE BINDING by the Material you are cutting starts pinching the blade. you can burn the Motors out by too much MUSCLE forcing it down thru the cut. or binding the blade!. I will update after using my Saw. They are a great tool don't know what I would do without one!!!!. Cheers. Tim.

I love this little chromebook for what it is ($99 nowadays). With that said...it just doesn't have the power for any fun droid games, but works perfectly for typing and internet browsing. ALSO, its not quite Windows compatible (between gdocs and Word) AND you cannot hook up a printer. There is NO installing programs as it is a Chromebook. Great for what it is, but having originally spent $400, I would like to have gotten more versatility out of it. If you want something for the kids or just will be using to write with in gdocs, at $99, this is a good deal.

I picked this up on a whim after a friend wouldn't stop raving about it, and honestly, it's been a total game-changer for my living room workouts. The pacing is just right, challenging enough to leave me shaky but not so brutal that I dread pressing play. I'm not a dancer at all, yet the cues are clear enough that I actually feel graceful by the end. Within two weeks, my legs and core felt noticeably stronger, and my posture improved in ways I didn't expect. It's weirdly meditative too; I finish each session sore but weirdly refreshed. If you're on the fence, just go for it, this thing delivers.
For the price, this stuff is unbeatable. My picky terrier cleans his bowl every meal, and his coat's never looked shinier. A huge bag lasts way longer than I expected.
My 3-year-old asks for this every single day. It's held up great to constant handling and makes counting practice feel like playtime.
Put these brushes through a dozen range days now and they're still like new, no bent bristles at all.
Surprisingly good read, way more engaging than I expected. The pacing kept me hooked, and it totally delivered on its promise.
These are some of the lower quality bike shorts that I have used, but they are cheap and have not worn out yet. The material is oddly stretchy and shifts around, but they seem good for shorter rides.

I do not own this rifle but am open to purchasing one. The reviews are very positive, but some reviewers mention 'barrel-droop.' Amazon even sells a device to bolt onto the gun to mitigate 'barrel-droop' so this must be a real issue. Reviews of other manufacturers' guns do not mention 'barrel-droop' so I can only conclude that RWS has an issue other manufacturers do not. But if this is such a great gun, why does one have to purchase an extra device to mitigate what appears to me to be either a design issue or a manufacturing defect? I would love to hear a real explanation from an expert. Until then, I will postpone any purchase decision. Best regards.

Totally depressing. No real hope. All good people are and real caring is covered over with. what will get what I want for me,By the step mother and the next door farmer. Their difference with a user is, they use people instead of drugs. Reality is too much with me in everyday life so my reading has to be somewhat promising. I did not like this book. W.

Picked these up for my hallway sconces and they cast a soft, warm glow that's just perfect. No flicker, easy install, and the color feels cozy without being dull. Genuinely pleased with how they turned out.

I really love the soft, breathable fabric on this top, it's what sold me. I'm 5'2" with a smaller frame, and usually one-size stuff swallows me, but the ruching detail along the sides gives it actual shape instead of looking like a tent. Wore it on a humid day walking around a farmers market and stayed totally comfortable, no scratchy seams or digging in anywhere. The adjustable straps were a nice surprise too; I could finally get the neckline to sit exactly where I wanted without constant adjusting. It's become my go-to for layering under cardigans or just wearing alone with jeans. Washed it a couple times now and the color hasn't faded at all. Honestly impressed with how well it's held up.
Bought this for my 36 year old daughter...she loves it!!! Really classy looking, for a cat:/

I liked getting an American based movie and that they changed some of the terms such as Muggle to No-mag (spelling?) because that is true to the culture, America may be the offspring of Britain and we may all speak English but we still change things to make it our own lift vs elevator for example. It definitely had a different feel than the previous HP movies, darker, older, more mature. But it's still neat to see the origins of some of the HP lore
Really pleased with this find. Looks even better in person, super comfy, and arrived way quicker than I expected.

I had a tough time with the main character, she makes the same frustrating choices she spent the first few chapters regretting, which made it hard to stay invested. The writing itself flows well, and the small-town setting has a cozy feel that kept me reading. I'd only suggest this to readers who don't mind a messy, slow-growth protagonist and prefer atmosphere over strong decision-making. It wasn't quite for me, but my book club friend who loves flawed, realistic leads might enjoy it.

I can enter my parking garage using a key, or remotely using the garage door opener (I have a 3089 10-pin opener). Since entering is easier via the remote door, I was hoping to find a small remote that I could fit into my pocket so that I could keep the main opener in the car, and use the smaller one as a key. I was a bit skeptical that this little device would work, but it works perfectly. You just open it up, program the pins, and it's good to go. I've only tested the range from ~ 2 car lengths (b/c that's all I need) but from that range it works flawlessly. Oh, and kudos to North Shore Commercial Door for fast processing/shipping. Ordered it on Wed and received it on Sat.
Your local HVAC contractor will probably charge you 4x this price. My original had worn out pivot posts so it was stuck closed. This was an easy quick replacement.

This continuing B&B saga with the nutty cousins had more interaction with the two at a different venue not the B&B location. Hard to imagine a town that had such a complacent police force that they require a lot of help in between meals, snacks, and parties and a bunch of festival activities thrown in with murders! Engrossing but not as good as some of their other adventures!

Glad to add this one to my party games collection. Some of our party participants backed out after finding out that you actually have to think during this game but after playing a few rounds and finding out how funny it is to see what everyone else wrote, they were back in! Nice game for middle schoolers and up although I did find that the scoring was a bit confusing.
Soooooo adorable!! My puppy looks so cute!!! Very nice product!! Came all wrapped up nice and FAST customer service!!! I will purchase more!!!! LOVE IT!!!!!!
Arrived fast in a simple sleeve, no damage. Looked promising right away, and it turned out to be a cozy little escape.

Got two for our front and back doors. Install was super straightforward, even with my limited DIY skills. They feel solid and give a nice, clean look instead of those ugly chains. The latch clicks into place with a satisfying thud, and I sleep better knowing there's no keyhole to mess with. Honestly feels like a proper upgrade to our home security without breaking the bank.
Bought these for my grandpa, and after months of daily wear they still look brand new and hold their shape perfectly.
Fits perfectly in the Amazon basics double door large kennel.
The magnetic clasp clicks shut so smoothly, and the chain length sits perfectly against my collarbone without tangling.

Just got these and I'm honestly shocked at how light they feel all day. No break-in needed, and they don't overwhelm my small frame. Walked miles straight out of the box. Very happy with this purchase.
Honestly, it looks even better in person than in the photos, and assembly took maybe ten minutes.
Not your average vampire flick! Action packed! If you haven't seen it you should! It's truly amazing. I ordered it twice!

I travel a lot and needed something compact that provides extra outlets and USB connections. This worked perfectly. Update: 2017 I've owned this product for almost 2 years and its still holding up well. I've used it on every out-of-town trip I've had since its purchase (50+ trips) and its the most important accessory in my laptop bag. Would recommend again.

I did return mine - I have all tile floors with room rugs, and being semi-retired and self-employed from home I spend a lot of time in my slippers walking on the tile. The original cork built-up soles on the OG clogs are perfect for this whereas when I wear this Charisma with it's soft thinner sole in comparison it SEEMS I can almost feel the floor though the sole. That means not enough support for wearing them 10-12 hours a day every day. DANG it I love them and they were only $42 from Warehouse Deals....I do wish they had worked out! If you like the look I would encourage you to try them out and see for yourself how they feel. As a general house slipper, especially on wall to wall padded carpeting and just light use in morning, evening and weekends I bet they'd be GREAT. DETAILS: Charisma is unmistakably a slipper (as opposed to a clog that could be worn as a shoe). Charisma has a snug fit - the size 42 for women's size 11 had my toe pushing right up at the top. Bear in mind one of my feet is 10.5 and the other 11 - the 10.5 foot thought the length was perfect. The fabric is very soft with some give and they actually felt OK even with my toes nicely wrapped up - for the 10 minutes I tried. Like the OG clog style, these do have the molded foot bed with the slightly built up arch support. They are nowhere near as tough and stiff as the OG clog style; the sole is thinner and more flexible especially at the toes which are not bulbous and padded as are the OG clog style. The bottom of these soles are covered in thin "grips" that mildly keep them from slipping on tile so I would say these are not for use outdoors - much.

Got this for my 3-year-old who loves bath time art, and honestly, I expected more staying power. The colors are bright and it's easy to clean off the tub walls, which is great. But the crayons wear down shockingly fast, within a few sessions they were nubs, and my kiddo got annoyed trying to grip them. The little fish bowl holder is cute for storage but doesn't solve the frustration factor. It's a fun novelty, just be ready to replace them sooner than you'd think. For the price, I figured we'd get a few months, not a couple weeks.

I really wanted to like this thing because it looked so handy in the photos, but it's a total letdown. The build quality is super flimsy for the price, and the frame feels like it'll snap if you hit a bump. My cat is on the smaller side and still seemed cramped in there. The mesh panels are so thin I'm worried they'll tear just from her claws kneading. The wheels squeak nonstop and barely roll on anything but perfectly smooth floors. For something advertised as ideal for vet trips and city use, it's just not practical. I ended up carrying it the whole way anyway. Honestly, a basic soft carrier would've been a better choice.

RE Butler, need I say more.? I will though. I love the Wiccan- were-bear series. The imagination the author brings to life is such that you can immerse yourself in her world. The Wicca, the other shifters, vampires, and dragons... this is a stand alone that has a romance that is fought for, and characters you can identify with. Honestly, you are missing out if you don't read the series.
Stood up to weeks of playground use without a single loose thread.
So much fun and we were thrilled to get this in our House Party pack. I love how creative you have to be and this forces you to think outside the box. Great for the whole family!!
Bought this train a few months ago and it's been through everything, carpet crashes, bath time, and daily play. Still looks brand new. Really impressed with how sturdy it is.
It works well enough for light watering, but I wish the plastic felt a bit more sturdy.
Worked fine for two weeks, then the left earbud just died. Now it won't even charge. Total waste.

Arrived way faster than expected and was packed really securely. Box was pristine, and everything felt premium right out of the package. Setup was a breeze, and the extra collar I ordered synced instantly. First impressions are seriously impressive, solid build and super intuitive. My pup took to it right away. Definitely a great buy.
Great gift for anyone who loves elegant accessories. My sister hasn't taken it off since her birthday.

Got this i7-3930K back in 2018 from a buddy who was upgrading his rig, and it's still chugging along like a champ. I've put it through absolute hell, rendering, gaming, running multiple VMs simultaneously, and it hasn't flinched once. Even after years of daily use with a modest overclock, temps stay reasonable and performance is rock solid. I finally delidded it last year just to refresh the thermal paste, and the die looked pristine. No degradation, no weird memory controller issues, nothing. For a chip that's over a decade old now, it's honestly ridiculous how well it holds up. Built like a tank.

I went in with high hopes after the first book, and this one still managed to surprise me. The pacing never lags, the banter is sharp, and Colton's arc got deeper than I expected. Already pre-ordered the finale, can't wait to see how it wraps up.

The older woman has a long standing affair with a younger while at the same time her husband is having an affair. A beautiful young woman comes into the picture. She is smitten with the young man. The young woman is expected to marry an older man. The story revolves around the personalities and complications in these relationships. The resolution is well done.

This little gadget has been a lifesaver for my setup. I wasn't expecting much at this price, but it handles my mouse, keyboard, and occasional flash drive without a hiccup. The individual port switches are way more handy than I imagined. It's exactly what I needed for basic expansion, just don't plan on juicing up a tablet through it.
This toy was shipped in a timely fashion with no damage. It is a well made product for a very good price compared to department stores! Very happy with my purchase as are my kiddos!

For the price, this edition is a steal. The cleaned-up formatting makes it actually readable without the usual public-domain mess. Love how the London map links pull you right into the story. It's a thoughtful little upgrade that feels way more expensive than it is. Totally worth it.
This is a great cooler and just the right size for short trips. Coleman still makes good stuff and this is one of them. Nice product and a decent price.

Well, it just came in the mail and I was so excited (my 7 months old adopted dog is a mad chewer, particularly on cords) that I opened it immediately and began to put it on my iPad cord. I carefully put it in and squeezed it shut to be sure no actual cord was exposed. It stunk like mad, but I figured that would die down and at least my cords weren't being destroyed - heck, if I had to I could charge it in another room, right? I had the 10 foot size open because it's a long cord, so only a small piece had to be trimmed. My fingers are reeking by now, and I'm about to eat lunch, but hey, the dog won't chew on it, right? I deliberately left the cord on the floor while I went to make my lunch, peeking in on the puppy. Stayed away completely, so I couldn't tell if it would deter. Went in to eat (or try to, it really smelled fresh out of the package) and the puppy was sitting off to the side, behaving himself, so...... WAIT! What's that. He's chewing on the small piece of cord protector I cut off. And as I watched to see if it bothered him at all, he continued to worry it and chew. Maybe this stuff works on some dogs. I'm going to have to try the bitter Apple repellant spray I bought along with this and hope for the best. Sure wish I hadn't gotten 2 packs of each size though. With that smell, and the poor results, no way I'm using it.

I have a 65-pound rescue who used to drag me down the street. This thing is a total game changer. She settled into it after one short session, and now walks are actually relaxing. I'd recommend it to anyone with a strong puller, especially new adopters or smaller-framed owners who struggle with control.
Super happy with how this turned out, fits perfectly and feels solid.

Loved this first novel by Trudy Nan Boyce. Vivid narrative and compelling characters. An inside look at the life of a female detective,Sarah Alt, affectionately known as Salt...in downtown Atlanta. Excellent asides about the history of Atlanta and its denizens....black and white....as well as as a trip into the darker side of a strange and beautiful city. I look forward to reading her next novel, Old Bones.

I wanted to like this one because the kitchen camera setup with the oscillating fan was a clever idea, and that one scene where the babysitter is just standing still in the hallway gave me genuine chills. But the rest of the movie leans way too hard on loud jump scares that don't feel earned. The slow dread that made the earlier installments work is mostly gone here. It's like they decided subtlety was boring and just threw things at the screen hoping you'd flinch. By the last twenty minutes I was more annoyed than scared, and the ending felt rushed and kind of silly. It's a shame because the potential was right there.

I've been carrying this rescue-style folder daily for about four months now, and it's held up way better than I expected. The blade keeps its edge through a ton of cardboard, zip ties, and general warehouse abuse without needing constant touch-ups. I was skeptical about the seatbelt cutter at first, but after practicing on some old webbing, it slices clean every time, no snagging. The glass breaker tip still looks new despite a few accidental drops on concrete. The rubberized handle has just enough texture to stay put even with wet or greasy hands, but it hasn't worn smooth or gotten sticky. The pivot action is still crisp with zero blade play. Honestly, for the price, the durability surprised me.

Bought these for a summer lake trip. Overall, they're solid water shoes, lightweight and they don't get waterlogged. On the boardwalk or boat deck, they feel great. The issue came wading in: fine silt and small pebbles slip right through the mesh. After twenty minutes, I had to stop and shake them out twice. Still, they dry in no time and don't smell. Good for quick dips or poolside, just not ideal if you're hanging out in mucky shallows.
This item's bulky for a small apartment counter top, but works like a charm!
Box arrived crushed and the blaster was already scuffed out of the plastic.
I wanted socks with a clear left/right label, which these have, but the stitching inside the toe seam is bulky and rubs against my pinky toe. Fine for short walks, but annoying after a few hours.

I was so glad all the characters were very appealing and kept my interest. I think the more I watch movies with different life styles I will be more excepting to it. I know these are just movies, but you can get the questions answered without putting people on the spot. I wanted to know how do gay people have sex? And how do they go about meeting one another in public? Thank you for providing answers and a different perspective!

I had a hard time settling on how I felt about this one. There's a charming indie vibe and some genuinely funny moments, and you can tell everyone involved was having fun. But the pacing dragged, and the story lost momentum right when I wanted it to dig deeper. It almost felt like two different films stitched together, and the emotional payoff never fully arrived for me. I didn't hate it, and I'll remember a handful of scenes fondly, but I can't say I'd rush to watch it again. Decent, just not the satisfying experience I was hoping for.

I was a little worried the sequel wouldn't live up to Joy Ride, but honestly, Aftershock blew me away. For the price, it's an absolute steal, I've paid more for books half this satisfying. The emotional depth here caught me off guard; the band dynamics and personal struggles felt raw and real, not just filler between steamy scenes. I tore through it in two nights because I couldn't put it down. You get a full, layered story that actually earns the happy ending, which makes the whole experience feel like a treat. If you're into rock band romance, this one delivers big without making your wallet wince. Easily one of the best impulse buys I've made lately.

Went from several years of Dish network toy to DirecTv and never looked back. We placed the RF boxes downstairs and change the channels from the piggy backed tv's with these controllers. They work great with the home distribution system from Amazon.

I really like this alarm clock so far. It works very well with the iPhone and I've only had a few small issues with it. Occasionally when you put the iPhone in the cradle it will only start charging the phone, but it won't play the audio. I've only had this happen maybe twice since I bought it 2 months ago. I think it's something to do with if you're playing a song already when you plug the phone into the dock. It looks great, and I really like how the dock slides back into the clock for when you're not using it. The dimmer is nice, but I wish it would maybe go one shade darker. The audio quality is superb considering the size. Overall, I'm very happy with the money I spent on this unit compared to the other ones available on Amazon.

Purchased this as a gift for my son, who is obsessed with all things Snoopy. He loves the classic "Cutes and Ladders" already, and this game adds another element to the gameplay making it a little different and interesting.

For the price, I wasn't expecting miracles, but it's been solid on fleas so far. Found one tick on my lab a day after spraying, which was a bummer, but overall the bottle's huge and goes a long way. Smell is mild and didn't bother my cats at all. Decent bang for your buck.

I wasn't sure what to expect from a bed-in-a-box, honestly, but this thing blew me away. Unboxing was kind of fun, it comes rolled tight and wrapped, and as soon as you cut the plastic, you can literally hear it inhaling and expanding. I gave it a full day to plump up, and by night it was a legit 10-inch mattress with zero weird chemical smells. It's medium-firm in the best way; I'm a side sleeper and my hips and shoulders feel cushioned without sinking in. My partner, who prefers something firmer, is just as happy. Edge support is solid too, no roll-off feeling when sitting on the side. For the price, I genuinely expected something flimsy, but it feels like a hotel mattress.

This thing is pretty easy to assemble, and pretty easy to charge. Got it to take off, but it tends to bank pretty hard in a random direction even in no wind. Lots to compensate for. Well, there was a lot to compensate for...before it caught fire. After about 5-10 minutes of flying, it came in for a landing, tilted a few inches from the ground, caught the grass and flipped. Not a hard landing at all, and no physical damage. On picking it back up, the propellers were spinning at full speed (with the throttle off) and smoke was coming out of the battery compartment. I quickly removed the battery, and could see where the circuit board had caught fire. So, this one is being retired after one use. I'm not risking hurting someone or damaging property. On the other hand, if you're looking for something to catch fire in mid air (maybe for a movie or something), this could be the perfect product for you.

We have a Yorkie-Poodle mix and her coat is constantly getting matted. We do try to brush her fairly often, but in her daily mischief, she still manages to get tangled. Typically, this means we're cutting matts out, which is usually a traumatizing event for all. Previously, we have just washed her with just a dog shampoo. It didn't really occur to me that we should be using a conditioner as well, until I came across this product. We have bathed her and used the Everyday Isle of Dogs Silky Coat shampoo and conditioner several times now, and there has been a noticeable difference in her coat. Not only is her hair silkier but it matts much less often. She also smells great afterwards! We also have two Pug mixes and have used this shampoo/conditioner on them, so don't think it's for silky coated dogs only. It's worked wonderfully on all three of our dogs, regardless of the hair type. I would highly recommend this shampoo/conditioner for any dogs prone to matting or if you just want to give your dog a smoother coat and a great smell!

These boots are solid, nice leather and well-made for the price. I ordered my usual size 9, but they're roomier than expected, especially in the heel. Thick socks help a lot. Still happy with them, just wish the sizing was a bit more true.
I went in expecting a standard love triangle, but it surprised me with sharper dialogue and messier emotions. The pacing stumbles a bit near the middle, yet I stayed hooked. Solid four-star read.

I got this on a whim when it was on sale and ended up binge-reading the whole thing in two days. For the price, it's an absolute steal, the banter is sharp, the chemistry feels genuine, and the family dynamics give it a warmth I wasn't expecting. Easily one of the best Kindle deals I've grabbed this year.
These stairs have just the right step height for my dachshund, and the non-slip pads keep them perfectly in place.

Bought this on a whim when it was marked down and it's already paid for itself in skipped diner trips. Heats evenly, cleanup is a breeze, and nothing sticks once you give it a quick butter swipe. Feels sturdy for the low price point. My Saturday mornings just got a whole lot better without breaking the bank.
Had this on my keychain for a few months now and it's held up perfectly. No scratches, the metal feels solid, and the lens cap still clicks on tight.
Not easy to grow anything in these small tubes. The plant didn't show roots and ended up rotting out and not really growing. Would not recommend.
the quality is great, the color is awesome and the fit is perfect!
Bought for my six year old because it was small enough that he could put it together completely by himself by following the directions. He loves the set!
Took this on a dozen camping trips now and it still feels rock solid. No wobbles or bending even after yanking it through mud and gravel.

Great purchase Bought this one because the office pull boxes were painful. This bag is nicely constructed, nice compartments, and even distribution of weight. The wheels roll smoothly. It's not high society style, but perfect for my needs.

These little lights are just what my dark hallway needed. The dusk-to-dawn sensor kicks in flawlessly, keeping a gentle glow all night. The motion-triggered boost is surprisingly bright, and I didn't even need to fuss with wiring. Perfect for avoiding stubbed toes.

Notice the wood handle is previously fitted then separated from its own utensil. Align each handle back into its own utensil and pound it in to wedge it. Season the handle several times with wood or mineral oil. Perfect.
For the price, you get a ton of action. Cole's gadgets and fight scenes kept me flipping pages fast. A few slow spots, but the ending totally caught me off guard. Solid entertainment.
Totally worth every penny, these shoes feel like a steal.
If you want a great quality knife this is the one. It is a little large for a pocket which is why I slide it in my belt line near my back pocket. You can't go wrong with this knife!

I've had this lamp clamped to my workbench for about six months now, and it's held up better than I expected. The plastic casing picked up a few scuffs from sawdust and the occasional knock, but the joints are still tight and it stays put once you angle it. I use it almost daily for detail sanding and painting small parts, and the LEDs haven't dimmed or developed any dead spots. The gooseneck still holds firm without drooping. My only real gripe is the lowest brightness could be dimmer for late-night tinkering, it's a bit much if your eyes are tired. If you need a reliable task light that can take a little abuse, this one does the job.
I expected decent stands but these feel way more solid and stable than I thought they'd be.

This was the first book I read by Rachel Red. I MUST say that I was very impressed. The book was captivating and kept my attention through the end. I loved the fact that at the end of the book, all my questions were answered. This book held my interest to the end. I will definitely look for other books by this author.
These tiny little guys will put a smile on your face and brighten your room. I love everything about them.

I was honestly surprised how fast this thing showed up, ordered late Thursday and it was on my porch by Saturday afternoon. Packaging was no-nonsense but everything was snug in dense foam, no scuffs or rattling around. Pulling it out, the weight felt substantial right away; not clunky, just solid. The legs deploy with a satisfying click and lock up tight, zero wobble. I was a little skeptical about the QD mount at first, but it snapped right onto my rail and held firm without any play. Finish is clean, no rough edges or uneven coating. For the price, I expected maybe a few corners cut, but first impressions are seriously impressive. Already mounted it up and can't wait to get to the range.
I expected a sturdy toy, but it fell apart after one gentle drop from the couch onto carpet. Total letdown compared to other brands. My kid cried for an hour.
My cats like this hairball remedy more than any other.

This DeWalt planer stand is well made and sturdy. The DeWalt 735x, this stand, and customer support from DeWalt's Ed Ryan, has made me a fan of DeWalt. For me, this stand would be even better if it had two tool drawers underneath. Okay, I just put together my second of these stands for a new drill press. The fit and finish was consistent with the fine quality of the first one. Be sure to not fully tighten the top-side supports before putting on the top, or you will have to go back and loosen them all in order to align the top holes with the bolts. This time, I used my Hilti impact driver on setting 1 which made putting this stand together take only 25 minutes.

Installed these in a 04 mustang gt convertible, part of a complete tear down of the Mach 460 stock system. I used these in the front doors with an adapter replacing the 6x8 old speakers. I had to get a little crafty mounting the tweeters in the stock locations but they worked out. As far as sound goes the highs will make your ears bleed, mids are very nice, vocals and live music sound nice. I'd say if you like to hear quality in your music these will do that but if you like hard rock,rap or anything with needed bass response look elsewhere. I paired these with the 6-1/2 model of these in the rear side panels and I can say they are better rounded and have tons more fuller sound. I'm thinking of replacing these with them in the front as well. They are good filler speakers to me but wish they had more punch. Pushing them with 100 watts out of a fosgate amp. Very good but not great

With the limiting factor being the grain of the REAL wood, they were exactly as pictured. They were a perfect fit for my GI issue, full size 1918 era Colt 45. Full recommendation. Free advice: when tightening the screws on these pistols, be very careful not to over-torque. Now if I could only get these pair 96 years older...

An enjoyable look at one of America's first families. While it primarily deals with the patriarchs it still give plenty of good information. Being a former resident of St Louis I like many others have my AB stories. If you enjoyed this book I would recommend you read Under the Influence as well. That book is more dates than this one.

Regarding the cons I have read: Noise Level: if noise bothers you invest in some good ear plugs. It didn't bother me at all though and I've been a steaming maniac for oh almost 24 hours total. Doesn't work like promised: Well if you expect perfection you will always be disappointed I am afraid. I have not been disappointed one bit in mine. Recommendations: Buy yourself a good pair of knee pads--you will need them. Buy extra nozzles. If you are going to use yours as much as I am using mine you will need the extra nylon nozzles. I've already worn one of the nozzles down half way...yes I've been using my machine A LOT!! Pros: What can I say...you would be nuts not to get one. That is if it is something that you think you will use on a weekly basis. If not buy one for a good friend that you know will use it all the time as a Christmas or birthday present and borrow it...LOL.

The new board (the one with the round boulders for spaces, vs. old board with squarish spaces) makes it just about impossible to exit the "endless loop." They have changed the placement of the "5" and "3" spaces within the loop--previously, landing on one of these spaces would (unless you got a minus 3) guarantee your exit (in addition to landing exactly on the exit space), meaning you have a significant chance of being able to exit the loop on any given turn. Now, however, the "5" and "3" spaces will never land you on the exit--so they are pointless! There's almost no chance of landing exactly on the exit space on any given turn, which DRASTICALLY lengthens the game. The game has gone from fun to FRUSTRATING. And isn't the whole point of this to make math fun?? Our "solution" to this so far has been to just ignore the rule of landing exactly on the exit space, treating the exit space as any old space and ignoring the whole loop idea. This makes the game super short, but that's better for my 4 year old and she still gets addition/subtraction practice without the torture of drawing the game out for hours. I may end up taking a sharpie to the board and changing the placement of the 3 and 5 spaces to where they are SUPPOSED to be, to make it more playable. If Learning Resources will either correct their game board or send me the older version of the board that actually makes sense, I will update my review with additional stars, as I think it's a great game otherwise. How did this major flaw make it all the way to production? Also, I noticed Learning Resources commented on another review recently, stating that the only updates they made to the board were artistic. That is patently false and is the difference between a one and five star game/review for me.

All the hundreds of thousands of wannabe writers out there (including yours truly) and THIS is what gets published. Granted, it's a great premise, its just terrible writing and saddest of all (judging by the success of this series) no one can tell the difference. But by all means if you want writing that tells instead of shows, ideas that don't develop any further than it takes to read in a chapter about the length of a visit to the toilet and characters as memorable and charismatic as the physical paper they are printed on, don't delay, this is the book you've been waiting for. On the other hand, it's only fair that I point out that I've seen the comic book version and it's perfectly suited for that medium, it works much better in that form. I'm not here to bash the writer, her success or loyal fans, just offering a warning to anyone who might stumble across this review to reconsider before diving in. Ms Hamilton is cackling all the way to the bank, I'm certain her writing has improved over the course of the series and I certainly don't begrudge her success one iota. I just didn't like her book, in a big way.

Fat Head does what Super Size Me failed to do; it entertained its audience, yes, but not at the expense of getting out its message. And the message is clear: we've been duped and had the wool pulled over our eyes for too long concerning nutrition in America. I was already familiar with the material prior to viewing this movie as I have read many, many books on the topic, but Naughton uses fabulous visuals that help to elucidate the finer points and clarify some of the muddier issues. Make no mistake, Tom Naughton is super smart as well as funny, and he has solicited the help of some of the best minds in the field of nutrition and medicine to show the public where Morgan Spurlock went horribly wrong in his conclusions. A must see film, and one that should be distributed to every library in the nation. I recommend it highly. Good Calories, Bad Calories(book) by Gary Taubes is a great companion piece to the film as it presents a lot of the scientific data that the film uses to make its points.
