The bug theme is clever without being babyish, and the bright, chunky pieces feel durable enough to survive our playroom chaos. She started sorting and matching without any prodding, then moved on to making patterns on her own. I thought it might be a one-and-done activity, but it's been pulled out daily for two weeks now. Even my older kid jumps in to build symmetrical designs. It sneaks in vocabulary like vertices and sides so naturally they don't realize they're learning. Perfect mix of open-ended play and structured practice.
This was GREAT! My son was able to lube all his Rubik's cubes. Now all teh cubes are speed cubes -- and my husband loves it too!!
For the price, I expected way better quality. Feels flimsy and the clasp is already loose.
Wore them multiple times now and the print hasn't faded at all, still fits great.

Needed a pair of jeans as I've put on some weight and have tons of jeans just sitting in my closet. As I'm working on losing the extra pounds, can't walk around without bottoms so, looked for some reasonable priced jeans and these fit the bill. Had enough stretch without bagging. The length was perfect as I'm not short nor too tall, but sometimes have an issue with the length being too short for regular. It held up very well to washing and was a bit tight on the first wear, but loosened up very quick. The are flattering and very easy to move in.
Just as comfy as I'd hoped for.

I've had this sequel loaded on my Kindle for a couple months now and it holds up beautifully, no formatting glitches, no weird font hiccups after multiple rereads and software updates. The digital edition just works, which is more than I can say for some ebooks I've bought. I've flipped back and forth between chapters so many times (especially the intense showdowns with Patrick) and the navigation never lagged or corrupted. After weeks of daily reading, bookmarking, and highlighting passages, the file is still rock solid. If you're worried about long-term readability on different devices, don't be, this one's built to last through countless revisits. A genuinely sturdy addition to my permanent library.
A nice scope mount. Blue loctite on the threaded connections and you won't be disappointed.
Arrived fast and packed really well. Plugged them in right away and they look clean, run smooth, and feel solid.
Cute shoe but odd fit...heel length was great, but too long between toe strap and end of flip flop. One shoe fit different than other shoe. Wouldn't order again.

For the price of a coffee, I got hours lost in the Civil War era. I didn't expect the time-travel twist to hook me so hard, but the romance feels so real and gritty. Whole series is a steal, each book delivers that perfect blend of history and heart. Easily worth every penny.

Love this ladder. You are able to get close to the area you are working on. I recently used it to hang some drapes in my living room. You can either have the ladder open with a four legs and be close to the work area or you can lean the ladder against the wall and use just as safely as you would with all four legs. An additional feature is the middle section on the work top allows you to lean the ladder against a corner. I added some photos of the ladder below. I do recommend this ladder for personal or professional use.

I grabbed this expecting a smart, tense alien invasion story, but it fell flat. The pacing drags, the characters all sound the same, and the survival details feel recycled from a weekend camping trip. Nothing here surprised me or matched the premise's potential. Disappointing, especially compared to other books in the genre.

If you're into goofy, over-the-top crime capers, this might be your jam. I'd only recommend it for a lazy night when you're not overthinking things. The plot is a mess, but I won't lie, a few scenes had me chuckling.
Finished this in two sittings and it's stuck with me for weeks. The emotional pull holds up even when I flipped back to reread scenes. Can't wait to see where Ericka's journey leads next.
This router covers my whole house with zero dead spots and setup took maybe five minutes. Super stable connection for streaming and gaming.

I was honestly surprised by how well these were packed, each one nested in thick foam with zero chance of damage. The box arrived fast and pristine, which matters when you're gifting them. Out of the package they looked so convincingly like real wax pillars that I did a double take. The warm flicker instantly softened the whole room. Super happy right out of the gate.

Pros: Super adorable Sturdy Cons: It's a little on the heavy side the chain could have been a little longer. Final Thoughts: This was an adorable gift for those owl lovers. It was such a surprise when you find out that it's a USB
This thing punches way above its price tag. Install was simple, water pressure is solid, and it feels way more expensive than it is. Totally worth every penny for a quick bathroom upgrade.

The battle with Juromaru and Kageromaru where Koga and Inuyasha team up aside this disk obviously shows they were cleaning the studio that week. How else could you explain getting a pair of episodes that was mainly soap suds. Now I think the series needed this slow down to allow our heroes time to reflect on relationships, but will someone please smack Inuyasha! Inuyasha basically said it himself that all his feelings for Kikyo are revolving around guilt and obligation because Kikyo died for him. He feels it's necessary to give his life for her at the very least. Please, the girl pulled a knife on him while they were embracing and even said he was like Naraku in his feelings toward her. How many more evil things does this dead priestess have to do before he gets a clue that the Kikyo he fell in love with is no longer going by that name?

Arrived quickly in sturdy packaging with no damage. First impression is solid, love the flexible neck and soft light. The power button is a little recessed, so it takes a firm press, but otherwise a handy little desk lamp.
Awesome probiotic! My shepherd has a sensitive stomach and this helps keep him regulated and if he ever gets into something he shouldn't, this helps him handle it.

I've been using this stuff for months now on wood, ceramic, even some outdoor repairs, and it hasn't let me down once. Cleanup is a breeze and there's zero harsh smell lingering in my small workshop. Honestly, it's become my everyday go-to for pretty much any project.
Does exactly what it's supposed to for the price. Snug fit, no wobble, and way cheaper than the camera shop alternative.

I had no idea something as simple as cardamom could be so effective. The section on scent-based arousal was an eye-opener for me. Tried one of the drink recipes last weekend and it genuinely set the mood. Practical, surprising, and way more useful than I expected.
Months later, still holds up perfectly even with my cat's rough zoomies.
Worked fine the first few hikes but started peeling apart after a month.

I grabbed a pack of these T-Rings to streamline my hiking rig's side pouches, and the quick-detach function is a game changer. I can yank a water bottle free in seconds without wrestling with stiff straps. They hold tight on rough trails and don't rattle. Solid little upgrade that makes loadout adjustments way less annoying.

SMOKE and agent Sidney are a great team who are beginning to trust one another. At least Agent Sidney is beginning to show a romantic Interest in SMOKE. I like them as a team. But who and what is SMOKE. Read On.

The UTG High Profile Airgun Rings work well on the Daisy 853 with a UTG 3-9 x 32 BugBuster Scope. I was happily impressed with the sight quality of this scope. The cross-hairs are fine enough to see the period, also known as the 10 dot on the 10 meter air rifle target. Now if I was only steady enough to hit it.

I bought it because it was free and will buy more by this author. It was a novella but the story was complete with a few surprises. I highly recommend Allegra's Song and can't wait to read the stories about the two sisters.

Tom Hardy so muscular and built up, including a mask hiding his face, you won't recognize him. But, his acting was, as always, great. This one, some good actors, production. If you like the Batman series, you'll like it.

I recently came across this author. I read "A Girl Like Lilac." After I finished it, I checked this authors amazon for more novels. I decided to go ahead and download this one. This is powerful reading. Definitely worth the time. These two characters will show you the meaning to Best Friends. They stick together through everything. I am not putting no spoilers in it. This was one of a journey. The ending leaves you wanting more. To me it felt like a cliff hanger. Incomplete. I will read the next one when it is released. Great powerful, emotional kindle read.

My husband wears these while bird watching. They are light weight & have a good grip for binoculars. They are a stretchy neoprene type fabric. They are not super warm gloves but plenty for cool fall & early winter days. They fit true to size.

My copy showed up a day earlier than the estimated window, which was a nice surprise. The padded mailer kept it in solid shape, no bent corners or scuffed cover, just a clean, crisp paperback right out of the package. Flipping through, the print quality is good, easy on the eyes, no smudges or uneven ink. I'm familiar with Jessica Scott's work and have been waiting to spend more time with Shane and Jen, so diving into this novella felt overdue. First impressions are strong, though I'm docking one star only because I wish there'd been a little more story packed into the slim volume. Still, a satisfying addition to the shelf.
I think this book is one of my favorites of the series. All are good. This is my second time reading the books.
Been using this for weeks and the belt still holds up fine.

I picked up a couple of these pans hoping they'd hold up better than my last budget set, and honestly they've exceeded what I expected for the price. The nonstick is surprisingly slick all the way up the sides, so even sticky stuff like scrambled eggs slides right out. I've been using them daily for a few weeks now and haven't noticed any flaking or wear, which was my biggest worry. They heat evenly enough for most tasks, though I wish they were a touch heavier on the bottom for searing. The lid fits fine but feels a little flimsy compared to the sturdy pan body, not a dealbreaker, just a small letdown. For everyday cooking, these are solid workhorses.
My pitbull LOVES to chew and pretty much destroys anything she gets her mouth on. This has held up rather well and she seems to enjoy all of the little nubs.

I'm discriminating. Willing to pay for better/best quality. However, I planned to use this for a Disney Trip (2 adults, 2 kids) and I wanted a carry on as a back pack (to free my hands for car seats), then a smaller back pack for the park (instead of just a wheeled backpack only which would have been much bigger in the park than I wanted). This was fantastic. No problems on domestic flight with wheeled part (with day pack zipped off). Fit no problem straight in. Squishing straps great. I did NOT have much trouble with the pull arm as some reviewers, slight sticking at times but better than most of my luggage (NOT as good as my Victorinox for a comparison, but still very good). Zippers heavy duty and work well. Day pack holds much more than I expected, more like a true backpack (I had expected a little larger than a fanny pack. This is MUCH larger than that.). Water bottle slots hold CamelBak style bottles fine. Little compartment at top for earphones, charger, inhaler, medicines and front compartment held sunglasses, wipes, sunblock stick, snacks, etc. Main compartment had two rain jackets, two sweaters, magazines, sandwiches, snacks, baseball caps. My wife didn't really have to carry anything in the park. Even with all that, it slid right under the seat no problem, with room for my feet still. Some noted trouble zipping the day pack onto the main pack when full. I didn't bother as it has a nice "hold a bag" strap (like the Victorinox) that worked great, so didn't bother zipping on. If both full of hard objects, I could see some trouble, but if relatively flat, should zip on no problem. However, look around!! I found for just under $100 elsewhere. For that it was a steal. For the $175-200 range, I still think it is worth it (now that I have it). Bite the bullet, you are really getting two really good bags for one.

Good quality and perfect size of 40" for my Ruger M77 compact rifle that's 36". Heavy zipper, extra cargo pockets and a Ruger logo to match my rifle. I thought that all of Allen's cases were made in the USA, but this one has a "Made in China" tag sewn into it. I'm docking one star for not being American made. Still, it's a nice durable case.

Works great! Once we changed out the filter the hand vac works so much better. I didn't want to purchase a whole New vac and thanks to this I didn't have to. You will definitely notice a big difference in performance!
Arrived fast and in really nice packaging. Unwrapping them felt special, soft, crisp, and instantly gave the room a boutique hotel vibe.

This product seemed to work perfectly well. However, I put this on my keychain, which went into my pocket. The problem is that the little white cap falls off all the time. It is too loosely fitted to the drive, making it fall off with little to no force. It was only a matter of time before the cap fell off without my noticing. Now, I have no cap, and the device is pretty worthless to me without its cap.

I was a bit skeptical when purchasing this. I just wanted a regular money clip. However, when I saw the credit card slots, I thought this may work better than a typical clip. Am I glad I gave it a try! No more money balling up in my pocket, or dropping credit cards out of my pocket! This little guy is awesome! Great color and stitching. Seems like it will hold up for a good while!
Perfect for hiking and casual wear, I'd tell any outdoors buddy to grab these.

I like this mask. It does what it's supposed to do, conceal your face. It's pretty comfortable to wear for long periods, it's not heavy so you won't sweat, and it doesn't interfere with your vision. Most of all I appreciate that it's breathable, and when I wear my glasses they don't fog up like they do with my fleece mask. Seems fairly well constructed and should last a long time. For the price, it's a great bargain.
Showed up a day early in a super sturdy box with zero dents. Pulled it out and the pieces look crisp and detailed, my nephew's gonna flip when he sees this.
Simply the best, but pricey. Easy clean, no chemicals, no smell if you are diligent cleaning.

For the price, this organizer does exactly what I needed in my cramped kitchen. It's lightweight and fits perfectly in that awkward cabinet gap. Sure, it's not heavy-duty, you can't yank the drawers out, but with a gentle touch, it holds shampoo bottles and spice jars without issue. For under fifteen bucks, I'm satisfied. If you're on a budget, it's a solid little space-saver.
Does exactly what I needed, super handy for quick changes.

The envelope showed up looking a bit crushed and the disc was loose inside the case when I opened it. It still played fine, but that first impression wasn't great. Shipping took a couple days longer than estimated too, which was a bummer.

This has worked well for me. It does exactly what it's advertised to do and seems well-constructed. I've had mine for well over a year now and it's still going strong. Used exclusively for taking hot soups to the office for lunch - I've never used it for coffee but expect that it would perform just as well for that purpose.
Bought as a gift. I also have a copy.

Ok tried many pairs of this style found out stout needs 2 sizes up and chestnut needs.5 up. Lots of mixed reviews on sizing. I loved the look a d keep trying until i found one that worked. Cute comfy would be 5 stars if size was correct

Bought this for my nephew's birthday and it's held up great for the cost. Solid stitching and comfortable grip. The red tip is a bit tacky but I get the safety reasoning. Honestly, you can't beat the quality at this price point.
These arrived way faster than expected and the resealable bag keeps them super fresh. My little Yorkie went nuts for the smell right out of the box, definitely a win for picky pups.

I tore through this book in two days, couldn't put it down. The pacing is sharp, the characters feel like real people, and the twists kept me guessing. Jance knows how to build a world you don't want to leave. Already ordered the next one.

We've had this wooden train set for over a year now and it's held up incredibly well through daily play. My two boys are rough with their toys but the track pieces still fit together snugly without splintering or loosening up. The paint hasn't chipped at all despite countless crashes and being stepped on more times than I can count. We started with just this set and have since added expansions from other brands, everything connects seamlessly. The bridge is solid and hasn't warped even with heavier wooden trains rolling over it constantly. Honestly, for the price I expected it to show wear after a few months but it looks nearly new. Great little starter set that grows with your kid's collection.

This worked out of the box with my HP LaserJet 4L. When I plugged the USB into my Windows 7 computer, Windows recognised it and installed the drivers automatically. When I plugged it into my Iomega ix2-200, it showed up in the list of network printers. I was able to install my HP LaserJet 4L as a network printer in both Windows 7 and Linux by simply following the add network printer prompts. How cool is that! I couldn't be more pleased with this adapter.
Perfect for tiny pups under 10 lbs, my chihuahua goes nuts for it!

I love Garmin products but continue to be less enthusiastic of their bike mount systems. This one slips regularly for me, but I do want to share that my Cannondale's handle bars are tapered, and it's challenging to keep any mount in place. It's still far better than mounting your Garmin Edge product on the handle bar stem. The Front Mounts provide much safer visibility during rides, where you need to keep your eyes on the road. For on our rough wine=country roads between Napa, Sonoma and Marin County roads, this mount slips dropping my Edge 1000 point straight down at my front tire. I've been using a third party solution that is much more reliable for me.

I wanted to love this case for my Fire tablet. The keyboard connection is snappy and typing feels decent for the size. The outer shell feels sturdy at first, but the edge trim started peeling within two weeks of light use. I'd say it's fine if you mostly keep it on a desk and don't toss it in a bag. For careful, stationary users it works; commuters should look elsewhere.
Totally lost interest halfway through and ended up deleting it off my device.
Not bad for quick errands, but they bunch up after a few washes. I'd suggest these for teens or anyone with narrow heels who won't walk far.

Excellent for swimming, hiking, biking, walking but I wish there were more options for when you're working out at the gym for weight/ resistance training and other things like rowing. Overall, solid engineering, sleek, super convenient to wear on your shirt, swimsuit or even swim cap without popping off. I love the fact the magnet is super functional and you could totally go hiking with the Misfit shine on your shoe without worrying about it falling off as long as you put it on you're laces.

l Loved it one of my favorites. Almost fell off the sofa laughing at Lula and Grandma Mazur. No, not great literature that's why we have William and William. Just a light, funny read. Those of you who hated it so much, why in this world did you buy it in the first place? You should know the routine by now. Lula is hungry, Bob is eating everything, Ranger is sexy and Grandma Mazur is nuttsl Loved it, can't wait for the next one.
What a perfect wrap-up to a series I couldn't put down. The pacing and emotional payoff were spot-on. So glad I stuck with it.

Pretty nice, affordable watch from Adidas. I use this while I'm coaching soccer and I like that it isn't too bulky, not bothered by sweat and easy to read. The stopwatch function is easy to use and find and works great for my purposes. I'm not overly wild about this weird blue color, but other than that the watch is top notch.

Love these for lazy Sundays or low-key errands. The raw-cut edges really do vanish under leggings, which is a win. Not super durable for daily wear though. I'd recommend them to anyone who wants a barely-there feel and prioritizes invisibility over long-term structure.

I've read this series a few times now and the spine is holding up great even after being tossed in my bag daily. The pages haven't yellowed much either. Still engaging on a second read, though I wish the structure was a bit tighter.
Great deal. However, these tended to jam in the magazines more than the official nerf darts. Would recommend paying the extra couple bucks for the official nerf darts.

This precurser to The Lord of the Rings is a wonderful lead into the much deeper work. It gives background into the former. Although it is not as well developed as the later work-it is truly wonderful and not to be dismissed as inferior.

Bought one for my child when they were an infant and they still have it as school aged. Had traveled on every long trip with us and been slept with every night and still feels great and looks good. This is a wonderful little bear.
Put this in my MacBook Pro six months ago. It's held up well with daily use, no hiccups or slowdowns. Boot times are solid. Only wish it ran a bit cooler under heavy load.
For the price, this steamy thriller delivers. Plenty of tension and romance without breaking the bank.

Package showed up in a slim cardboard envelope that looked a little flimsy, but the brackets inside were fine, no dings or bends. First impression pulling them out was surprise at how light they are. Honestly, I thought they'd be heavier for the weight rating, so I was a bit skeptical at first. The finish is clean, and all the hardware was sealed in a small bag with no missing screws. Shipping was quick, arrived two days earlier than the estimate, which was a nice bonus. Once mounted, they feel way more solid than they look, and everything lined up without fuss. Knocking off one star only because the packaging could use a bit more padding for peace of mind during transit.
A stone fell out after having it for just one week. and I did not wear it everyday. Not worth the trouble of sending it back

I wasn't expecting much for the price, honestly, but this set surprised me. The three tools cover all my bases with my golden retriever's thick coat, the slicker tackles mats like a champ without scratching, and the deshedding tool pulls out way more loose fur than I thought possible. Grip feels solid and doesn't slip even when my hands are damp from a bath. For the cost of a single brush elsewhere, this is a steal. Really impressed with how sturdy they are too, no flimsy parts after a few weeks of daily use.

I use this to replace barbell squatting and I like how it feels. I use it for deadlifts, squats (standing on cinder blocks for added depth), push presses, split jerks, land mines, farmer's walks, and a few more exercises. The welds are good and are holding up just fine. I would highly recommend this bar.

The price was good for the wattage of this UV Sterilizer. It arrived promptly. Once it was installed it took about a week for the water to change from green to white. After that it was about another week before the water cleared. I am running a Saltwater type Wet Dry filter with Bio Balls which might have contributed to the green water. Also during the first two weeks I ran the UV Sterilizer 24 hours a day. After the water cleared I put it on the same timer as the Lights are on, this should help the sterilizer bulb to last longer. Overall I am very pleased with the Green Killing Machine. The only problem I have is that I wish the power cord was a little longer.

I've been rereading this series over the past few weeks, and I've got to say, the story holds up really well even when you know what's coming. The emotional beats hit just as hard the second time around, and I noticed little details I missed before. My Kindle copy has survived multiple late-night reading sessions, a coffee splash, and being tossed in my bag daily, no glitches, no formatting issues, just solid performance. The pacing drags a tiny bit in the middle, which is why I'm not giving five stars, but the character development is still satisfying. If you're worried about the digital version holding up over time or through rereads, don't be. It's been reliable for me.
This tank is just what I needed to wear under a sheer tunic. I was lucky that it worked just by looking at a picture! Great representation.
Very nice shoes, feels nice on feet and fits perfect.
Arrived fast in perfect packaging. Right away I could tell it's durable and thoughtfully designed, super impressed with the comfort and handy storage.
The way the author builds tension chapter by chapter had me completely glued until the very last page.
Nice to find these replacements, so I didn't have to buy a whole new pair of sunglasses. Kind of expensive for a pair of little rubber things, but cheaper than new glasses.
These gloves saved my hands during a messy tile demo. The reinforced palms held up perfectly against sharp edges without losing dexterity.

I returned this item because I really just didn't like it. to me, It felt like it was going to fall apart by the end of a semester of school. I hated that you couldn't use the surface pro's best kickstand to date. The little velcro pieces that held up the stand terrified me. I really just didn't want to use my device with this. I'm giving it three stars because for me, it was not at all what I would like. For others, this might be perfect. If your kickstand isn't the best, this might be your solution. If you need a cover that will look a little stylish at a low price, again, not bad. I really just didn't like it for me.

My cat has always been picky, but these crunchy Greenies treats are a total game changer. She begs for them every morning and they've completely solved her hairball problems. No mess, no fuss, and she's so much more comfortable now. I'm honestly impressed with how well they work. Will definitely keep buying these regularly.

I grabbed this hoping it would at least tame the mess behind our entertainment center, but honestly it exceeded what I thought possible. Setup took maybe twenty minutes, and I'm not exactly handy. Our setup is chaotic, 4K TV, soundbar, subwoofer, two consoles, streaming stick, ethernet switch, and before this everything was a tangled rat's nest. Now the cables are completely hidden, no sagging or weird bulges. I was braced for flimsy materials, but it's sturdy and the adhesive strips hold way better than I assumed. Even from the side, it looks clean and intentional. If you're on the fence, just get it. It's one of those rare purchases that actually makes the "after" photo look professional without much effort.

I grabbed this during a sale and honestly would've paid full price knowing what I know now. It walks you through every single step after the manuscript is done, formatting, metadata, launch strategy, the works, without feeling like a dry textbook. What really sold me was the section on keywords and categories; I tweaked just a few things based on their advice and saw immediate movement in my also-boughts. For the cost of a coffee and a pastry you're getting a roadmap that replaces hours of frantic Googling. If you're self-publishing even one book, this thing pays for itself before you hit publish. Super practical, zero fluff.

I went into this novel completely blind and ended up staying awake until 3 a.m. because I couldn't put it down. What really got me was how vividly Bradley paints the art scenes, you can almost feel the texture of the canvas and smell the turpentine in the studio. He doesn't just tell you the protagonist is talented, he shows you through these quiet, mesmerizing descriptions of the creative process that made me see painting in a whole new light. The emotional weight sneaks up on you too; there's a scene near the midpoint involving a half-finished portrait that absolutely wrecked me. It's rare to find a book that's both tender and brutally honest about the time period without feeling preachy. Already ordered two more of his novels.
Delete it quickly and save yourself the time wasted even overusing this really bad romance novel. proves anyone can write trash

I picked this up for a family game night with my teenagers and my 70-year-old mom, and it was an absolute riot. The prompts can stay clean or get hilariously weird depending on who's playing. I'd recommend it to anyone hosting mixed-age gatherings where people aren't afraid to laugh at themselves.

I really wanted this shoe to fit well. The problem is the top small strip of material that the cord goes through. The cord makes the material bend down rubbing significantly against the top of my toe. I even tried on several more pairs with the same disappointing result. Love the look of the shoe and tried to think of some way to eliminate the problem.
For the cost, it's a solid little helper that stays put and does its job quietly.
So cute, made well my grand daughter will love this.

have never once had a jam or an issue feeding. I use it on an invert mini and a proto rail which both cap around 20 bps and this has absolutely 0 problems keeping up, however i couldn't say how it would do for higher bps. its really easy to use and clean, takes AA batteries which is really nice, and looks badass. it seems like its basically this vs a rotor nowadays and ive never used a rotor so i cant give an informed opinion however i can tell you this one works flawlessly so its a matter of personal preference.

These are made for small ears only! Like a child's ears. Unless you have small ears as an adult, you'll have difficulty securely placing these on. Avoid purchasing them, unless you discover some way to make them fit your ears better... that doesn't result in damaging them.

I purchased this to brine pork loin for making Canadian bacon. A 2 - 3 pound roast fits nicely, plenty of room to insure the meat is submerged completely, the top fits tight enough that I can turn it upside down without it leaking (not recommended).
Rail fit my Ruger 10/22 perfectly. Just put a little of blue loctite and you're good. Mounted my scope with no issues.

I love how fine and soft this dust is, it clumps less and spreads more evenly in their fur. My hamster dives right in and does full-body rolls every time. The container is also easy to pour without making a mess, which I really appreciate.
I am reading the series and this is one of the best

Got this for my terrier mix who destroys every toy in minutes, and it's held up surprisingly well. She carries the little squirrels everywhere and actually naps with the stump. Keeps her busy for ages. Totally worth it.
For what these cost, the warmth is incredible. Toasty toes on frosty morning walks without needing bulky layers. Total steal.

The machining is crude; running a fingernail down the edges isn't necessary as one person said; just look at it closely. However, for any homeowner-type job it's likely to be used for, I think it would be perfectly fine and I have no intention of returning it. As to the loose handle, a pair of #47 O-rings (AS-568 #009), easily available at any hardware or home improvement store, will give you the ability to remove the handle as needed, or use it in any position along it's length without falling out - a feature I like.
It is nice and warm and comfortable. My only issue is I have to keep pulling it up in the crotch area. It slinks down.
Interesting in a dumb sort of way, didn't turn it off which is why it gets 3 stars. Nothing special but not terrible.

Bought this bed for my 4-year-old's baby doll collection. The wooden frame is solid and assembly took maybe five minutes. The included mattress and blanket are pretty basic, fine for play but not super plush. I ended up sewing a tiny fleece blanket and pillow to make it cozier, which my daughter loves. Perfectly sized for standard 12, 15 inch dolls. I'd recommend it to crafty parents or anyone who doesn't mind adding a personal touch.
Fits perfectly and feels way sturdier than I expected for the price.

The first set of torches I received were not working. I had to contact amazon customer service and they were excellent in guiding me on how to return it. I received a set of new torches shortly and only two worked after a few months. I thought maybe I needed new rechargeable batteries for the two that didn't work so I took the batteries out of the good ones and put them in the ones that didn't work-it still didn't work. 7/3/14 The reason I bought these tiki lights were because they looked really nice but my purchase experience was not too pleasant. When the lights failed shortly after my purchase I thought that was that and therefore the one star review, however, the seller reached out to me to replace them. I was very pleasantly surprised that this company stood behind their product. I just received a new set today that they sent me just in time to enjoy the ambience in my backyard for the Fourth of July. Although I gave the product a one star rating I give this company a 5 star rating for their excellent customer service.
This is very helpful when walking our 2 pups. the only problem we run into is that or pups are different heights and so I had to shorten the length on pne side.

I picked this up for camping, but it's basically my go-to for big family pasta nights now. Sturdy enough to handle kneading dough without sliding around. The polished rim is smooth, though I wish the base had a bit more grip on my tile counter. Cleans up easily by hand. Honestly, I'd recommend this to anyone who batch-cooks or hosts often, simple, solid, and won't warp even after a clumsy drop.
I love this series. Each book gets better and better. I can't wait for the next book.
Honestly thought these would be flimsy for the price, but they're solid metal and totally transformed my outlet covers beyond what I pictured.

Got this for my sister's birthday and she loved the delicate sparkle. It's definitely on the dainty side, but for under twenty bucks I can't complain. Looks way more expensive than it is. She's worn it daily for two weeks with no issues so far. Solid little find for the price.
Perfect for my college setup. Snappy performance and super easy install. Highly recommend to any student on a budget.

As many of the previous reviews have stated, these are non-focusing, fixed focus binoculars. There is absolutely nothing you can physically adjust on these. They're great for long distances, but horrible for anything within 100-150 yards. We used these on a recent trip to Yellowstone and, for the most part, they worked flawlessly. I bought these for my wife, who is not very adept at using bino's, so that she wouldn't have to fiddle with anything and see exactly what she wanted without effort.......and for that they worked brilliantly! We're going to use these next year (2017) for our Alaskan cruise. Hoping they perform just as well!

Purchased this to provide protection to my deck from heat/sun in summers. Also kids can now scrub feet/muddy shoes on after walking through my sometimes wet muddy garden before they enter our upstairs deck. Also like feature of slight rubber backing as it won't slip around. Im trying to grow grass below the section of my deck and it protects the grass from getting hit hard by torrential rain storms.

I did order the next size larger because of the comments of others and it worked well. They are very warm and I will never have to worry about my feet getting wet. They are sturdy and will last me a long time.
This was a great story. I enjoyed it very much and look forward to reading her other books. I highly recommend it.
A story that keeps one guessing what will happen next while a complex mystery un-winds. Add a group of characters with their own intelligence, quirks, and humor and you have a lovable story.
Solid pick for anyone setting up a home theater or streaming rig, no noise, no fuss, just works.

Watching RDJ peel back the layers on Tony Stark's arrogance made the whole film feel surprisingly intimate. The pacing was tight, the humor landed, and the action sequences had real emotional weight. Loved it.
This is a really good series by Deborah. I love her books.

I'd been on the fence forever about switching from a drip machine, but this thing won me over fast. The setup took maybe five minutes, and I had a hot cup going right after. I love that I can use my own grounds with the reusable filter, saves money and lets me stick with my favorite local roast. It's surprisingly quiet, too, which matters at 5 a.m. when everyone else is asleep. Cleanup is basically nothing; no carafe to scrub or leftover coffee sitting around getting bitter. My only regret is not grabbing it sooner. It's made my mornings genuinely easier, and the coffee tastes great every single time. Totally worth it.
These are a no-brainer upgrade for anyone with old fluorescent fixtures. Super quick install and the light is crisp without being harsh. Definitely recommend for garage or workshop use.
Little more than a short story but interesting just the same.

This beautiful sun dress dress with matching hat and white shoes are perfect for my daughters collection of clothes for her American Girl Doll. They also fit on the other 18" style dolls such as the new My Life dolls. This is a cute dress for the summer or spring for her dolls to go around town with us. The material is nice and sturdy, it does not seem like it will rip or tear easily. The shoes are a thick bendable plastic. This is a good quality do dress. The seller was quick to ship and packaged this item properly so that it was not damaged during transit. I received this at a discount in exchange for my honest review and I am pleased with both the product and the seller.

I expected a reliable basic sander for occasional furniture touch-ups, but this thing struggled from the start. The vibration is so aggressive my hand goes numb after ten minutes, and the dust collection is a joke, more ends up on the floor than in the tiny bag. It's also surprisingly loud for its size. After three gentle uses, the pad started wobbling and leaving swirl marks. I'll be returning it and spending a bit more on something that actually functions.
Very cheap and flimsy. Not so easy for a 4 and 6 year old to get setup sturdily. Sent it back.
Just what was needed to finish a security project, good delivery, good price.

My son has been using this motor nonstop in his latest crane build and it handles the heavy lifting without slowing down. The torque is surprisingly strong for its size, and the connection points snap on perfectly. We've run it for hours and it hasn't overheated once, really solid piece.

I picked this up after seeing the hype, but it didn't quite land for me. The grief angle felt relatable, yet the protagonist's over-the-top habits made it harder to connect. It's decent, just not as emotionally gripping as I expected.

For the price I figured it'd be basic, but the display is sharp and the alarm is loud enough. FM tuner barely grabs anything unless you're right in the city, but as a simple bedside clock it does the job.

My kids' hockey gear used to stink up the whole mudroom until we started using this dryer after every practice. The gentle forced air gets right down into the toe box and dries everything overnight without any shrinking or crunchy stiffness.

A different take on the possible end of the world as we know it. How tragedy can bring people together. Great characters and very interesting plot line. Couldn't put it down. Glad it was a stand alone novel.
For the cost, this thing is a steal, lights up my whole shed easily.

For the price of a coffee, this little gem gave me a full evening of pure escape. The dialogue snaps and the pacing never drags. Felt like a complete, satisfying story, not a rushed snippet. Honestly, I've paid more for books half as good.

I got this for my 18-month-old who's in a major Elmo phase, and it's become a staple in our bedtime rotation. The slide-out tabs are the highlight for her, she loves yanking them to reveal Elmo in different animal costumes, especially the monkey page. The board book format holds up well against enthusiastic little hands, and the glossy finish makes cleanup easy when snacks get involved. My only small gripe is that a couple of the tabs started sticking after a few weeks of heavy use, so I have to help her push them back in sometimes. Still, the giggles it gets make it worth it. A sweet, simple interactive book for any Sesame Street fan.
Even my picky eater licks the bowl clean, great for senior dogs.

I went into this totally blind and ended up bingeing the whole thing in a weekend. It's the kind of story that feels like a dark, whimsical escape hatch from everyday life. The blend of a grounded NYC lead with this eerie, folklore-soaked parallel realm just works. The werewolf elements aren't cheesy at all, they're handled with this simmering, dangerous charm that kept me hooked. I'd recommend it to anyone who loves fantasy that actually feels adult, not watered down. Perfect for fans of atmospheric storytelling, slow-burn romance, and mythic world-building. If you're into stuff like Pan's Labyrinth or The Company of Wolves, this will absolutely hit the spot.

This is my third foray into the world of inexpensive HD cameras. About two years ago I bought a similar sized and priced Sony model - and I like the Sanyo much better. The Sony used tape, which was less convenient, and the interface to my computer was terrible in comparison to the Sanyo. The video quality for both is comparable. At Christmas I also bought a Flip HD. I love the convenience and the computer interface for the Flip, and because of its size I tend to use it much more than the Sanyo. They Sanyo certainly has many more features for a little more money, so which one you would buy depends on your situation. If you often shoot video at the last minute, and are less concerned about quality (though for its size the Flip looks great) than you are about "capturing the moment" - I would buy the Flip. You can literally stuff it in a shirt pocket or your glove box and it is there if you need it. Ditto if you want a really simple interface and an easy to use camera. If you instead want to create some better home videos, and a little bigger camera with more features is appealing, then buy the Sanyo.
Was honestly better than I expected, super sturdy and keeps my kid entertained for hours.

I grabbed this to salvage the optical drive from my old desktop, and it's been flawless. Popped in a BluRay burner I had lying around, and it reads discs faster than I expected, no lag, no weird disconnects. Build feels solid, not cheap plastic. If you've got a spare laptop drive and want to keep using physical media without buying a whole new external unit, this is a no-brainer. I'd easily recommend it to anyone repurposing old hardware, students with disc-heavy coursework, or travelers who still want a reliable optical drive in their bag.

I really wanted to love this more than I did. The core idea is genuinely interesting, a man in an asylum helping build the OED is the kind of odd historical footnote I usually eat up. The parts that actually dive into the mechanics of dictionary work and word-hunting are great. But the narrative just feels stretched. It circles the same emotional beats about the editor's guilt and the contributor's letters without adding much depth, so the middle really drags. I kept waiting for a bigger revelation or a shift in pace that never came. It's a solid long-form article crammed into a book, and by the end I felt like I'd gotten the point about a hundred pages earlier. Fine, not essential.
Arrived super fast in perfect condition, tried them on and instantly fell in love.
This was easy to assemble. Instructions were clear. The parts were in great condition and nothing was damaged. It looks awesome once it's all set up and it's a great place for all your makeup.

I've read a lot of new adult romance books lately, so I've seen how a lot of them are the same, or how they differ. I think anyone who reads a lot will kind of fall into that trap sometimes. We always want something similar, but... not too much, you know? To recapture that feeling that we had while reading something else, but to get a sense of more and a feeling of excitement, too. This book is definitely that. Right from the start, the entire thing catches you. I honestly didn't expect what I was reading, but I liked it. Caught and roped in, basically, and I wanted more. Hopelessly Broken definitely provides more, too. There's a lot going on in this book. The characters are interesting and realistic. I really enjoyed reading about Aeron especially. I don't know that I've seen any character quite like him in another book. Jenn's struggles are oftentimes something I think a lot of us can relate to, also. Maybe not exactly, but the ideas and concepts behind them, you know? I don't want to give too much away, but for a book like this to be as realistic was it was, I was impressed with how Tawny Taylor went about it. One warning is that there's apparently another one planned for the future, so you're definitely going to want to keep an eye out for that. Hopelessly Broken is on the longer side, though, so it's definitely really satisfying on its own. I can't wait to read the second part!

For the price, it's not a total waste, decent build and all. My niece played with it nonstop for an afternoon, then it just sat there. I guess I expected more mileage for twenty bucks. It's cute, but the novelty wears off fast, so keep that in mind.
I've ordered a number of frames from ArtToFrames, both from the manufacturer and from Amazon. The make a good frame at a good price. I would order more as needed.
The felt pads for the chairs came just as described and so far are working as expected. Time will tell how endurable they are but for not good.

I don't often right reviews but I'm so impressed by the quality of this body pillowcase that I have to let everyone know! Just washed it and it washed & dried well. Taupe is a beautiful brown beige with a sateen sheen. I'm going to purchase the sage as these colors work well with my home decor.

Decent quality of hay. They're quite a lot of the tougher stalks of hay but my guinea pigs like chewing on those. If your pigs don't like the stick like stalks I probably wouldn't buy this particular bag.
Bought in 2002. still works great but if I had to buy again I'd go LED
Came super fast and packed with care, no bends or scuffs. Cracked it open and was hooked before I even settled in. That first chapter just grabs you.
Great for casual Fridays, but size up if you're between sizes.

Die Dog Hair....Die!!!! Around Christmas time we were expecting guests... I pulled out my vacuum and nothing. Sometime in the last few months of neglect it had expired. RIP... I still had guests coming. I live in the middle of national forest. Think, Big trees, bears, dirt, dirt and more dirt. Naturally I didn't have the time to drive the 140+ miles round trip to go to a town that has a stop light and a walmart. So what did I do I went to our local (only 30 miles away) hardware store. They carry two vacuums, not a lot of choice, but apparently there is a reason they only carry two. They work! The Eureka was the more expensive of the two by about $20.00 But I liked the rewinding cord feature so I got it and went along home. Put it together and started vacuuming the cabin, let me tell you, it was amazing. Carpet that I had been thinking of replacing took on new life, the attachments were easy to use. Of all the silly things I was having FUN vacuuming. No really, it's true. BUT THE BEST PART was how it handled the dog hair in my home. I have two large golden retrievers, They are serious about their shedding. I truly believe that they think it's a career opportunity. They take it that seriously. This thing sucked it up along the base boards, under the beds off of the log walls and out of the couch cushions and not once did it clog up. I wish it had another attachment extension but other than that it's a well designed machine. My only other suggestion for improvement would be to come out with a ride-um-model with a cup holder.
Chewed up the plastic base in a few days, just not durable enough.

My order arrived a day early in a sturdy box with snug foam inserts, no loose parts at all. Unboxing felt premium, and the sleek matte finish looks even better in person. Plugged it in, remote paired instantly, and the picture quality stunned me right out of the gate. Super happy with this purchase so far.
Fits the description, just wish it came with better hardware.

After wrestling with flimsy knock-offs that twisted on first use, these Channellocks were a revelation. The grip and jaw alignment are spot-on, and the cutters slice through 12-gauge wire like butter. Honestly, I expected them to be solid, but they feel like they'll outlast my toolbox. Worth every extra penny.

Jack is awesome!! What a great character! TJ was great too and they had great chemistry together. There was no sex scenes and a lot of political BS that I would never be interested in reading, however liking the characters made me want to stick it out. I am glad I did because I found myself caught up in the story after all. I love that nothing compromised Jack's beliefs or his willingness to fight for what is right all all costs. Jack does not crumble!!
LOVE THIS SHOE RACK! After several purchases... this one holds up! Tall. Sturdy. Plenty of room for 50 pairs of shoes. Love. Love. Love it! Buy here! Buy this!

I picked this up for a church history night and ended up watching it twice before sharing it. It digs into Billy Graham's early years in a way that feels personal, not like a dry documentary. You see the small-town kid wrestling with his calling, the near-miss romance, and the behind-the-scenes moments that shaped him long before the stadiums and global fame. The storytelling is warm and moves at a nice pace, never felt like a lecture. I'd hand this to anyone curious about faith journeys, youth group leaders looking for discussion material, or even skeptics who just enjoy a well-told origin story. Honestly, it sparked better conversation in my living room than most big-budget films.

I ordered the owl and unicorn cases for my twins and they arrived in perfect shape, no weird smells or creases from the packaging. The little box they came in was simple but kept everything safe. First impression was just how soft yet sturdy the fabric feels. My kids unzipped them immediately and started filling them with treasures. Honestly, they're even cuter in person and feel built to last.

I needed a updated router for more devices and stronger signal. After a lot of research, I settled on the D-Link AC3200. The router was very quick and easy to install. So far I have two issues with the router: 1) During setup, I was given the option of changing the router name and password, but the changes would not process. The install wizard just sat there no moving forward in the process. I tried again with the same result. I finally kept the factory given name and password (which in reality is more secure than the password I would have chosen). The wizard continued and shortly completed install. 2) Our devices randomly drops connection to the router, but will automatically connect about 1-2 seconds later. So far, this has not caused any issues with streaming video/music/movies. I need to research this more. This may be caused by the router switching devices to a different band to spread the bandwidth demand evenly. The router is considerably bigger than our old one. This will require more space than you may expect. This router is 15-21 inches wide depending on how you arrange the 6 antennas. The suggested arrangement is to set the antennas at a 45 degree angle. The router is 21 inches wide with this setup.
I didn't love it but my Granddaughter does. Lego, forever the best toys!

I absolutely loved how this book captured the awkward, isolating vibe of working from home and turned it into something so liberating. The way Chloe compartmentalizes her life through cosplay felt incredibly relatable, who hasn't wanted to shed their everyday self and become someone bolder? The convention scenes are a total highlight, buzzing with energy and just the right amount of nerdy detail that made me feel like I was wandering the vendor hall myself. It's rare to find a romance that balances geek culture with genuine emotional depth without feeling forced, but this one nails it. The humor is sharp, the pacing never lags, and the steamy moments actually serve the character growth instead of just being thrown in. Finished it in one sitting and immediately wanted more.

I've had this paperback sitting on my nightstand for about six weeks now, and honestly, it's not holding up great. The cover corners are already curling and the spine cracked after maybe three or four reading sessions, which feels flimsy for a book I was hoping to pass around. I got through maybe half of it before I stalled out, the story just felt heavy and the characters never clicked for me. I set it down and haven't really felt the urge to pick it back up. For something that's supposed to be a keeper, the physical wear is disappointing this early on.
This sound bar has worked well with my Sharp television. The Bluetooth subwoofer synced and quickly and also works well.

This is a solid pick if you like crime fiction grounded in real-world border tensions and personal history. The author clearly knows the landscape, and that authenticity comes through in the atmosphere and the constant sense of being watched. I'd recommend it to readers who appreciate a slower, more introspective thriller, one that cares as much about the protagonist's internal conflict as the external threat. For me, though, the pacing sagged in the middle, and some of the dialogue felt a little stiff, which pulled me out of the tension. It's worth a read if you want something more thoughtful than a typical cartel shoot-'em-up, but don't expect nonstop action.

My copy showed up with a bent lower corner and a crease running across the back cover, disappointing for something sold as new. The padded mailer didn't do much to protect it during shipping, and the book slid around inside enough that the dust jacket got scuffed. First impression pulling it out of the package was a letdown; it already looked like a well-worn used copy. The story itself is solid and I like the main character, but when I pay full price I expect a book that doesn't arrive pre-damaged. If you're picky about condition, maybe grab it in-store instead.

This is my third one of these! Comfortable and very warm. Only drawback is the exterior snags and rips easily. The first two lasted me only 1 season because I got them caught on fencing or other things around the farm. Ive sewed them up and use them for daily work and save this one for going out and about.

Love the smooth arc and how easy it is to switch between spray and stream, just a light touch and it clicks right into place. The magnetic docking for the spray head is surprisingly strong, so it snaps back perfectly every time without dangling loose. Installation was straightforward for me, but heads up: you'll need a separate baseplate since it's not included. I grabbed the Hansgrohe 10-inch one in chrome and it matches flawlessly. Water pressure feels great and the handle motion is buttery smooth, no stiffness at all. Looks super sleek on my apron sink and cleans up with just a wipe. Honestly, this thing feels premium and works even better than I hoped.
My kid loves stacking the colorful rings again and again.

This book grabbed me in a way I wasn't expecting. The prose is sharp and immersive, pulling you so deeply into its world that hours slip by without notice. It's the kind of layered storytelling that rewards patience and reflection, not something you skim through. I'd especially recommend it to readers who love literary fiction with psychological depth, or anyone who enjoys unpacking moral complexity long after the last page. If you're the type who dog-ears passages just to revisit the language, this one's for you. Not a breezy beach read, but for the right audience, it's absolutely stellar.

We've been using this float for a few weeks now and our little one absolutely loves it. It feels solid and secure in the water, which puts my mind at ease. The sunshade does a decent job but can shift if it's breezy. The attached toys are cute, though we wish there were a couple more. Overall, it's made pool time way more fun and relaxing for everyone.
My nephew won't stop running around making the laser sound, it's super crisp and way louder than expected.

I grabbed this vacuum hoping it'd be a good fit for my studio apartment with limited storage. Assembly is a breeze, literally two pieces click together. But using it has been a mixed bag. On hard floors it glides fine and picks up crumbs without fuss, but my area rugs are where it struggles. I have a short-haired cat and the suction just doesn't pull fur out of the fibers unless I go over the same spot several times. The dust cup is small, so I'm emptying it constantly. It's okay for quick daily touch-ups, but I expected more consistency across different surfaces. Not terrible for the price, just underwhelming overall.

This series just keeps getting better. I love how the author lets Bridgette's quiet strength speak louder than any confrontation. You can feel how hard it is for her to hold back, and that internal battle makes her so much more compelling than a typical heroine. The tension between her and Kylie is perfectly paced, and Kat's scene actually made me gasp. If you enjoy messy, character-driven drama where the emotional stakes feel real, this one delivers. Already downloaded the next book.

This hand blender works great. Easy cleanup and easy storage since the blade portion (and shaft) disconnect from the motor for cleaning. Having it break down into two pieces allows the blender to be stored easily in a drawer. The adjustable power levels are great too. However, I would sure appreciate a "stay on" button on the next model. This blender is great for making those quick Whey Protein and fruit shakes!

James Smith has a keen sense of not only how to suggest a plethora of tasty soups, but he also takes the time to explain and give photographs of the various soups he mentions along with precise preparation and ingredient lists and tips for preparation. The soups he present in this book are as follows: Red lentil Vegetarian soup, Potato, Cannellini and savory soup, Potato and Ruth red lentil soup, Lentil and Spinach soup, Miso soup, Watercress soup, Best noodles soup, Pasta lemon soup, Egg drop and beancurd soup, Sweet potato, Lentil and Carrot soup, Corn and Roasted carrot soup, Broccoli soup, Onion and Chicken creamy soup, Coriander and lemon soup, Tortilla and lemon soup, Cilantro and Tomato soup, Tom yam soup, Pumpkin Carrot and Masoor soup, Basil and green peas soup, Tomato Paustik soup, Cilantro Lemongrass and fully infused chicken soup, Egg drop tomato soup, Thick Spinach soup, Almond and Garden vegetable soup, Egg tomato soup, andVegetable mixed soup. His manner of presentation is as easy to follow as his recipes are mouthwatering to read - and make. For the health conscious this is a gift to the kitchen library. Grady Harp November 14
fun to put together - be sure to keep the bolts loose until the very end. my dog loves this.
Got this for my nephew and it's way sturdier than I expected, holds up great outdoors.
Great product for the price. Very bright and the changing colors are great.
Super light and handles small lures perfectly. Casts like a dream with zero hassle. Can't beat it for the price.

Very poor documentation. Even on-line videos aren't very easy to understand. Whoever packed my router broke one of the antennas. After working on it for 8 hours. I reset it to factory defaults. I also updated the firmware. Finally got it to work-not very well though. I thought it would be better. I'll never buy from this seller again. Buyer beware.

Finally picked this up after years of hearing people rave about it, and honestly it wrecked me in the best way. Steinbeck somehow makes you feel like you're right there in the Salinas Valley, breathing the dust and watching these families spiral through generations of love, jealousy, and redemption. The character work is just staggering, Cathy still gives me chills. What stuck with me most is how the book wrestles with choice and morality without ever feeling preachy. It's long and dense but never slow; every chapter pulls you deeper. I closed it feeling like I'd lived an entire lifetime alongside these people. Easily one of the most human, gut-punching novels I've ever read.
Picture does not do it justice. It's long and metal ( not plastic ) and it was easy to install. I have a garden tub that would splash water on the sides when filling. This solved the problem.

I used this canner for the first time today and was very happy with how easy it was to set up, process and clean. The temperature gauge on top is really helpful. Being so inexperienced I don't think I would want to chance it, and not give the canner enough time to do it's job. I am looking forward to doing much more in the future!
Had this knife for months now, used it camping and on the job, still sharp and solid as day one.

Love this set of clippers. I have used it at least 4 times. It's a great set. Well worth the money I paid and it comes with alot of guards for different hair lengths. Would definitely recommend this product!
Had a couple of touch lamps that were going on the fritz. Decided to try these. Easy to install and they work as advertised. Good product at a good price!
My pup goes nuts for these, and the bright colors make fetch way more fun!

This extension cord was the perfect length. However, my computer was unable to receive power through it. I disconnected this cord and reinserted the original power cord and the PC powered right up. I added the Tripp Lite cord back and no power again. Maybe I just received a bad cord.
Worn it a bunch already and the stitching and sparkle have held up perfectly, still looks brand new.

My book arrived in perfect condition thanks to the sturdy cardboard packaging, no dents or bent corners at all, which I really appreciate as someone picky about my paperbacks. Delivery was quick too, beating the estimate by two days. As for first impressions, I'm only a few chapters in but already intrigued by the world-building. The author drops you straight into this strange, blended society without much hand-holding, and I'm enjoying piecing together how everything works. The prose feels smooth and easy to sink into, even if I'm still getting my bearings with some of the terminology. I'm giving four stars for now based on the solid packaging, fast shipping, and promising start, might bump it to five once I finish.

This is without a doubt this author's best novel; & I've read her 2 previous ones, more than once. The details re: Mac's illness were exceptional, as were the details of each character. I really appreciated the details re: the idiosyncrasies of the characters ie: Max eating a handful of almonds during a very stressful time. The suspense throughout the novel kept me seriously engaged, the ending blew me away! Good story, but excellent writing! Keep them coming! GB
The LED indicator is super handy, glows amber while charging, green when full. No guessing if my Kindle is ready to go.

Wow! I really, really liked this book! This is story has one of my favourite themes-romance laced with a bit of humour. The 'blue demon' is such a loveable character and his 'lady' was a great match for him. Another good character was Rierdane, the valet-he reminded me of an English butler. One reviewer mentioned something about the way Cass spoke-yeah, it wasn't my favourite, but she didn't speak like that all the time and it didn't detract from the story, in fact it made me realise that there are all types of dialects and speech patterns* and it has very little to do with how or with whom one falls in love. This is a lovely story, I will definitely look for more of Ms. Story's book (I read her Willing Slave-another excellent story). *Disclosure-As a British-Nigerian married to a Yank, I think may have some experience with dialects/accents:)

I received a free item to review. The sounds are loud and remind me of (if you can fathom this) a raspy-throated human infant processed through a vocoder synth. Our lab seemed a little scared of it at first (as was I!) but she quickly got the deal and loves it now. She's a medium-large 75+ pound yellow lab yet she can't quite get her jaws far enough around the ball to carry it - if it were just an inch or so smaller in diameter it would be perfect. But she loves to nudge it around the living room and through corridors. It's extremely hard plastic and durable - she plays with it inside and out, though the sounds carry far less outdoors (fine by me!).
Got this expecting a fake moss ball, but it's actually way better than I thought. Tank water looks noticeably clearer after just a few days, and my pleco hangs around it nonstop.

This is a stunningly beautiful production. Probably as good as it gets when it comes to optics, lenses and subject matter. Fiji may be surrounded by the best collection of underwater life on the planet. The Bonus Feature puts you as close to these beautiful creatures as you will ever get. This DVD transports you into the reefs surrounded by incredible scenery and ocean life at its best.
The box arrived crushed and the cover was already bent. Not a great start for a book I was already unsure about.

I put this on during a lazy Sunday with my brother and we were crying laughing by the ten-minute mark. The chemistry between the cast is just effortless, and the chaotic Vegas energy never lets up. It's raunchy in the best way but has surprising heart underneath all the madness. I'd recommend it to anyone planning a guys' trip or just needing a solid pick-me-up after a rough week. Instant mood booster.

I went in skeptical about the whole time-travel jukebox concept, but honestly, the music descriptions are what hooked me. The author nails the atmosphere of each era through song choices alone, you can practically hear the crackle of the vinyl. I loved how Nick's playlist selections reveal so much about his character without him having to say a word. The scenes where Diana first hears a future classic in a dusty 1950s bar gave me actual chills. It's a quick, immersive read that respects your intelligence and doesn't overexplain the magical mechanics. Perfect for a lazy Sunday when you want something heartfelt and just a little nostalgic.

What a Great reel! If your new to baitcasters this is the one to get. I've got 3 chronarch c+4's, a curado, two abu Garcia Revo's, a Lews BB1 and a few other bass pro baitcasters. The T-wing system really is awesome. I also like how there isn't a side plate to open(especially if your new to baitcasters) because I was adjusting my ci4+ and the side plate fell in the lake once!!! I also usually put new bearings in my reels, but I don't this one needs it, because of how far it casts. The size of this reel makes it great for your palm, and is pretty light, and I'm comparing it to my Shimano Ci4+'s which are very light. I am by no means new to using baitcasters, but if I were to recommend one to someone that has very limited experience or is just buying their first one, I'd strongly recommend this as its pretty hard to backlash... The only thing I wish it came with a bottle of oil for it like my Shimanos.

This is only the second dystopian novel I've read so I don't have much to compare it to in this genre. What I do know is that I thoroughly enjoyed following the story of Raine, Jem and Leif. While there are a few lighthearted, even romantic aspects, there also many dark, heartbreaking moments and more than a few surprises. While I am by nature a voracious reader, I will admit to the habit of skipping sections of books when the story drags even a little. I did not skip sections in this book, and while a few other readers commented on a slow beginning, personally I did not find that to be the case. Clearly the story ends on a note meant to set the reader up for the next book in the series. This can be tricky because the author needs to leave the reader feeling satisfied with where they've ended this part of the story, and yet wanting more. The author has accomplished that with this book, and I can honestly say I look forward to learning what the future holds for Raine. Happy to recommend Kindreds: An Alliance of Bloods.

I was one of the first to purchase Trakdots when they initially came out, then quickly learned (a) there is virtually no user support, and (b) the software was horribly flawed. Since then, the company has paid buyers to ship the units back for a "major software update," but...getting my two units back has been a nightmare. I shipped them to the vendor, as directed, in early November, yet here I am in late January, STILL trying to get my supposedly-updated TrakDots back. Endless emails back and forth, lots of "We'll overnight them right away" promises, but nothing. If it was possible to give negative stars on a review, I would. TrakDots are a complete waste of money. * * * * * 01.30.14 FOLLOW UP * * * * * Finally got two units back. Notice I didn't say "my units." In spite of assurances we'd be getting our originals back, I was sent two open box returns that someone else dumped. The security seals on both boxes were torn open; the serial number on one unit had been completely removed (rendering it incapable of being activated) with the "Warranty void if damaged" seal torn in half. One of my two originals had yet to be activated (read: brand new, unused). Now, I'm holding someone else's rejects. * * * * * 02.11.14 FOLLOW UP * * * * * After circling back to TrakDot *again,* was sent two more replacement units. These did not appear to have been opened, however...neither one would power on. Tried multiple batteries, to no avail. Both units were dead boxes. This time, I cc'd (Harry Streck, President of GlobaTrac) on my email to Customer Service, asking for a full refund of my entire purchase price, including the pre-paid first year of service for each unit. Getting Mr. Streck involved made the difference--while Customer Service continued to try a "Let's talk first" approach, he apologized for the problems, and issued a full refund, call-tagging the four faulty replacement units. Trakdot is, without question, the worst purchase decision I've ever made, but at least I got my money back. Finally.

I have mixed feelings about this book. On the one hand I'm sure it will stay with me, if only because it has provided me with a vivid picture of what the mental life of somebody I know may be like. On the other hand I did not care for the writing...... starting with the title, whose intriguing promise is not in any way, that I can see, kept, Naturally the title brings to mind Sherlock Holmes. And the connection is indeed drawn in the book, which, very annoyingly to my mind, relates the main plot of the relevant Conan Doyle novel, which I would have been motivated to reread after all these years had it only been alluded to rather than completely revealed (and to no good purpose that I can see). And what does it have to do with THIS novel? Not much. Just about the only plot element that was keeping me interested was the detective mystery, but, bizarrely, this is blown up rather early in the game... admittedly thereby introducing a different and also intriguing plot element, but not intriguing enough to assuage my disappointment at the demise of the detective element. The writing is lacking also in that there are contradictions in the text and sometimes the characters do things that I simply could not believe. The main problem with the writing, though, is one of the things that gives the book its strength, namely, conveying what I presume is an autistic-like mind. Unfortunately the author is not enough of a stylist to prevent me from mentally shouting, OK, enough already, I get it. It became tedious for most of my read. I will credit the book and story with a strong double message: It shows that some people are capable of unconditional love (and some are not), and happiness is not to be found.
This was exactly the pick-me-up I needed. If you love witty, feel-good reads, grab this one, perfect for fans of Sophie Kinsella or anyone needing a mood boost.

This review is for the charger purchased for a Samsung Galaxy S6. I am very very happy with this purchase, and cannot believe I didn't have this cable before! Like most people, I was using the charger that came with my phone which had frayed beyond belief in the 8 or 9 months that I have had it. Not sure why Samsung doesn't make more durable cables, but I guess they bank on the fact that you'll need to buy a new charger every year or so. But I digress. So my current charger was basically frayed in the section right where it connects to the phone part, so there was a 'particular' way you had to lay the phone for it to properly charge. This left many situations where the phone was plugged in all night, but it wasn't actually charging because the cable wasn't lying in the right position. Annoying, right? So I was browsing Amazon in it's splendid glory late one night, as I've come to do recently, and decided to order this. Was pleasantly suprised! These are some durable cables! They don't seem flimsy, even at the USB and plug-in part. And the cable is loooooong. How was I tethered to the short, 1 ft charger all this time? I really feel like I've been living under a rock, because this seems to solve all the problems of the original charger all at once! I like that there's a three-pack because, let's be real, my husbands charger is in no better state. And most importantly, because I'm sure this is an issue for many people, it doesn't seem to take longer to charge the phone. Now I haven't done an actual timing of it, but it seemed to take the same amount of time for me. And again, if the cable is in good shape and not finicky, there's less chance that it's just plugged in and not actually charging. I am very happy and will re-purchase these if they ever get destroyed. although whatever would destroy these would likely take the phone with it.

Quality and quite nonstick I bought a "Scanpan Classic 11-Piece Deluxe Cookware Set" in 2007, and they have been great non stick pans, serving me well for nearly a decade. Even with a lifetime warranty, I can't expect the skillet's nonstick surface to last forever. My SO doesn't know how to cook on low heat and we abused the heck out of them. My fry and sautee pan from that series have lost quite a bit of their ceramic coating and were no longer non stick. So I figured I'd invest in something that I know would last a life time. A skillet that can't be destroyed, dishwasher safe, etc. Enter the CSX series. I picked up the 10.25" fry pan, which is the perfect size for cooking bacon and eggs. It is super great, beautiful, and has a comfortable handle. I've had no major problems with sticking (teaching her how to cook with proper heat), and cleaning it is a breeze. I actually use a "The Ringer Cast Iron Cleaner XL 8x6 Inch Stainless Steel Chainmail" to scrub clean it when needed. It heats evenly and maintains heat (as evidenced when I pour sink water in it to steam clean it, and it boils for quite some time). I had also bought a "DeBuyer Mineral B Element Iron Frypan, Round" carbon steel skillet as well, but she must have put it in the dish washer as it's all rusted now. So I think I'll buy a second CSX fry pan. These things will last a lifetime with no maintenance needed.

The Garmin "Bluecharts" are vector charts, which means they use mathematic algorithms to store all the lines and features of a nautical chart. I have steered away from these in the past because they tended to give up a lot of detail vs. "Raster Graphic" charts, which are essentially photographic images of paper charts. With "Bluecharts" they have gotten to a level of detail (including multiple colors) that they look almost as good as a paper charts. The advantages of vector charts is that they take up much less room on your hard drive and run much faster on a PC. This is important when you are zooming in and out to see your depth or proximity to a wreck while moving on a boat. I use mine with an eTrex Legend and am able to load most of the detail (depth, obstructions, nautical aids, etc) onto the handheld. For the full look of charts, I connect the GPS unit to my laptop. The package also includes tidal charts, which are much more detailed and accurate than the little tide chart booklets I used to use. Overall, it makes navigation a breeze...your boat is automatically represented on the chart and you have many simple tools to calculate distance/time to a given destination. It also incorporates additional information on Marinas and service locations. The Garmin application the charts run on, "MapSource" allows you to easily switch between map types. I have "Americas Bluechart," "MetroGuide" (streetmaps), and "Tides and Marine Services," all without having to reconnnect the GPS unit. The only hassle is the "Unlock" process, which is a bit time consuming and involves providing the Garmin website with a bunch of codes, including the serial number of my GPS unit to unlock a set of charts from the CD-ROM. I'm not sure, but I think it will only work with that specific unit, which worries me a bit as I am thinking about buying a second unit for backup.
For what I paid, this thing's a beast, solid heft, huge size, and looks way pricier than it is.
