My review was not affected by the discount I received and is fair and unbiased.

Soup & Salads-from-scratch makers: THIS CHOPPER IS FOR YOU! Just about every ingredient you'd use in soups/salads can be chopped in this machine. No More stopping to sharpen knives, no more chopping boards at a height too high for your comfort, no more cuts to your hands and fingers. Plus, simple to clean and sanitize. Chopped pieces are relatively uniform in size, and can be chopped into large or smaller squares. Here's a tip: The least-fatiguing way to use this is to place the machine on a table of lower height--for me, that is 26". From this lower height, I can use my upper body weight, just like tall people do, to aid the chopping motion. I can do 10lbs carrots in about 15mins. The only feature missing is where to find replacement chopping screens. Anyway, scoop this chopper up, you'll be very glad you did.

A must see Movie! It was exciting, exhilarating, interesting and had a great plot. You get to see J-Lo like you have never seen her before and Jason Statham is in his element and keeps you on the edge of your seat with the action.

This anime was recomended to me and, so I gave it a try and automatically got hooked, its sad and funny with very memorable character. Now and the you remember their dolls that talk and move and your reminded creepy lol. Great anime and great Collection too it includes the OVA as well.
Fun colorful socks for my grandson. They go with lots of super hero and sports team shirts!

I've been using these chews for about four months now for my 10-year-old Labrador, and I'm honestly impressed by how well they hold up. The container seals tight, and even in humid weather, they haven't gotten crumbly or stale. My dog had a noticeable limp after long walks, but since we started these daily, he's bouncing around like a puppy again. I was skeptical at first, but the consistency of the formula seems really stable, no weird melting or clumping, even when I've accidentally left the bottle in a warm spot. He gobbles them up without hesitation, and I haven't seen any stomach upset. For a supplement to stay this fresh and effective after months of regular use says a lot about the quality. Definitely a staple in our house now.

I have teenage boys, 3 big dogs, and 2 cats. I vacuum daily, and I'm hard on my vacuums. This is my 3rd Hoover Wind Tunnel variation... and I like it the best, and the suction is fantastic, but it is heavy. Heavy to carry, heavy to push. THE GOOD: + Fabulous suction pulls up all the pet hair you didn't want to know you had. "Multi-cyclonic" suction; previous model was "Dual Cyclonic". + 7 settings for carpet height. The previous model (Wind Tunnel 2 Pet Plus) had 5. Not sure that you need 7 but I guess some houses do. + Retractable cord - same as the previous model but longer by 3'. Love this. + Rinseable filter and "one button" cup emptying (more on this in The Bad). + A great hose which, like on the previous model, 'clicks' to pull out/put back so you know you've got it replaced correctly -- but this hose stretches 5' more (to 15'). Great for stairs and ceiling fans! + 3 onboard tools (+ standard telescoping wand)... I like that they stay ON. + Wider (15") head. This is good and bad in my opinion. You can get big rooms done faster but it doesn't fit under some things. + Folding handle! Great! Now fits in the closet! THE BAD: - Not 'steerable' - though I didn't take off for this as it doesn't say it is - HEAVY! Heavy to push and to carry, - ARGH. I still hate the cup-emptying! I don't know how to solve this but I'm not an engineer and presumably someone at Hoover is It's true you just hold the cup over the trash and push one button BUT the door swings away as the dirt is falling out...meaning that the door gets covered in dirt and is awkward to clean off as it hangs, swinging and spreading gunk, over your trash. BOTTOM LINE: GREAT for pet houses, lots and lots of suction and conveniences... might be too heavy for an older person.
Did the job! Lasted most of the night and some of them into the next night.

I have a 15-pound red kettlebell from GoFit. At the time I am writing this review, you don't seem to be able to select that combination of options on Amazon, but that may change in the future as things come into and/or go out of stock. And much of what I say will apply to any of the GoFit kettlebells that are currently being offered. At any rate, I am very happy with this kettlebell. It is comfortable to hold and I like the vinyl coating (not on the handle, just on the colored part as seen in the product images). I have had my kettlebell for at least 5 or 6 years and have used it periodically and the coating does not seem to degrade. It basically still looks the same as the day I got it. I have not had any problems with this kettlebell slipping in my hands, either. 15 pounds is a little bit of a challenge for me and I can't use this kettlebell for every kettlebell exercise that I do. I also have a smaller one for some exercises, and switch out as needed. If you are planning to get into kettlebell training at a serious level, you will probably want to have a few kettlebells of different weights. I find that a kettlebell workout works the legs more than you might expect (you don't notice it at the time but you feel it the next day). For reference, if it helps in terms of selecting a kettlebell weight for you, I'm a small-framed woman in my mid-30s and I'd consider myself intermediate/advanced when it comes to most home exercise programs. The DVD that came with this was not really a complete workout. However, I thought the instructor (Sarah Lurie) was good and it motivated me to buy a couple of her full-length workout DVDs (many are available here on Amazon).

I wanted to love this bottle because the filter idea is great and it doesn't leak at all. But the drinking experience is miserable. The flip-up straw is so narrow that you have to pull like you're trying to sip a milkshake through a coffee stirrer. I'd take a few gulps and end up lightheaded from the effort, then just give up and stay thirsty. After a couple days I noticed I was drinking way less water during hikes because it's genuinely exhausting. Also, it only fits in the larger cup holders in my car, so it rolls around on the passenger seat half the time. Ended up buying a cheap gas station bottle instead.

I've brought this little table to three beach days, a backyard movie night, and a kid's soccer tournament so far, and honestly, it's been a lifesaver. Pops open instantly and weighs next to nothing slung over my shoulder. It held our snack spread, drinks, and even a small Bluetooth speaker without any wobble on grass or sand. The surface isn't rock-solid, but it's totally stable for normal use. I'd recommend this to anyone who does picnics, camping, or outdoor concerts and hates lugging heavy gear. For the price, you really can't beat the convenience. I already grabbed a second one for my sister's farmers' market runs.
Arrived fast in perfect condition, and the cover alone got me excited to dive in.

Most travel pillows Id previously used were simply okay; the THERMATEK HEATED TRAVEL PILLOW is one of the most relaxing, comfortable travel pillows Ive ever used. WHAT IT IS: - A U-shaped pillow that fits around the neck for support with the optional benefit of heat. WHAT MAKES IT SO SPECIAL: - Memory foam with a silky-soft/plush cover. The memory-foam pad is somewhat firm and provides added comfort and support. Extremely comfortable/cozy and accommodates larger necks. The pillow itself isn't tapered like most pillows, its slab-like thickness adds more support. - There is a pocket/sleeve that accepts disposable heat packs. This is an added benefit for those who are seeking a therapeutic angle to their travel pillow. The pillow comes with 2 disposable heat packs; additional heat packs must be purchased separately. I found this pillow to be quite luxurious and useful. The pillow alone (no heat) is great to use when working at the computer, watching television, reading and travel. The memory foam and plush cover make this pillow comfortable to use for longer periods than the other travel pillows Id previously tried. While I like the soothing option of heat, the added cost of buying additional replacement heat packs must be considered (each pack generates about 8 hours of warmth) will temper my need for heat. Heat or no heat, the THERMATECK HEATED TRAVEL PILLOW is wonderful.

This has been a nice little grill for making family breakfast. I like that it is none stick and has the cooling boundary around it. Bacon takes a while to cook on it but pancakes and eggs are fast. Decent to clean, wish it was dish washer safe. Over all very happy with it.
Too fat and awkward to use, but they have a similar version at Wal-Mart which is thinner and I like much better.

I grabbed this short story while waiting for the next full-length Belador book, and it totally delivered. It's a cozy, quick read that fleshes out Tristan's world in a way I didn't expect, seeing him juggle loyalty, family tension, and a little bit of mischief made me smile more than once. The pacing is brisk but never feels rushed, and the winter atmosphere gave it a nice seasonal charm without being cheesy. If you're already invested in the series, this is a satisfying snack between meals that adds depth to side characters you thought you knew. Honestly, it left me even more excited for what's coming next.

I bought this for my 8-month-old niece and she is completely mesmerized. The way each instrument lights up and you can tap to isolate the flute or harp blows my mind. It's sturdy, not annoyingly loud, and actually teaches cause-and-effect beautifully. I'd recommend it to any parent or grandparent looking for a screen-free toy that sparks curiosity. Perfect gift for babies and young toddlers.

I hadn't used a strop before and decided to see what this could do on my fixed blade knives. I was really surprised. You can take a knife that's sort of sharp and get it to the next level with this strop. I just wouldn't have predicted it. So in terms of performance, I'd rate this at least a 4 star, maybe 5. Why only 3 stars? This is WAY overpriced. You can get double sided, quality strops for about $20 and the green compound is like $5 for a huge block of the stuff. Yes it takes some effort to "load" the leather, but if you look on youtube you'll find all kinds of tricks to make that work. This strop should cost about $25. Didn't realize that at the time I bought it. So, nice effective strop, but way too expensive.
My older rescue dog took to this bed immediately, and cleanup is a breeze. Highly recommend it for anyone with senior pets or dogs prone to little accidents.
I bought a couple of the duvet covers and they are so nice, silky and soft.
I've tried a bunch of cat treats and these are easily the favorite in our house. My two picky eaters come sprinting the second they hear the lid pop. Totally worth the cost for that reaction.
The stitching started unraveling after three washes, kinda disappointing for the price.

Got the box a day early, which was a nice start. Outer packaging was pretty basic but everything inside was snug with that dense grey foam, so the winder arrived in perfect shape. First impression pulling it out, it's heavier and more solid than I expected for the price, with a clean matte finish that doesn't scream "gadget." The front window has a slight tint that looks classy. Setting it up took maybe two minutes once I glanced at the little instruction card. My only tiny gripe is the cushion feels a bit stiff with my smaller wrist band, but after a couple tries it seated securely. Runs whisper-quiet on my desk overnight.
Totally worth renting. Gripping, powerful doc that makes you think long after it's over.

The thin, razor-sharp blade glides through dense root vegetables like sweet potatoes without wedging. I was surprised how effortless it felt breaking down a butternut squash, no slipping, no struggling. The balance point sits right at the bolster, making long prep sessions way less tiring. Easily my new daily driver.
This absolutely worked with the existing collar that I had for my old dog. Now I can walk both of them together, and they both respond to my commands.

I wanted to like this, since I usually enjoy this author, but this one felt like a chore from start to finish. The pacing dragged so much that I kept checking how many pages were left, and the story never really grabbed me. The main character was supposed to be this clever, resourceful type, but she just came off as exhausting and hard to root for. I expected tight suspense or at least some emotional payoff, but instead it's just rambling filler that doesn't build toward anything satisfying. By the time I reached the end, I wasn't moved or entertained, just glad it was over. Definitely not one I'd recommend or ever pick up again.
I didn't think it'd be so quiet, honestly. Water's way clearer than I expected, just wish it chilled more.

I like having a spoke wrench set of separate tools instead of one of those that has all of the sizes on a single coin-shaped tool. The Avenir set is exactly what I wanted. They're easy to use and provide sufficient leverage to work on very tight or corroded spokes.
K2 brand of inline skates are amazing. Rubber wheels, soft shoe. Super smooth ride. Easily maneuverable. My eight children prefer these over any other kind they've ever owned.
My Yorkies love it! And, I love it because it is so light! No weight to it at all. My 'girls' needed that extra step to get up on my pillow top bed.

If your using Tidy Cat your not using the best. We where faithful Tidy Cat purchasers for over 10 years then after taking up our carpets to go back to the hardwood underneath we where shocked by how much litter was in and under the carpet, yes we vacuum. Within a week of having hardwood floors again we where shocked how much litter was all over the house, not to mention in the bed - ughh. Also we found that Tidy Cat wasn't clumping as well as it use to and we were always fishing out tiny clumps too. Well it was time to do something about the mess so we decided to try a different litter. WOW if you have never used Cat's Pride Fresh and Light litter you have to try it! Tidy Cat is like little balls, Cat's Pride is not. Cat's Pride is a very light litter which is a big plus, no strong scent and clumps great! We have 2 covered litter boxes side by side one still with Tidy and one with Cat's Pride. I put a 4' x 5' piece of astro truf (outdoor type) in front of the boxes and still have to sweep Tidy off the hardwood in that room, hallway and adjoining rooms but no Cat's Pride. I hope you find this review helpful and think if you just give Cat's Pride Fresh and Light a try you will never buy any other brand again!
The color is cute, but for what I paid, the ticking is way too loud. I can't even wear it in a quiet room without getting annoyed.
Arrived fast and packed super securely. Looks solid and feels like quality right out of the box.
The grip texture is just right, tacky without being sticky. Installed on my pistol in minutes and it feels locked in place even during sweaty range sessions.

I picked this up hoping for a deeper dive into post-war recovery stories, especially the smaller human details that get lost in broad histories. The book does gesture toward a balanced view, but after going back to it a few times over a couple of months, the spine started splitting and pages loosened faster than I expected for a paperback at this price. The binding just doesn't hold up to casual rereading or carrying around in a bag. I still flip through for occasional facts, but the physical wear makes it feel disposable rather than a lasting reference. Decent starting point, but if you plan to use it heavily, be ready for it to start falling apart sooner than it should.

"Northanger Abbey" does make a mockery of Gothic Romance. But Jane Austen shows that you can be passionate towards fiction literature without making fiction reality. The heroine, Catherine, learns that not everything in reality has a Gothic fiction story. That fiction is just that. Catherine Morland (17) goes to Bath with friends. She then meets Henry Tilney, whom invites her to his family's home - Northanger Abbey. Catherine expected a Gothic Abbey to match with the novels she reads (mainly Ann Radcliffe the creator of Gothic Romance). The comedy is that the Abbey, Henry and the Tilney's are just the opposite. They are wealthy "English Christians." There are other subtext to parody of social marriages and manners. Jane Austen's books all have this comedic point if view. I would recommend this novel.

We have and enjoy the Radio Flyer All Terrain Wagon, and were pleased to discover that this wagon is a bit more sturdy (although not by a wide margin). We loved the pneumatic tires on the Radio Flyer, and these are just as nice. The raised sides on this wagon are more reassuring for keeping kids from tumbling out while hauling around corners or bumping over dirt walking trails. The plastic handle is comfortably large for even the most generously sized hands. This wagon feels like it will last a lifetime.

I really wanted to like this Beef & Spinach recipe since my dog usually goes nuts for Beyond's other flavors. But the texture of this one is just off, it's weirdly gelatinous, almost like a firm pate, and my dog actually struggled to chew it. The bigger problem was the aftermath: about three hours after eating, she had loud, gurgling stomach noises and then threw up all over her bed. I checked the can and it wasn't expired or anything, so I have to assume it's just a bad formulation. The spinach pieces are slimy and the whole thing has a greasy, unnatural sheen. I won't be buying this variety again.

This book hit me right in the feels, way harder than I expected. I thought I'd get a light royal romance, but the emotional depth totally blindsided me. Kian's grief and pressure feel so raw, and Savvy isn't just a quirky love interest, she's genuinely grounding. The banter has actual spark, not just filler, and the pacing never drags. I've read plenty of royalty tropes that fall flat, but this one balances swoony moments with real stakes. Finished it in one sitting and immediately wanted more.
It was a hit as a Christmas gift! Lots of fun!

M. Robinson did it again! This book is amazing! Brilliant. This is a spin off of the VIP trilogy. We've met Brooke and Devon in VIP but now it's thier turn to tell the story. They are both so broken that to others they only show their facade. At the beginning of the story Brooke is 16 and just like every 16yo girl she is full of hope and dreams. But in her case, those dreams and hope dissapear and she closes herself and becomes very good VIP. It's all about sex and pleasure. Devon's life wasn't an easy one. He knows how hard you have to work to get something in life. They are both broken and they need each other if they admit it or not. At first there is very beautiful friendship, but they both know there is more. So much more. Their story is full of pain and loss, but also full of love, hope and scorching hot scenes. Whoa, M. Robinson knows how to write hot scenes. Reading this book I cried, I laughed, I swooned and I was fanning myself. This book is amazing. Can't wait for more from M. Robinson.

I ordered 1 pair and used them for the whole day. Having 4 surgerys on my fused ankle W/24 screws. They were so comfortable & look more stylish, than elderly looking compression socks. I ordered 6 pair immediately. Great compression socks!
This is a very good idea! Having the capability to save content from either computer of handheld device is exactly what I had been looking, for! Price is reasonable, as well!

First off, I bought the whole package, UltraHD Lighted Work Center, the UltraHD Cushioned Pneumatic Work Stool and the optional 3" wheels for the bench. UltraHD Lighted Work Center: Easy to put together and very sturdy, LED work light and adjustable leveling feet. GREAT BENCH. And this is what I expect from Seville Classics. I also own 6 of their Industrial Wire Shelving Units and they are excellent too. It is what you would expect from a quality piece. UltraHD Cushioned Pneumatic Work Stool: Very easy to put together and adjusts to the correct height for the bench. Do not overly care for the small back rest but it it ok. One small issue, it only has 4 wheels, they really should have had a 5th wheel, as it has already slipped out from under me once already. Be careful not to sit on the edge too quickly Optional 3" Wheels for UltraHD Work Center: Bad purchase. It not only raises the bench 4 inches, you are now sitting 4 inches lower on the bench. I am 5' 10" and I had a hard time sitting above the table to work on items. I would save the hassle and $34 on these.

This brilliant debut album by the late, great guitar legend is also one of the best albums of all time and you'll see this album in the top half of practically every top 100 lists of best albums and for very good reason too. Released in 1967, the year of The Beatles' "Sgt Pepper's Lonely Hearts' Club Band" this rock hard power trio combo was unlike anything that anyone had ever heard before except perhaps Pete Townsend's The Who and Eric Clapton's Cream but the influence was immense and rock music was never the same again. No weak tracks on this album and every track is brilliant here with no fillers in sight. This version of this seminal album is also the best one that's out there at present. The sound quality has been remastered very, very well and the mini-lp replica cardboard packaging is a work of art too. We get two bonus tracks albeit in mono: "Highway Chile" and "51st Anniversary" but all 17 tracks are simply gems and classic rock standards. We get a 24 page colour booklet with all the lyrics plus great liner notes about the band plus another booklet which contains the lyrics in Japanese as well. For fans and students of great classic rock as well as aspiring rock guitarists out there, this, indeed all Jimi's albums are required listening. Very, very highly recommended!

I bought these for my 7-year-old who's just started hunter-jumper lessons and they've been a total win. The material holds up through constant wear, she's in them twice a week plus Saturday shows, and still looks sharp. I was worried about the lighter color showing every speck, but mud and arena dust shake right off or wash out without a trace. The knee patches give her just enough grip to feel secure over low fences without being sticky or restrictive. Fit is true to size with a little room for growth. I'd absolutely recommend these to any parent whose kid is serious about riding but hard on clothes, they'll survive the barn, the wash, and everything in between.

I rented this on a whim for a family movie night, and it totally held up. It's a fun, chaotic ride that doesn't take itself too seriously, perfect if you've got tweens or teens who roll their eyes at anything too cheesy. The Chicago setting gives it a nice sense of place, and the pacing keeps things moving so nobody gets bored. Some of the jokes land better if you remember the late-80s vibe, but my kids still laughed plenty. I'd recommend it for parents looking for a light, PG-13 throwback to watch together, especially if your crew likes a little mischief mixed with heart. Just don't expect deep life lessons and you'll have a good time.
Not too many people are using this system I'm thinking, but I do, good product, sturdy & holds up in the outdoor elements, reliable...
Been wearing these for months now and they still look and feel brand new. Solid buy.

This petticoat is PERFECT under the Muxxn dress I purchased. I will need to do a little shaping to it because it was flattened in shipment. It seems sturdy and of high quality. It's also comfortable! I've taken my rating down one star because the very inside lining isn't stretchy, so I'm afraid I may tear it if for some reason I have to step ultra wide, or whatever the case may be.
Worn it daily for months and the finish still looks brand new, no scratches at all.

Love this peeler. I had purchased one a few years ago and somehow it got lost. I tried to replace it with other brands and they just didn't do the job as well. This time I purchased two just in case. Would recommend it to everyone.
Took it on a few rough hikes already and it's still holding up great.

I was given an ARC for an honest opinion With that being said, this is a sequel and reading book 1 is a must! This book picks up right where book 1 ended. Rose has been kidnapped and taken to Hell, she is being held by Razor at Basiliuss command. Of course, we know Rose isn't going to take this lying down. With the help of friends, both old a new, a rescue mission has launched. I won't be giving away any spoilers, but we do get to add more pieces to the puzzle that is Rose. I love all of AK Michaels works. They are always full of the most interesting people/species. The writing is always good and the story is nonstop from beginning to end. If you love Witches, Vampires, Demons, Gods, Wolves and Fairies this is a must read. Definitely another 5 star read for me!!!
Excellent light weight hand drill with lots of torque and good battery life.

This emotionally packed romance had me laughing out loud one moment and crying the next! The characters are honest, real and very refreshing. A story about real life troubles in the peerage and the way real people get through them. While the rules of English edict control, Bryce writes without all the silly debutante drama found in many historical romances, without shallow characters that can never make up their minds and without pages and pages of explicit love scenes. I thoroughly enjoyed it!
My box showed up in perfect condition, no bends or scuffs, and the cover instantly pulled me in. Flipping through the pages, I knew I'd be hooked.

I read the audio edition and the performance by Valerie Gilbert really added good things to the tale. The historical tale has some good research into social and religious customs of the day, and terrors of the known and unknown that we are not burdened with today. It is a romance with suspense and the only complaint that I have is that it is too short.
Still going strong after a month of daily use.

I picked these up on a whim and they've already saved me from pulling a bumper off twice. The extra length is perfect for awkward engine bay spots where my normal sockets can't reach. Solid connection, no wobble. I'd recommend them to any weekend wrencher or pro who's tired of busted knuckles.

This knife comes super sharp and with a very nice boot sheath. My one complaint would be that the handle is very small if you have large or average hands you will most likely find it a little too slender.

Whew, this book may be one of the most intense love stories that I have ever read. I enjoy books about the corporate world, especially relationships involving an executive and a lower level employee. In Tracy Wolff's Addicted, CEO Ethan Frost and intern Chloe Girard are madly in love. Actually, the word madly is an understatement, their love is completely all-consuming, and as a result they are unable to function when they are apart from each other. After reading the dramatic prologue, I was hooked, at least for a little while. Some of the scenes are repetitive....Chloe running away almost every time she and Ethan have a problem, Ethan waiting for Chloe to come back to him, and Chloe's inability to cope with her past, to name a few. The story is good, what there is of it. A little less sex and a little more plot would have made the book more interesting. Ethan is a likable character, albeit a bit tortured by his lack of pure common sense. He may be uber smart when it comes to business mergers, but when love is involved, he is downright simple. He does not learn from his mistakes because he makes the same poor choices over and over again. Chloe is an intelligent young woman, however, she is quite immature when it comes to being in a relationship. Chloe's best friend is a real hoot and I would have liked to learn more about her character. Scorching sex scenes are an integral part of this book and Ms. Wolff does an excellent job of creating passion. Overall, a good read.

This vest is a steal for the cost. I use it for hill sprints and bodyweight circuits, and it stays put without shifting. The weight inserts are easy to swap, so I can dial things up or down. Honestly, it feels way more expensive than what I paid. Super happy with this find.
I bought this after my husband's kayak went under a log and he lost his paddle - which we thankfully recovered. He uses this all the time now. The length is great and there have been no issues since.
Has not helped or hurt my game. Not sure what will.
Book arrived fast and in perfect condition. The cover feels nice and the story pulled me in from page one. Wish the pacing was tighter.
Great idea! I'm still in the process of teaching my 6 month old schnoodles to use this to go out. They're still getting used to it but we use it every time we go outside.

What really stood out to me here was Alice Krige's Lucie Manette. She brings this quiet steeliness that makes you understand exactly why Carton would make that choice, not just romantic devotion, but genuine admiration for her character. Too often Lucie gets played as a weepy ideal, but Krige gives her backbone and warmth that feel lived-in. The whole production has this intimate, almost theatrical pacing that lets the emotional beats land properly. Sarandon's Carton is raw and self-loathing without becoming maudlin, and the final scene actually got me teary, which the Coleman version never managed. It's not flashy, but if you care about the soul of this story, this one nails it.
It's always pleasant to find a book that is enjoyable from beginning to end - especially when you discover a new author at the same time!

This book hooked me from the very first chapter with its raw, grounded depiction of everyday decency colliding with sudden crisis. The way the father-daughter relationship is written felt painfully real, no sugarcoating, just the messy, fierce love that makes you hold your breath when things go wrong. I especially appreciated how the author handled the medical emergency scene; the pacing was so tight and the details so vivid that I genuinely forgot I was reading fiction. The emotional payoff sneaks up on you in the best way, and the snowy, isolated setting practically seeps through the pages. I finished it in one sitting and immediately bought a copy for my sister. It's the kind of story that lingers long after you've closed the cover.

I purchased this book for my significant other, who is totally into fitness and is always looking for ways to improve his physical appearance through exercise and nutrition. Naturally I take interest in anything that would affect his health, so I decided to read the book myself. The book provides comprehensive, easy to read information on the 10 most beneficial supplements for men and how they can help to get that sexy physique that you desire. What I like most about the book is that it gives a complete overview of the supplements their benefit, uses and precautions. Reading this book will help any man on the quest for a safe and healthy way to build lean muscles by complementing their diet with supplements to achieve their goals. The author goes as far as to telling you which workout programs goes best with the supplements, for example creatine is good for short repetitive workouts as opposed to aerobics. Well written facts on supplements that I know will benefit anyone who wants to increase their knowledge as well as use supplements in a safe and effective way.
For the money, these have held up surprisingly well with daily use. Solid little buy.
Bought these to use on the boat. Very excited to try with wine slushies this summer!!

I've had this on my Kindle for a few months now and keep coming back to reread certain scenes, which says something about how well the banter holds up over time. The writing still feels sharp even on a third pass, and the characters don't lose their spark. At under a hundred pages it's more of a quick hit than a deep dive, but the dialogue's aged better than a lot of full-length rom-coms I've burned through. No formatting glitches or weird typos popping up after multiple downloads across devices either, so the file itself is solid. If you want something light that doesn't get stale, this does the job.
Perfect fit under my kitchen cabinets, love the adjustable brightness levels.

For the price, I expected way fewer headaches. It works okay most of the time, but random disconnects make it hard to trust. Not worth the cash if you need rock-solid USB. Feels overpriced for such flaky performance.

I'm always cold in my basement apartment, but this little warmer heats up my side of the bed in about five minutes. The cord is long enough to reach my outlet without an extension, which was a nice surprise. Fabric is soft and doesn't feel plasticky. I love that it automatically shuts off after a while, perfect for forgetful folks like me.

*`*. (`v'). *`*. *`*. (`v'). '*`* 5 STAR REVIEW Pennie loved to read and that is why she was involved in her monthly book club. She was always comparing those book boyfriends she was reading about. Her social life was missing between her school work and her tight budget there was not much for her to do. But her life would change forever once she finds face to face with Carter, a woman that stop at anything to obtain what she wants. Carter was a business woman and she knew she had to be ruthless in her cut-throat world. When she finds herself with Pennie she knew she wanted to have her, protect her and love her in her own way. However there is a whole lot of issues they will have to face in order for her to be happy with Pennie. Having lived in a cave for the last decade or so, I confess I had no knowledge of Jeremy Wade and his "River Monsters" television show. Glancing at the 'New Books' section of my local library, I spotted RIVER MONSTERS..and I was hooked. I'm glad I happened to spot Wade's book; it's a fascinating and informative guide to freshwater beasties few people even knew existed. For the past 20-odd years, Wade, a Brit zoologist with a touch of Indiana Jones thrown in, has been traipsing the globe, searching for legendary freshwater fish. In RIVER MONSTERS, he shares the results of his quest and the results are eye-openers. Wade's descriptions of his efforts to find, fish for and land goliath tigerfish, arapaima, goonch, ripsaw catfish and longfin eels are wonderfully exciting, excitement only topped by the wonder of seeing actual photographs of those - often humungous - creatures. Along the way, Wade imparts valuable information on his finny friends and how they, in some cases, acquired fearsome if undeserved reputations as man-killers. Yet, exciting as Wade's adventures are, there is a cautionary note running throughout the book. Overfishing is taking its toll of fishlife, large and small, worldwide and Wade points out the fact that many of the freshwater beasties he tangled with are threatened with extinction. In short, RIVER MONSTERS is an appealing, exciting and insightful guide to aquatic wonders that - may still - lurk in freshwater rivers. Recommended.

Meet Meena, the heroine of the story, who thinks that vampires are just another fad and is forced to write them into her soap opera to compete with all the other vamp shows out there. She thinks it's a riot since people are obsessed with something that doesn't exit... or sparkle in the daylight. Until she is saved one night by a man whom protects her during a random attack... then she begins to wonder but continues to pass it off as a one-off until she can't ignore the truth any longer... vampires are very, very real. This story really reminds me of the early Queen Betsy books - you know the GOOD ones - and is a funny yet engaging tale that kept me entertained the entire read. I really hope that this turns into a series as Queen Betsy should just be staked already and I'm looking for a new fun series to take its place.

I picked this up to finally see what's in the back corner of my pantry, and the motion-sensing on the light bar itself is honestly the standout feature for me. When I'm carrying an armload of cans, I don't have to fumble for the remote or tap the switch, it just clicks on the moment I open the door. The adhesive mounting held solid on textured wood, no screws needed. I'm knocking off one star because the remote's range is a little finicky through walls; I had to be almost line-of-sight for it to respond. Battery life seems decent so far after a month of daily use. For a renter-friendly solution that doesn't need wiring, it's a solid little workhorse.

I snagged this season after a friend kept raving about it, and it showed up two days early in one of those frustration-free mailers, no dents, disc hubs all intact. Popped it in right away and the menu loaded smooth, no glitchy previews. The first episode grabbed me with that slick, moody opening sequence; I honestly didn't expect the writing to feel this sharp right out of the gate. The box art's a little generic, but the slipcover was pristine and the disc surface was smudge-free. Only nitpick: the case hinge felt flimsy when I opened it, so I'm babying it a bit. Solid pickup overall.

I'm commenting here only about a belated experience to remark about the resiliency of this unit to water. In an attempt to move my jacket out of the way in boarding a kayak in fresh water (Rainbow River, Fl), one of the pockets of the gore-tex jacket accidentally hung out of the craft (unbeknowngs to me) when my partner sitting behind me said "one of your pockets is in the water". Yep, it had the Canon camera in it; it had been submerged inside the pocket for about a full minute (perhaps longer), but the pocket hadn't pooled with water, only was wet inside. Needless to say, it appeared to be a goner. The viewfinder had beads of water inside, and the screen inside showed condensation and water droplets. Also, the battery compartment had some water in it, but not pooled, but enough that I could pour out several drops from it. I removed the batteries, and over a period of about 60 hours, exposed the camera to sunlight on the dashboard and inside the glove compartment to dry out. It gradually dissapated the droplets inside the viewfinder, and the condensation from the inside screen disappeared. Only at that time did I attempt to turn it on. I couldn't believe it! The 4GB SD card was intact with the pics, and the motor successfully retracted the lens. A few trial pics confirmed that the camera is now back in working order. Call it luck, but patience prevailed in letting natural sunlight and warmth bring it back to life. I'm impressed with this experience.

I have watched WWE wrestling for about 9 yrs. now. Ever since I've seen the "Hardy Boys" for the first time, I was amazed. They both are so very talented and fun to watch. Believe me, if one of the Hardy boys is on tv, I don't even move. I will sit there and watch them until they are done before I move. Jeff and Matt Hardy are both extremely talented and such a joy to watch. I am truly a Hardy fan and was very pleased to add this dvd to my collection. I really got a good deal on my purchase and am a very satisfied Amazon customer!
Package arrived a day early in sturdy, no-waste boxing. Unboxed it and it looked sleek right away. Fired it up and I'm genuinely impressed, quieter than expected and super simple to get going.

I picked this up on a whim before a long flight and ended up completely absorbed. The early chapters set in the hospital are vivid and immersive, you can feel the heat, the exhaustion, the strange camaraderie between the staff. There's a quiet, observational quality to the writing that makes even small moments feel significant. The last third does get a bit tangled with too many threads pulling in different directions, and it loses some of the intimacy that made the beginning so strong. Still, I'm glad I read it. It's the kind of novel that stays with you more for its atmosphere and setting than for its tidy conclusions. Worth the time.
As beautiful as it is functional. Looking forward to putting this thing through its paces this summer up here in Alaska.

I enjoyed this book on my Kindle. I must admit the book is a lot better than the movie. The character of Edward & Bella is much better in this book than on the screen. I found the book and story line a little slow in the middle particularly the romancing of the two main characters (then again, I am a male). I feel this was omitted in the movie. I have purchased all the other books by Stehpanie and I will enjoy reading them on my Kindle. His book was easily read on my Kindle. Well done Amazon and keep up the good work. Buy this Kindle book, it`s wrth the relaxing read. A well written book.
Arrived ahead of schedule in solid, snug packaging. Took it out and immediately noticed the premium build, feels substantial and sharp right away.

I really wanted to love this dollhouse, and once it's finally assembled it does look charming on my daughter's shelf. The little shuttered windows and scalloped trim are genuinely cute. But good grief, the instructions are basically vague pencil sketches with arrows pointing everywhere. I spent twenty minutes just trying to figure out which side of a wall faced forward. The wood pieces are sturdy enough, but a few panels had rough edges I had to sand down myself so nobody got splinters. I'd say it's decent for the price if you've got patience and a free afternoon, just don't expect a smooth, quick build.

This book is a little shorter than the others, and you can tell. When it was hinted at in one of the previous books that Parker wanted privacy because of his BDSM inclinations, I thought a little more of it would be written in here. Instead there was almost none. Very little romance or sex, because it seemed that the story was more focused on the back story of the mutants, not enough on Parker and Elliott. I still liked it though.

First I'll talk about the set-up process. Mercy, it was a pain! Once I got over the overwhelming amount of pieces and hardware, the set-up started off easily enough. I was fooled into thinking things would go smoothly. That changed quickly. I had a hard time getting many of the little hardware pieces to fit where they were supposed to. It was very frustrating. The worst part, I think, was the sticky paper that was attached to the glass-like plastic shelves. It did not come off easily! I ended up having to buy a bottle of "goo gone" to help get it off, because it looked so horrible. Now to the looks of the final product. I don't really have any complaints. It not overly my style, so it's ended up as a storage shelf in my boys' closet. It's hard black plastic and thick white paper for the most part. It looks like something you'd see in a garage or maybe a dorm room or classroom setting. I think more than anything, it will depend on a person's individual style. Overall, is this something I would recommend to my family and friends? No, unfortunately not. I think there are easier and less expensive options for what it is. Other than the set-up process, though, I don't have any complaints at this point, so I also wouldn't overly NOT recommend it, either.

First impressions are that this computer is FAST. I mainly use this web browsing, and the speed is 10x faster than my old laptop (which was a cheaper $250 version). Opened multiple tabs at once - no issues. Netflix is WAY faster than my old computer too. I have not tried word processing, etc, but I'm sure it will be fine. Google apps are easy to browse/find. I would recommend this to anyone, especially as it is much cheaper than any other option. Update: after about a week, I'm still very pleased with this Chromebook. As some reviewers have said, the display is not that great for watching Netflix (it still streams faster than my previous laptop), but is perfect for web browsing etc. Also, I use a Nike running (GPS) watch that I tried to connect to the Chromebook, but found out there is no app for it:>( But for me, the price, speed, (and hopefully) longevity is worth it.
Nice belt at a nice price. Fits well and the color is good. I plan to buy additional colors.

One Funeral continues on right where No Weddings ends. This time it's in Hannah's point of view. It takes you through Hannah's journey of getting through the pain of what her ex had done to her in the past and re-starts the build up of her relationship with Cade. I tend to not read stories that about ongoing relationships, but something about how this story is written makes me want to hurry up and keep reading to see how it ends. I thought the authors did a tremendous job of completely creating two entirely different characters in Hannah and Cade. Having this story in Hannah's perspective, you feel her vulnerability as she moves through the story, something you don't really get in the first book as Cade doesn't really see her vulnerable side. This entire series is much like the characters' relationship, a nice slow burn that allows the relationship to build in a lasting way. I can't wait to read the third book.

We've had this DVD for over a year now and it's held up great despite regular movie nights and a few accidental drops by the kids. The case got a little scuffed after being tossed in a travel bag, but the disc still plays without a single skip. Picture quality stayed crisp even on our third rewatch. The humor lands better with repeat viewings too. Solid buy if you want something that actually lasts on the shelf.

For under twenty bucks, this remote got my old ceiling fan working again. Pairing took a minute, but it's been reliable since. Feels a little plasticky, but you can't beat the price for bringing a 20-year-old fan back to life.

On the one hand, this one is a "designer" teddy bear, complete with Swarovski eyes, nose, silver heart and silver banner; on the other hand, it's the softest bear you'd ever lay your hands on if the recipient allowed it. I was curious about the hour-long video about the history of the Care Bears as well as the cartoon that has been rediscovered and restored for the first time in several decades. But my 3-year-old grand-daughter had other things in mind than watching historical, or history-making, movies. This Care Bear proved the right companion to get her to bed and end her pestering us for more presents. In short, this aristocratic but convivial Barney might be just as appropriate for a bear-deprived, discerning and appreciative adult as a child. It would probably even make a bear-lover out of Stephen Colbert. Now I'm wishing I'd secretly bought this classy if not classic bear for myself and purchased the less expensive purple Care Bear for my grand-daughter who, none the wiser, would have been none the less content.
Great for my large breed, but wears out faster than I'd hoped.
The quality of the board is okay. This is the set my family had when I was a kid so I went with it.
Works fine, but for installing in a system with onboard LED headers, just buy the LED ribbon segments and save money.
These have held up great after months of near-daily wear, no scuffs or sole separation at all.

Dim light on after unlock and activated the solar light. the light gets brighter when detected motion. Size of the light is 3 inches by 4 inches included 2 screw, can mount with one screw at the center top of light. Price is comparable to similar products.
Catz love it and don't seem to care that they don't quite fit inside

Makes a lot great bubbles with just one blow. Even my 2 year old can do it. The only negative is that the blow stick won't hold in the turtle well so if I allow my toddler to use it all by herself she may lose it inside the cup.

I was surprised by how well this little thing performs. It's compact but casts a warm, even glow across our back patio. Easy to mount and has been totally reliable through rain and wind. Really happy with it.

I've got a heavy-chewing pit mix who demolishes most chews in minutes, but these actually keep him busy. The thickness is what stands out, they're denser and way more substantial than the skinny ones I've grabbed at the local shop. Took him a solid 40 minutes to work through one, and that's basically a record in our house. No weird chemical smell either, which I was bracing for. Just that normal dried meat scent, nothing that stunk up the living room. He was completely engrossed, no pacing or begging for something else to do. I also noticed way less crumbling and flaking as he gnawed, so cleanup was minimal. Definitely ordering again.

Awesome lock and the family loves it. Retrofit into existing deadbolt was able to cover the existing bored hole with a bit of the old boring showing (approx 2 mm). Acceptable but wish I would have installed it on a new slab!
One of my all time favorite TV shows. I love all the characters and their interactions.

Got this doll for my 5-year-old and honestly, for the price it's a steal. The face is adorable and the weight feels just right for little hands. Hair needs a trim out of the box, kinda stiff and sheds a bit, but nothing a quick snip can't fix. Mouth isn't magnetic, which I knew beforehand. Kid's obsessed, so I'm happy.
My neighbor's 4-year-old is obsessed with this. Perfect quiet-time toy for church or waiting rooms. Highly recommend for any toddler parent.

I thought this book was a real page turner. I couldn't put it down until the end. I actually read the French translation First I haven't read many Swedish authors so it was very entertaining to have that perspective instead something centered in the US Second, the title in French is more descriptive "men who hate women". Very strong; a male friend of mine asked "is that possible?" and after reading the book you see why they chose such a strong title. I felt that that the author really thought about the stereotypes that people have against women and he came across was very sensitive. Third, well the book was just well researched and interesting.
Very fun, traditional chick lit. Starts off with a steamy sex scene right at the beginning to hook you in (mmmm....). Will not disappoint Green's avid fans. Definitely recommend.
Nice rods for the price. I pair them with crossfire reels.
My little one lights up every time we bring this toy out. It's held up through drool, drops, and daily play, and the texture keeps her curious. Totally worth it.

Works great for me. I installed it on my savage axis 223 and took less than 2 minutes. It clips onto the sling nob and then tightens down. You tighten it down with a thumb screw, but it also has an option for a Phillips screwdriver if you want it tighter. The legs extend easily and quickly and feel sturdy. Folds up easy and quickly. It has a nice look to it feels strong. The swivel is a nice feature to have, and you can adjust it to make it tighter or looser. I would recommended this item to anyone who is looking for a cheap durable bipod.

Arrived super fast and was packed really securely, no leaks or damage. My first impression was how sleek and lightweight it feels. The bottle itself is great and easy to use one-handed. Only taking off a star because the attached bowl is a bit shallow for my larger dog.
My friends who need comfy all-day boots keep asking where I got these.

I grabbed these on a whim because the listing photos looked nice, but honestly, they're even prettier in person. The sparkle is just right, not too flashy but definitely catches the light. I wore them to a friend's wedding last weekend and got at least five compliments before the ceremony even started. They're super lightweight too, which I didn't expect. Usually anything with this much detail ends up pulling on my lobes after a few hours, but I forgot I had them on all night. The packaging was a nice surprise as well, felt more high-end than what I paid. Already eyeing another pair in silver.

I know this works great for other dogs, but it just didn't work for mine. After weeks of getting him acclimated to the gentle leader inside, giving him lots of treats and attention, he loved it inside, but couldn't handle it on the actual walk. It made his behavior much worse- he would throw temper tantrums and just lie down on the walk, refusing to get up. After many adjustments, he was still able to get the nose part off every time. Maybe it's just the shape of his muzzle. One good thing is that he did walk by my side!

This one grabbed me right from the start and didn't let go. Susanne O'Leary has really outdone herself, the emotional layers here run deep, and the tension between the characters feels incredibly real. There's a rawness to the romance that makes it stand out from lighter reads, and the secrets woven into the plot kept me flipping pages way too late at night. I'd recommend this to anyone who loves women's fiction with a passionate, slightly edgy love story, think fans of Jojo Moyes or Liane Moriarty who want something with more heat. It's also perfect for book clubs that enjoy digging into messy, complicated relationships. Definitely one I'll be gifting to my sister and a few close friends.

My order showed up in two days flat, packed in a simple cardboard box with zero wasted plastic. The silicone mat underneath feels sturdy right out of the package, and the ridges are deeper than I expected, definitely slows my scarf-and-barf cat down. First meal, he actually chewed instead of inhaling, and no cleanup needed afterwards. It's easy to rinse and doesn't slide around on our tile floor. Honestly wish I'd found this thing years ago.
This is a great movie - sub titles, but the acting is excellent. My family really loved it and I've watched it several times. Originally saw it at a movie theater in Santa Barbara, Ca.
Better than I expected for the price, just slightly heavy.
These have held up perfectly after months of daily use, no scratches at all.
Gave us the impetus to get rid of lots of stuff. House is much cleaner now!
My mistake - yet another one where I didn't realize it was a PREVIEW ONLY, not the whole book. It didn't tempt me enough to purchase the real book either.
I couldn't put this down, such a raw, heartfelt peek into her world. It felt like chatting with a friend over coffee.
Great for wiping fingerprint smudges from my iPhone and iPad. I've used this with or without LCD cleaner and it always does a good job. Highly recommended.

I got this hoping to grab my husky mix's attention during her zoomie fits, but she just tilts her head and ignores it completely. It does make a crisp whistle sound, so maybe it'd work better for a smaller, more sensitive breed or basic recall training. For stubborn loud barkers, it's pretty underwhelming.
Easy to use, perfect size for the kids, they loved being able to walk around the yard on them. When going downhill the small size made them easy to control.

We were upgrading the plumbing fixtures in one of our bathrooms, and had noticed how the standard length, 8 inches long, shower arm would permit water dripping onto the shower control knobs,tub spout. and flat edge around the whirlpool bath.. We bought this item, thinking its extra length, coupled with the gooseneck, would potentially solve the driping water problem. The extra length gets whatever dripping 6 inches away from the control handles and tub spout! The "Waterhill" (goose neck) actually helps with prompt turn-off of water, and related "after-drips" which used to occur. It also helped elevate the shower head, offering a "rain shower" option we did not have before. We are very pleased with our purchase and delivery time from Amazon.

Second Coming is sequel to First Fruits - amazing paranormal romance. It is just as great as first book from this series;) Second Coming is more packed with action and magic. Tension was escalating with every single page. Parsley and Jesse were faced with their biggest enemy - Patrick (I wish I could strangle that... *put offensive name*!!!) My heart ached for them and I cheered for them all along. Fortunately they survived and got their happy ending. I guess sometimes love is stronger than any obstacle;) The best part of it was that Parsley wasn't weak damsel in distress. I love when female character is strong-minded and brave! Also I must say that I enjoyed new characters immensely. Eshe and Sib were great additions too the plot:D Plus, of course I cannot leave Felix out! I adore this guy. He makes me laugh every time! Id like to read more about him! (pretty please:D <3) 5/5 stars! Amazing book!

I picked this up on a whim during a sale, and for the price it's an absolute steal. The world-building is surprisingly detailed, and I loved the cultural tidbits woven into the story without slowing the pace. The main characters' constant push and pull felt genuine rather than forced, and their backstories added real depth. The healing creatures were a charming touch I didn't expect. The romance leans sweet, with intimate moments fading out, which worked fine for me. A solid, cozy sci-fi read that delivers way more than what I paid.
Smaller than I thought, but the kids still love it.
So light you forget they're on. Perfect for someone who hates heavy earrings but still wants a cute look.
I like the story very much. It felt almost like a real life story.
Fit like a glove in our 25 year old fishing boat. Took five minutes to swap this out with the bad unit. Came with new gasket and mounting screws, witch was a real plus.

I've always struggled with jeans that look good standing up but turn into a torture device the second I sit down at my desk. These 514s are the first pair where I completely forgot I was wearing denim after hour three of a cross-legged work session. The stretch is subtle, no sagging by lunch, but enough that I can actually crouch down to grab something without holding my breath. I'm 5'10", 175 lbs, and the 32x32 sits perfectly just above my sneakers without bunching. Also, the dark wash has survived four washes now with zero fading. Finally, a jean that gets the balance right between structure and actual human movement.
For the price it's decent, but you'll notice some background hum and the volume jumps way too high at low settings.

I picked this up on a whim during a sale and it's easily the best seven bucks I've spent on a book in ages. The writing has this effortless charm that makes even quiet scenes feel lively and worth savoring. Characters are drawn with such sharp, funny detail that you feel like you're eavesdropping on real people. It's not a thriller with twists around every corner, but the gentle rhythm and wit kept me completely hooked. For the price of a fancy coffee, you get a novel you'll actually want to revisit. Solid, satisfying read that delivers way more than you'd expect.

Wore these maybe six times before the seams started unraveling along the toe. After two washes on gentle, the elastic gave out completely and now they just bunch up inside my shoes. Super disappointing because they felt fine at first. Barely lasted a month, and I'm not even rough on socks. Total waste.

This book is just what I wanted to get a result. The Strategy of the 7 Steps to Succeed in increasing muscle are really simple but very complete. The author has explained in detail how to train both the field of psychology and body. I think to put into practice his advice is easy and effective. Read also carefully Bonus Chapters because they gave me many useful ideas and practical information!

Young ones are crazy about cars. They always want to know more and more and no amount of knowledge seems enough. "The Kurious Kid presents Cars" is a book with all the information your child needs to know about cars. Whether needed for a project or to quench curiosity, this is the book you should get. It contains all the information about cars; what kinds of cars are available and what are their amazing features. It also tells about men who made history in the Car industry. A fascinating book with colorful illustrations, this book will keep the young car lovers hooked till the very end. Easy to understand and fun to read, this book will answer all the questions your child has.
I love how the breathable mesh kept me cool during long summer hikes.
Good Organizer for my bunker gear, fits kind of loose but still works like it needs to.

I've been using this adapter daily for about 4 months now, and it's held up great through a lot of unplugging and travel. No drops or weird disconnects even after being tossed in my bag. Still works like day one, solid little piece of hardware. Definitely built to last.
Watched this three times already and it still holds up. Action scenes hit just as hard, no skips or glitches. Solid disc that's gonna last in my collection.
Bought this for a scout troop. Keeps contents cold and is very durable. It's also large enough to hold most of our food.

I went with the mustard colorway and honestly the lightweight knit is what makes these so good, they breathe way better than I expected. I've worn them barefoot all weekend with zero rubbing. They have that perfect broken-in feel right out of the bag. Just ordered a second pair for my mom.

I bought this rug expecting "good enough for the price" but it's honestly way nicer than I thought. The color is a deep, true navy, not faded or off, and it instantly pulled my son's whole room together. It's soft underfoot, laid flat within a day, and the slight initial smell vanished fast. I wouldn't use it in a hallway, but for a bedroom it's perfect. Really happy with how it turned out.

My Daughter-in-Law loves to take my granddaughter for walks in the state park close to our home. Unfortunately she had a flat tire on her first time out. We ordered the tire liners for the baby carriage tires even though they are designed for a bike. The tire size was the same as a bike tire. The first tire the liner was very easily installed. The second tire was much more difficult to get into place. Over all we are very pleased. No more flats. They really do work.
For the price, this was an absolute steal. The pacing kept me hooked, and I genuinely cared about the characters. Finished it in two sittings and immediately looked up the author's other books.

I wanted to like this squeegee more than I do. The blade itself glides smoothly and leaves zero streaks, which is great. But the plastic handle connection is a real weak point. After about a year of normal use, it started developing a crack right where the handle meets the head. Now it wobbles every time I pull it across the shower door, and I'm just waiting for it to snap completely. The suction hook still works fine, no issues there, but what's the point if the tool itself is falling apart? For the price, I expected it to hold up longer. Disappointing.
It get's crazy to "rate" an item like this. It really either works or it doesn't for the most part. This works fine.

I was walking through the halls of the public library in Cleveland and I found a shelf with all these Roald Dahl books! And then I spotted "Matilda." I've been looking for "Matilda" because my mom had read it and she loved it! My mom is a good judge of books so I wanted to read it. So I checked out the book and ran to the car so I could go to my grandma's house and read it. I had a bursting feeling in side of me. I felt ready to explode! When the car pulled into the driveway and parked, I burst out of the car and ran inside my grandma's house, flopped down on my favorite chair and started reading "Matilda." The character Matilda is a genius girl with idiot parents who are always yelling and raging at her for no reason! With Matilda's magic powers she pays back her parents and has a fun time driving them crazy. But things at school are different. The hated headmistress the Trunchbull is no match for Matilda and her magic powers. Miss Honey has a loving heart and trusts Matilda with her biggest secret. This book is extremely funny and mysterious. After I finished this genius book, and my mom knew I loved it, she got me the movie! The movie is good, but not nearly as good as the book. You should see the movie and read the book! They're both wonderful. -by Eliza (a student in msdu's class)
These are pretty dope and work well to keep water out while swimming

The Dell USB 3.0 Dual Display Universal Dock D1000 is sleek, compact, and works very well. Having used past Dell USB docks, I can say this new model does not come with the compatibility issues of prior versions. The ability to utilize dual displays, plus it's compactness make it a great option on your desk. The D1000 doesn't come with an abundance of ports, but it's does the job. If there were one flaw it might be the ports, but it's hard to fault it with the multiple video outputs, network, audio, and more than enough USB ports. I tested this with two 24" displays. I used multiple computers, including a few different laptops and a Surface Pro 3. This included Windows 7, Windows 8.1 and Windows 10. I had a great experience with all variations. The dock itself is fairly compact and go on top of your desk or on a shelf or other alternative. The great thing about these USB docks versus the old school docks are that you can really place them anywhere and just hook it up to your computer with a USB cable. This version is a winner. Quick, easy, and simple to get going.
This thing glides right through my lab's thick nails without any cracking or splintering.

I've got a reactive rescue who pulls hard out of nowhere, and this thing doesn't flinch. The bright safety green really pops at dusk, cars actually see us now. Love supporting a small US shop too. I'd tell anyone with a strong dog or night walkers to grab one.

I really liked the premise of this book- Noah and Courtney figuring out how much they mean to eachother before it's too late with some interesting twists. I liked it, I just didn't love it. I felt like they should have tried together long before, like they were not super strong characters. Something was missing for me. I took quite a few breaks reading this book. I really wanted to love this, I just didn't. I will definitely give this author another chance, though. The idea was great.
This product has failed after being activated to run my device twice. The product is not a good quality product.

This tablet is fantastic, there is no doubt about it. I have used it daily for a month now. I absolutely love it. Set-up was a breeze, connected to my home wi-fi, synced my mail and calendar, started downloading my favorite apps from the market in minutes. The response is faster than my laptop and blows away my previous Sylvania Tablet. The quality of build on this matches the iPad for a fraction of the price and the screen is just as vibrant. This tablet has exceeded my expectations by a mile.
I got this for my mom who doesn't read much, and now she can't stop listening. Perfect for anyone needing a cheerful escape.

This bidet took less than 10 minutes to install. I've had it installed for a couple of months now and it works great. I was concerned if there would be any leakage around the connector at the main inlet or the product itself, but there's none. The product is high quality and looks great. The only glitch is that my toilet seat is now raised up from the front by about an inch and does not sit flush on the pot rim. (It's a Kohler pot + seat) - This could be due to the design of the toilet seat and the way it locks in. Plan to install this in the other toilets around the house too.

This is a book that not only educates but provides the reader with a new compassion for those who deal with mental illness. Ms. Schiller presents a very complete picture of the sufferings of the mentally ill. From her writing, I gained a new perspective- including greater compassion- for those who are victims of this awful illness. I have only the highest praise for her honesty, her insight and her struggle. She is to be highly commended. A definite read.
Got through it in a day, fast, fun, and totally worth the couple bucks.

The best thing about this book was it's short. This was so silly and predictable I kept thinking I picked up my 8 year old granddaughters book by mistake. Even the lusty stuff seemed juvenile and silly. Lizzy and Diesel reminded me of Joe and Stephine. They were the same characters with the same dynamics. And what was up with the monkey? The cat didn't really add to the story either, I guess another hampster would be all to familiar.

I grabbed this double feature mainly for the Halloween season, and honestly, it's a steal for what you get. Two solid Johnny Depp flicks for less than a single movie ticket? No brainer. Sleepy Hollow alone is worth the price, gorgeous to look at and creepy as all get out, with that perfect Tim Burton vibe. The second film's a nice bonus and rounds out a cozy, spooky movie night without breaking the bank. Picture quality held up fine on my older TV, too. If you're into atmospheric, slightly twisted period pieces and want some easy, affordable entertainment, this set delivers way more than you'd expect for the cost.

I bought this for my Siberian Husky puppy. I LOVE the pink color because it is bright and really stands out in the water. Our pup took to swimming so quickly that we only use this life jacket when we go kayaking. It is so easy to put on and really easy to adjust to a growing dog. I love how i can use the two top straps to pick up my dog and everything stays in place and she isn't uncomfortable. I did a lot of research before buying and I really believe this is the best and most stylish life jacket out there!
This is a much nicer although more expensive desk lamp than the one sold by Taotronics. This metal lamp has a nice quality feel to it. Pay a little more and get this one.

I've had this Centon 64GB card for about three months now, and it's been through some rough handling. I've been using Corsair products for the last 10 years or so, and I've never had one of their products let me down. I've got previous experience with their memory sticks, power supplies, mice, and static pressure fans. None of these products of their that I've used have ever had any issues or have ever stopped working prematurely. With that in mind, these ML120 RGB PWM fans have been working great for me too. I've installed all three fans, along with the Lighting Node module in a Cooler Master Storm Trooper case set up for front to rear airflow. The fans are PWM speed controlled through the header pins on my Asus motherboard with a custom fan speed curve programmed in specific to the individual properties of each fan and mounting location. These fans are providing plenty of airflow in the case and only ramp up to higher speeds that become somewhat audible, under more stressful computer loads. The majority of the time they run at reduced RPM's that are virtually inaudible compared to the rest of the ambient room noise. Never once has their airflow become inadequate, not even in an 85F ambient temperature room. The iCUE software that controls that lighting features of these RGB fans allows them to be set up for a myriad of different color combinations, including dynamically changing colors based on what software is being run or games being played. The software has a small learning curve in order to get the most out of the features, and feature packed it is. Overall these are excellent fans with more than adequate airflow for my needs, and they add a lot of visual pizazz too. Visitors always stop and comment on the colorful light show these case fans provide.

I love the concept. I found some of the stories more engaging than others. The problem with short stories is that there's sometimes not enough time to care about the characters and really feel their despair and visceral urge for revenge. "Until Death Do Us Part" was most effective, because everybody can empathize with a bride on her wedding day. The BPD reception was something I'll never forget! Probably everyone can relate to the road rage sketch and will enjoy living vicariously (and laughing in shock) through the fantasy. "The Proposal" was a little too long--the least satisfying and most boring of the tales. Revolved mostly around greed and entitlement, which don't interest me. "Pasternak" was interesting but too unlikely to make a serious impact (no pun intended). "Rats" was pretty good. The one about the demolition guy was okay. Honestly, I might give this 3.5 stars. But I'm not at all sorry I rented it.

This is one of those marriages of convenience, a trope I often like. The hero is turned off women, resenting his mother and all the shallow, greedy women of the ton she tries to marry him off to. The heroine is distrustful of men because of having the most horrendous, abusive father you could ever imagine. A father who's arranging her marriage to an older ship captain and white slaver, who equals or surpasses the father in horrendous behavior. She runs away from home to escape marriage and he runs away from London, basically for the same reason, except in his case he wasn't really in any desperate situation. Well, you know what will happen by reading the blurb but not exactly all the particulars, some of which are fun and interesting. No real unicorn here, of course, but the symbolism plays a part in the story. There are also some entertaining secondary characters, although nobody is drawn with much dimension. However, this is not Chater's best work. I did not like the hero much. Too immature, too erratically friendly and then cold and almost mean to the heroine. Still, the writing is good. Chater knows her way around words and sentences, but I have to like the hero in my romance to be completely satisfied.
