The Sherwood sounds at least as good as my Sony STR-DG720 in stereo mode and is probably more powerful. I use this receiver with an HDTV, cd changer, and turntable. I purchased a second Sherwood RX-4109 for about $90 with tax from electronics expo a couple of months ago. I notice a very quiet hum from the speakers when the receiver is powered up and no signal is sent. Once I press play on the CD player the hum disappears and can only be heard at extreme low volume. It does not bother me as this is not my primary listening system. The first receiver from Sherwood I purchased probably does the same thing, I just newer noticed. Does not change my opinion of the product because of the price, power, and excellent am/fm tuner.

The motion sensor works fine, but the mounting bracket is flimsy plastic. I barely tightened the screws and it cracked. Now it hangs crooked above my garage door. Light output is okay for a porch, but the cheap hardware ruins it.

This is a great device. I use it at ballgames because of the FM radio and the fact that it fits comfortably in my pocket. The videos play well and the available storage and SD card slot means I have plenty of ways to carry my picture along to share. The ear buds have a great sound because of the X-FI technology. I have been very pleased with this and all of the products I have purchased from Creative. Creative is a very economical alternative to the I-pod.
These really hold up better than I expected, even after weeks of daily wear.
Just imagine the cheapest worst socks you had ever own and these are equivalent to third worst.
My nephew has been rough with this thing for weeks and it's still going strong. The lights still work perfectly and it's become his favorite toy.
This is yet another Gooby harness that I bought after carefully measuring my dog and consulting the size chart, that just doesn't fit.

I bought this for my elderly mom who struggles with small buttons, and she loves it. The display is crisp and easy to read across the room. Highly recommend for anyone wanting a simple, reliable alarm without fussy features.

I've been dealing with heel pain for months and was hunting for something supportive that didn't cost a fortune. For the price point, these sandals are a steal. The contoured footbed gives my arches actual relief, and I didn't need a break-in period at all. My only real gripe is the width. I usually wear a regular medium and these have a generous fit through the forefoot. The adjustable straps help, but I can see them being too roomy if you have truly narrow feet. Still, the cushioning and overall comfort make them worth it for everyday wear. I'd buy them again just for the value alone.
After 6 games, these are still in tact and working fine. Pleased so far.

Came quickly and its has no arch in the shoe so it perfect for me. got 13 EE a little narrow but over all awesome I wear them all day with no pain. also I have had these shoes for 6 months now wearing them as a my everything shoe work, fishing, hiking shopping with the wife and they are still holding up!

Just grabbed this combo for a shed project and honestly, I was a little nervous about the refurbished label. Box showed up two days early, packed tight, everything in molded foam, zero rattling around. Pulled it all out and I swear it looked unopened. Not a scuff, scratch, or speck of dust on any of the tools. Batteries even had that fresh-out-of-the-plastic smell. The inspection stickers were the only clue it wasn't straight off a retail shelf. Popped a battery on and it fired right up with a full charge. Super impressed with how carefully it was put together for shipping. If this is what "refurbished" means, I'm never paying full price again.
Really impressed by the grind power, it chews through tough scraps without a hitch, and the compact design freed up tons of space under the sink.
Daughter loved her gift this year, sparkle uggs. There not only cute but they are warm as well. I wish Santa brought me a pair of Uggs.
Arrived in a sturdy box with zero damage. Took it out, slipped it right on my pup, and he didn't fuss one bit. Feels well-made and looks great.

I enjoyed watching Valentina and Cesar reunite and discover one another all over again. Both characters drew me in and made me want to see them happily together. I loved how Cesar treated Valentina with respect and defended her when she needed it. I struggled to believe that after waiting so long to find each other they couldn't be a bit more patient with one another as they tried to establish their relationship. Perhaps because it's a novella rather than a full length story. Still, I loved both characters and want to see their story go on.

I've had this cooler for a little over a year now, mostly using it for tailgates and longer beach days. The plastic shell has held up well against sun and being dragged across sand, no cracks or warping so far. The hinges and latch still feel solid, which was a nice surprise given how much I open and close it. I did notice a few scuffs on the corners after a camping trip where it got knocked around, but nothing that affected performance. Ice retention is decent, usually keeps drinks cold for a solid couple days if I pre-chill everything. The drain plug hasn't leaked on me yet either. Only minor gripe is the handle can pinch your fingers if you're not careful. For the price, it's been a reliable workhorse.

I've listened to this CD a handful of times over the last couple months, and it holds up fine, no skips or case cracks so far. The disc itself seems sturdy enough for casual replay. Performance-wise, it's decent background listening, but it didn't leave much of an impression after repeated spins. Not sorry I grabbed it, but the novelty wore off quicker than I expected.

The negative reviews by the critics must be by women who have not reached the age of 50 yet. Berg put in words so many of the feelings and thoughts I have been having since I left my 40's. Each new chapter bought with it tears and joy of recognition and aha moments. She has now become my favorite author beating out She's Come Undone by Wally Lamb which has been my standing favorite for years. I would like to thank the author for making me feel less alone on my journey. I will re-read the book each year I'm sure and buy copies for the all the women in my life.
I love this tool for a quick way to put some juliene carrots, jicama and zuchinni in my salads. When this blade gets too dull to do the job, I will most certainly buy another.

I bought this after doing a deep dive on litter ingredients, and I'm mostly pleased. It's not perfect, tracking is still a thing, and it doesn't clump as hard as the clay I used to use, so you have to scoop a bit more carefully. But knowing there's no silica dust in the air when I pour it gives me real peace of mind. The natural scent is mild, not that fake perfume overload, and odor control holds up decently for about a week before I need a full change. For an organic option, it exceeded my expectations in daily use, though the price stings a little. I'll keep buying it because the trade-off feels worth it.
Waited ages for this thing and it's just flimsy plastic junk.
Exactly what I hoped for, comfortable, secure hold and simple install.
My dogs were intrigued and it kept them busy for a while. The plastic feels durable and rinsing it out is super simple. Flipping happens occasionally.

I honestly wasn't expecting much for the money, but this thing throws a ton of light across my whole workbench. Stuck it up in ten minutes and it's way brighter than the old fluorescent tube I had. No flickering or weird color shifts either. Seriously impressed with how clean and consistent the light output is.
Book arrived fast and in perfect condition, but the story itself just didn't hook me, felt rushed and the characters never really came alive.

This is SO lightweight--it's a pleasure to lift. A friend tried this litter and found her cats walked around the house with it stuck to their feet. While all litter sticks to feet, this is light enough to make the trek much farther from the litter box. My experience has been fine though. My cats don't care about it, they just use it. They DO seem to be able to 'toss' if farther when there's a lot of vigorous digging. The scent is just fine (I've read all the reviews about stinky litter and it smells the same to me as other Tidy Cats products.) My only problem is the cost (4 stars). It's litter. It gets pooped and peed in and then I toss it. I don't see the purpose of spending the money on this--UNLESS you have trouble lifting the litter and it's either expensive (light) litter or no cat! THEN I say, this does the job, AND it's light! Keep your cat!
Very well made. Nice lens and large. Light weight also. Tongue on the lizard/snake won't come off too easy.
I use these these in my church, and they work great and have a great range

I'll admit, the first few chapters were slow for me too, but once the story found its rhythm, I was completely hooked. Liz Curtis Higgs brings 18th-century Scotland to life with such warmth and detail that I felt like I was walking the muddy roads right beside Elisabeth and Marjory. The way she weaves the biblical Ruth narrative into this rich historical setting is masterful, it never feels forced, just deeply human and redemptive. I'd hand this to anyone who loves character-driven historical fiction, especially fans of Francine Rivers or those who appreciate a tender, slow-burn romance built on integrity rather than flash. It's also a beautiful choice for a book club, so much to discuss about loyalty, loss, and second chances. Truly a gem.
The pieces have a nice soft-click fit and the colors are so vibrant and clear.

Prior to watching I didn't see how this movie could be better than the first or how the story line would be. Have to say, great movie! I watched this with my 7 year old and we both loved it. This movie is very kid friendly but adults can enjoy it too. We were smiling and laughing from beginning to end. I think that this movie was better than the first and would recommend to anyone who has younger children but enjoys watching animation movies themselves. Would be a great movie for a family night! Enjoy.

For a free novella, this was a real steal. The pacing kept me hooked, and the emotional payoff at the end was worth more than I paid. A couple minor typos pulled me out, but I'd happily read more from this author.
Bought the adapter to go with my extra charging cable. Worked well with Samsung cable.

Arrived super fast and the box was pristine, no dents or cracks at all. Unwrapping it felt solid right away, sturdy but not too heavy. The light blue color looks even better in person. The removable food/water dish on top is a nice touch, and the waste tray already gives me peace of mind for longer drives with my anxious cat. Really happy with this purchase.
The divided compartments are genius, my brushes finally stand upright without flopping over. It fits perfectly on my narrow vanity shelf and still holds all my daily essentials.

Got these for my nephew's birthday and they arrived a day early, which was a nice surprise. Box was packed really well, no dents or crushed corners, everything inside was pristine. First thing I noticed when we opened it was how vibrant the colors are on the pre-cut characters, and the 3D backdrop actually feels sturdy, not like some flimsy cardboard afterthought. My nephew immediately grabbed the Michelangelo sheet and got to work while I set up the play scene. The whole kit just feels thoughtfully put together, and watching him color and then place his creations into the little cityscape was genuinely cool. Big hit right out of the box.

I was a little worried after seeing some complaints about the air seal, but honestly mine has been rock solid since day one. I think the trick is to really crank the cap down and give the gasket a tiny dab of silicone grease now and then. What really sold me is the spray nozzle, it's perfect for rinsing off sandy feet or muddy gear without wasting a ton of water. I use it mostly for beach days and dusty trailhead cleanups, and the pressure stays consistent for hours. Makes washing off way less of a chore. Super happy with this thing.
I love the Xmen movies, and this one didn't disappoint!!!!! I have already watched it 3 times

Went in expecting a fluffy rom-com but got a surprisingly sharp, laugh-out-loud take on dating dynamics instead. It pokes fun without being mean, and the chemistry between the leads feels way more genuine than most movies in this genre. Ended up rewatching it the same night.

I went in expecting a funny memoir, but this book absolutely wrecked me in the best way. Lawson's bizarre childhood and brutally honest take on anxiety felt way more relatable than I anticipated. I laughed so hard I cried, then just straight-up cried. It's way deeper and weirder than the cover lets on.

I grabbed these for work and honestly didn't expect much at this price point. Turned out to be a steal. The cushioning is surprisingly solid, like walking on padded mats all day. They hug my feet just right, and after a week they've softened up perfectly. For what I paid, the build feels way more expensive. Definitely grabbing another pair.

I was honestly shocked how creamy the mango-strawberry combo turned out, no weird icy texture at all. The chute handled frozen chunks without jamming, which was my biggest worry. Cleanup takes maybe 30 seconds under running water. My kids now beg for "nice cream" after school and I feel zero guilt saying yes. Only tip: let stuff sit on the counter about 15 minutes so it feeds through smoothly.
For the cost, these headphones are a steal. The sound is crisp and the bass punches way above their price tag.
Perfect for tall guys like me, finally, shorts that hit right above the knee without riding up.
This was an okay read for a short story. I did enjoy the suspense.

I grabbed a couple of these to fix some erosion near the downspouts. For the low cost, I wasn't expecting much, but they sit flush, look decent, and do the job. Solid little workhorses that won't break the bank.

I really enjoyed the way the author balanced the suspense plot with the emotional growth between the main characters. The mystery of the killer's identity kept me guessing, but what stood out most was how Jaxon's patience and firmness helped Kate explore her limits in a way that felt believable and tender. Some of the club scenes were written with a lot of heat, but I especially liked the quieter moments where Kate wrestled with her own fears about vulnerability. I did wish the pacing in the middle dragged just a bit, and a couple side characters felt underused. Still, the chemistry between Kate and Jaxon is electric, and I'm already reaching for the next book to see how their dynamic evolves when the case finally breaks open.

I've had this watch for a few weeks now and honestly love it more each day. The overall feel is surprisingly lightweight, which makes it super comfortable for all-day wear. I'm pretty pale and was worried the band might wash me out, but the soft pinkish tone actually blends beautifully and looks really elegant. The sparkle around the edge catches light without being flashy, so it works for both work and going out. I've gotten a handful of compliments already from people who assumed it cost way more. The size is perfect for my wrist, noticeable but not chunky. Packaging was nice too, felt like a little treat opening it. Overall, a fantastic purchase that feels much more premium than the price suggests.

I got it because it has a magnetic end. Which is strong and holds on to the piece of metal that you want to hang on the wall. Well built and withstands drops from a couple of feet. Would i buy it again? yes... but i would buy the same generic china made one that is exactly the same at half the price. Edit: middle bubble it doesn't really give an accurate reading. Half of the liquid is gone:/ kinda worthless just to use the level vertically only.

I live in California and earth quakes can be a bit of a problem so having water in a bag is pretty good for an emergency. I keep some in my bug out bag, and in my car. I have never tasted the water inside so I can't say how it tastes, but in an emergency who cares how it tastes?
Perfect for anyone who loves fast-paced thrillers with unforgettable characters, I already told my book club to read it.

Set this up on my Trek hybrid for daily commuting, and the cadence tracking is what really sold me. No dropouts, no lag, just clean, steady data straight to my bike computer. The silicone band mounting felt secure without any tools, and I didn't have to fuss with zip ties. Getting the magnet aligned on the crank arm took a minute, but once I heard that satisfying little click from the sensor light, it's been rock solid through rain, gravel, and potholes. Battery life seems great so far too. Honestly, for the price, the responsiveness beats some much pricier units I've tried. Makes interval training way more effective when you can actually trust the numbers.

I expected a decent concert film, but this blew me away. The sound mix is so crisp you feel like you're right there. Every performance has a raw, spontaneous energy that keeps me hitting replay late into the night.

I've been running this lubricant stick on my 14-inch bandsaw for months now while resawing hard maple and walnut, and it's held up way better than I expected. I was worried it would melt away fast under heavy use, but I only need a quick touch-up every few boards. It seriously cuts down on blade drag and pitch buildup, my cuts stay clean without that burning smell I used to fight constantly. One stick lasted me through a whole batch of cutting boards and some furniture legs, so the durability is solid for the price. Just press it lightly against the running blade, and you're back to smooth cutting. Huge difference in motor strain too. Definitely grabbing another one when this finally runs out.

Other than being made in Chain, but what isn't these days, this is a great pouch. Hold my two Beretta 92fs mags and they fit great. Might even be able to fit 2 single stack in one side, but I don't have those so I won't be trying it. As for concealment. These weren't meant to be concealed carry pouches. Nothing with ALICE clips is. They stick out too far.

I installed the newest firmware, and DVDs still appear very pixellated. I can watch the same DVDs on my X-Box and they are MUCH clearer. I have both players connected by component cables, but I tried with basic RCA video on a non-HDTV and the pixellation was still horribly apparent. It does play a lot of formats, but I've found that Divx or Xvid usually looks better if I convert it to a DVD using dvdSanta and watch it on the X-box. For your video files not worth a whole dvd, or to fit over 30 hours of 256k quality MP3s on one DVD, it does the job. Maybe with firmware it will get better. Also, its goes real jittery and even the menus flicker spastically if in progressive scan mode. The web site suggests turning off progressive scan mode, yet this is still advertised and labeled as a progressive scan player. Play a lot of stuff for cheap, but it shows. Especially DVDs.... I thought if nothing else DVDs would look good on a Philips player. They look better on my friend's Apex which is cheaper.
This is a great quality product and fits in nicely with our kitchen. It's a sturdy product that holds a ton of stuff and does the job! Would recommend.

I bought this hoping for a thoughtful historical analysis, but what I got was a rambling, bitter pamphlet. The writing is so dense with resentment it's hard to follow any coherent argument. Every chapter circles back to the same vague grievances without offering evidence or nuance. It felt less like reading a book and more like being cornered by someone at a party who won't stop monologuing. I kept waiting for a balanced perspective or at least some engaging storytelling, but it never arrived. The tone is exhausting, and by the halfway point I was just skimming to see if it ever improved. It didn't. I honestly regret the time I spent on this and can't recommend it to anyone looking for serious nonfiction.

I have two of these for my Dachshunds. Dachshunds can be hard to fit due to their super deep chest and tapered neck, but these harnesses fit great. The harnesses are durable, easy to clean (throw them in the washer), are made of good materials, and are expertly made. Very good quality.
Not bad for the price, but the fit runs small for the cost.

The blanket is a perfect size for a crate blanket or dog bed. It's exactly what I wanted. I ordered 2 of the black ones. I would have given 5 stars BUT one of the blankets was packaged wet. When I opened the plastic bag that was sealed and got the blanket out, the cardboard sleeve around the blanket was damp. The blanket was damp too. My first thought was OMG, it's used and it was pet urine! I did a sniff test and I didn't smell anything foul. I decided to keep the blankets since there was no defects other than the damp one. I am washing them really good to be on the safe side. I want to add, there was no sign of water damage to the Amazon box upon arrival. The other blanket was dry and the plastic bag the wet blanket was in was dry. ONLY the blanket inside the bag was wet. This is a good indication it was packaged wet and shipped to me.
I can wear light socks with them wishing I got the 10.
Got this for my home office setup and it's flawless on a 1440p ultrawide. No flicker, plug-and-play. Perfect for anyone upgrading to a multi-monitor workstation.
Perfect for my kayak, simple to mount, bright enough for dusk paddles, and totally waterproof. I'd recommend it to any small-craft owner.

I've had this on my beagle for about eight months now, and it still looks nearly new. We hike a few times a week through brush and mud, and the stitching hasn't frayed at all. Buckles stay put, fabric hasn't stretched out, and it handles the washer with zero issues. Solid piece of gear.

words cannot describe this anime, I watched it in Japanese first ages ago and I just had to have it. Have watched another 5 times and still cannot get over it. this show has been ratted one of the best and it is for a reason, I highly recommend it.
Got this for under ten bucks and it was worth every penny. Palance is pure gold here.
I have two pairs of these and will probably buy a third. About the best running socks I've found.

Unfortunately, my 5 cats only found them fun for about 5 minutes. I now put them in a bag with some Kong catnip and bring new ones out about once a week for something different. They have lasted a good while, but they don't play with them much once the catnip smell is gone.

This book is unusual to say the least. The beginning keeps you guessing for a while as strange events start to happen to Evie. You start to get little hints about what is happening until your teased with thoughts of the greek gods. What happens when the gods are threatened? well there is an unusual theory in this book. My curiosity kept me going and by the end I found myself really interested in what was going to happen to poor Evie. Is she going to make it? Will she come to terms with what is happening to her or will her mortal body fail? I guess I'm going to have to find out lol. There is explicit adult content and violence.

I like that these don't burn really quickly and the price was decent for the quantity (and array of colors) that I received. My only complaint is that they're still a little large for my chime holders so I gotta twist them in a bit.
The dual-burner setup let me boil coffee water while frying eggs at the same time, no more waiting around. Super sturdy build too, held my cast iron without a wobble.
The acting in this movie is 2nd to none. One of the top movies I own
Wore this through a brutal New England winter, and it's still flawless. Zippers, seams, all solid. No wear at all after months. Warm, sleek, and built to last.

I was honestly a little skeptical dropping this kind of cash on a bat, but after a full season of league play and countless BP sessions, this thing is a tank. The pop off the barrel is immediate and satisfying, with zero dead spots. I've put some serious mileage on it and the grain is holding up way better than any ash bat I've owned. For the price, you're getting elite durability and performance that easily rivals bats costing twice as much. Hands down the best value wood bat I've ever swung.

I hate getting sweat in my eyes while running and biking, so I am always looking for a good solution. I had the Halo headband for two years and it worked okay in mild weather (70s), but in the middle of summer (high 80s and 90s) it would soak through quickly and let sweat in my eyes and down my nose. I finally got sick of it and found this. I like the idea, it looks stupid on me, but if it keeps the sweat out, great! It does, but the little hair tie looking things that come with it to size it are too different. The smallest one is tiny while the next size up is nearly four times the circumference. If I put the smaller one one it squeezes my head and make my forehead look purple, if I use the next size up it constantly slips down my head and lets sweat through (although less than a saturated Halo did). I am going to look around to see if I can find other options the little circular connectors. I love the concept of it and if I could get a good fit, I think it would be perfect.
My girl chichi likes it I actually put it inside her house....it's her call and so far so good!

I haven't had the chance to use it yet but upon first look it appears to be a very good case. It holds my mini-14 and my scoped Henry very well. It has two interior Velcro sealed pistol slots and I think the rucksack style shoulder harness will be very handy. Very nice product for the price.
I love readin this author and the story telling is great but I really wanted more Christmas stories but still gave it a five star rating.

My kid loves Wow Wow Wubbzy, and this plush has held up really well after a few months of rough play. Stitching is still intact, no loose seams, and it washes fine. Just not quite as exciting as expected.
Unimpressive. I thought "racers" would move a little better b
This table is gorgeous! Easy to put together and perfect if you have young kids as the edges are rounded! Its easy to clean and easy to get under with a vacuum!
It's even snappier than I hoped, plugged straight into my router and it just flies.

These containers are a solid buy for the money. The seal is seriously strong, I've tipped over a full one of chili and nothing spilled. My only gripe is the set skews toward smaller sizes. I meal prep a lot of lunches and really just wanted more of the deeper ones. Still, no leaks and they stack neatly.
We've had this for over six months and it still looks brand new. My three kids are rough on it daily but it hasn't cracked or bent at all. Honestly surprised how tough it is for the price.
Wasn't sure a yoga DVD could actually fix my stiff lower back, but it's been way more effective than I expected.

Seemed like a good value, but a couple of the packages had either old or defective batteries in them. Not sure I would order this brand again. In a home where there are three hearing aides, it's important to know the batteries on hand work.

This thing gets the job done, but it's not exactly a joy to use. I made cookie dough and it required more elbow grease than I planned. Feels a bit flimsy overall, though it held up fine. Decent for the price, just manage your expectations.

I purchased this for my son in Alaska. So many places will not ship to Alaska. My son said since he seasoned it, it has been great for taking it camping and for use at home. I would recommend this company and this product.

My GSD mix can demolish a standard tennis ball in under two minutes flat, so I was skeptical about these. The squeaker is what really sets them apart, it's obnoxiously loud in the best way and keeps her engaged way longer than any silent toy ever has. She's been working on the same two balls for three weeks now, and while they're definitely scuffed up, neither has split open or lost its squeak. I appreciate that they have just enough give to satisfy her chomping instinct without falling apart. Fetch sessions in the backyard have gotten way more entertaining. If you've got a power chewer who lives for auditory feedback, these are absolutely worth grabbing.

Super cute luggage for a weekend or overnight! Was not expecting this to be as nice but as described and delivered as promised! Purchased for a teen for those weekend trips! the smaller bag is larger than I expected and very roomy! Well worth the price! Very pleased! would buy again!!
In away I did like the story but it was just a little to short for my liking but the story line was good

Bought this on a whim for family movie night and we were all hooked. The humor is warm and the lead performances are so genuine. I'd recommend it to anyone who loves feel-good British comedies with a lot of heart, perfect for a cozy evening in.
I actually look forward to the lasagna after a long hike, it's that good.

I would give zero stars if I could. I put the collar on my cat leaving a finger width as suggested. 4 days later he looked as if he was having a seizure! Somehow the collar stretched out and became lodged in his mouth, and he was choking. I had to restrain him and cut the collar off. If I wasn't at home he would have died. Not worth it.

The work light work OK so far. It charges via USB charger (they include both wall and car chargers). The charging port does not have a cover, so I am afraid it will get dirty or wet and it will prove fatal for the light. The three moving lights can either be folded along the main body of the flashlight, or they can be spread out, but they cannot be brought up more than 90 degrees to the surface and cannot concentrate all four lights on one spot. I found it irritating, especially in tight spaces, where it would be nice to fold one of the sides more to the center to fit in a light corner. The magnet is strong enough to hold the flashlight horizontally, but just barely - it is very easy to knock it down. The battery life was relatively good so far, and it charges rather fast, too. When the battery gets low, it turns off without any notice. You can turn it on again for a few seconds to find a charger. It does not charge and light up at the same time - if you plug it in and turn on, it will not be charging at all. Empty battery will stay empty battery. The most irritating thing is that it has one button for multiple modes. When you first turn it on, it only lights up the end, as a regular flashlight. But when you are done, and want to turn it off and press the button, it lights up the three sides, effectively blinding you, unless you unfold the sides and direct them away. It needs on power button and one mode button.
I didn't see size options when I ordered, so the one i received was too large but seemed to get the job done. The zipper can snag a little but otherwise no complaints.
Bought this for my niece and she plays with it nonstop, worth every penny.
Bought this a couple months ago and it's held up really well even with my two rambunctious cats knocking it around. Still looks new and works just as good as day one.
Wasn't expecting much for the price, but it's surprisingly soft and hasn't shrunk yet.

I so enjoyed the main characters of girl and dragons. Their relationships and details of their colorful world and interrelationships was described clearly in spite of being very complex. If you like dragons, you'll enjoy the book. I'm off to buy the second book now.

I've read this three times now over six months and it hits just as hard each time. The pacing holds up, the tension still gets me, and I notice new layers in the quiet moments. No frayed edges in the storytelling, it's built to last. Easily one of my all-time favorites.
I didn't expect much but this bowl really won over my fussy eater, he's actually finishing meals now and the wide rim keeps mess to a minimum.

Love the sarcasm and banter between Blake and Jennifer. However, I could done with less of her dramatics. Blake has shown time and again that he deserved the good benefit of doubt of his love for Jennifer. Because love is a powerful emotion that wins every time.
So cute can't wait for my dogs to wear them for Christmas!
After trying a few mounts that rattled loose, this one stayed rock solid through a full day at the range. Super simple install too.
For under twenty bucks, this thing synced right up and handles both doors like a champ. Total steal.

Macaulay is the master of simplifying complex topics. He's easy to follow, extremely well illustrated, and gripping -- which is a lot to be said for an historic architecture series! If you like to know how things work, buy any of his books.
also for Charlotte who loves Winnie the Pooh.....this is her 'owl'
Entertaining but different; Amy Adams does a very good job, can't believe Reese was offered the role too.
Lasted a whole season of hikes, still feels solid.

I have cats on a pure raw diet who refuse to eat any dry or canned products. Since I live in a hurricane prone area, and this product does not require refrigeration I keep large bags on hand in the event I should lose power a few days or more. Water can also be added to simulate raw chicken they are used to eating.
We've had this mat for about two months and the edges are already peeling up from regular crawling. It looked great at first but doesn't hold up well to daily toddler wear on our tile.
The British TV series Midsomer Murders is difficult to top in terms of characters, plot and setting. It is simply wonderful entertainment.

I grabbed these on a whim after my usual denim started feeling way too snug, and honestly, I'm so glad I did. The fabric has just the right amount of give without losing its shape halfway through the day. They hit at exactly the right spot on my ankle, which is a win since I'm kind of in-between heights. No awkward bunching or weird gapping at the waist either. I've worn them for long workdays and lazy weekends, and they've held up beautifully through washes. Went with my usual size based on the chart and was braced for it to be a little snug through the shoulders, but this thing has a relaxed, almost slouchy fit that surprised me in the best way. The fabric is soft without feeling flimsy, and it layers nicely over a hoodie without pulling across the back. I actually expected the sleeves to hit right at my wrist, but they have an extra inch or so that works well when I'm reaching or driving. Zippers feel solid, pockets are deep enough to actually hold my phone and keys. For the price I snagged it, this was a steal. For under ten bucks, this was a solid blind buy. The visuals feel properly vast and strange, and I respect how it doesn't hold your hand. Got this for my 7-year-old's birthday, and four months later this little guy is still going strong despite being dropped down the stairs twice and accidentally left out in the rain once. Used it yesterday when two big dogs sprinted out from a barn; one quick blast and they stopped dead, completely confused. It's lightweight, mounts clean on my handlebars, and the trigger is easy to reach without fumbling. I'd recommend this to any cyclist, runner, or even walkers in rural or suburban areas where you might need a serious attention-getter. Absolute peace of mind.

Director Joe Johnston's fantastic love letter to the Universal classic also serves as a tribute to the legendary Gothic Hammer horror films of the 1950's & 1970's. For anyone that's a fan of this particular genre of movie will agree that it's about time that this franchise got its definitive story adapted for the big screen. And now armed with a proper budget & a star studded cast, The Wolfman really deserves no less. This ambitious movie share's a visceral mix of avant-garde elegance with Gothic horror, & suspense that sometimes accomplishes all of these goals in just one scene alone. So really this is a long awaited & real accomplishment in sophisticated horror cinema. Unfortunately the downside to the dvd release is that there's no behind the scenes special or "making of" documentary outside of the basic deleted scenes. Other than that it's one of the best films of 2010.

We have 4 cats. They all seem to love this litter. They go in, dig around awhile, do their duty and then they spend a more than usual time scratching around in the litter box before they exit. We, at first, though that it was because they were having a difficult time covering up their duty with the light litter. We were wrong. We have two litter boxes downstairs (and two upstairs) sitting side-by-side so we performed an experiment on the two downstairs litters. We put light litter in the left hand box and clay litter in the right. In the morning we filled one litter with their usual clay based litter and one with this light litter. The cats used them all day. At the end of the first day the box with the light litter was used about 30% more than the clay. On the second day the light litter box was use almost exclusively. There were only a couple of pee clumps in the clay litter. On the third day we reversed the positions of the two litter boxes. Now they were clay left and light right. Only the right box (light litter) was used all day. The clay litter box was clean! Both upstairs clay litter boxes were pretty much unused except for some pee. I have since seen the cats standing in line waiting to use the light litter box while the clay litter box was being left unused and completely vacant. Darndest thing I've ever seen. Now we're putting clay in the bottom and light on top until the clay is gone. From then on, light litter ONLY. Oh yeah, the light litter does not track-out on the cat's paws and then onto the floor nearly as much as the clay litter. This makes my wife very happy.

Though the simplicity of the sump pump attachment surprised me, it was none-the-less very sturdy and worked well, so I placed it intentionally low in the sump so it would sound off just before the pump would activate - and it did. There's a nice table spot and lots of chairs. 7/10 Awesome V Tanaka The best match on the DVD. 2 tables break and lots of chairs are used! There are some good bumps and lots of high-flying moves too. I was surprised at how good this was. 8/10 Barbed wire Match Raven V Sandman It's bloody, brutal and lots of tables break. Also, it was paced a bit too slowly. 7/10 Dudleys V Spike & Balls This was pretty good, but I expected more. Spike jumps off a high ladder at the start, which is cool. Also he gets put through a flaming table, which is pretty good. 7/10 Eliminators V Williams & Gordy This match was only on the DVD for the end elbow drop. I thought it would be more hardcore actually, although there are some good spots. They use tables and chairs. 7/10 Dreamer & Beulah V Douglas & Francine I don't know why this was on the DVD. STORY: Glenn Ford stars as the rancher Smith, who is driving his family to frustration with his gentle procrastinating ways that have kept the farm from doing well. The hay needs to be cut, and he is distracted with his ongoing friendships with a local Nez Perce Native American tribe. When a tribal member is wrongly accused of murder, Smith comes to his defense. As a sign of the tribe's gratitude, they help train a horse from the ranch, and they help get the hay crop in on time. BEHIND THE SCENES: Live action Disney classic. Keenan Wynn, Nancy Olson, and Chief Dan George also star in this movie, and a good song written by Bobby Russell for the movie is featured, "The Ballad of Smith and Gabriel Jimmyboy". While production was started initially by James Algar, Bill Anderson took over as producer fairly early. One of the studios greatest producers, Anderson saw the fim as a chance to appeal to a more mature audience that a typical Disney film, vital to Disney's growth. Directed by Michael O'Herlihy. The story had been adapted by studio staff storyman Louis Pelletier from a book by Paul St. Pierre titled, "Breaking Smith's Quarter Horse". This movie was released to theaters on March 21, 1969, and was released on video in 1987. It never featured on "The Wonderful World of Disney" television show. It is 102 minutes in length. Released almost two years after Walt's death, this film was almost unseen by the public since a top studio executive hated the film based on only a few scenes. He cut all funding for promotion of the film so there was no audience waiting to see it. Even a good review in the LA Times did not help bring the viewers in and it was out of theaters before the word of mouth could send in the crowds. I recommend this hidden little film from the Disney vault.

I've had these little speakers on my desk for about eight months now, and I'm honestly surprised they've held up so well. I bump them around a lot when I'm cleaning or rearranging cables, and they've taken a few accidental knocks off the edge of the shelf without a scratch or any change in sound. They're not going to fill a room with deep, rich audio, but for video calls, podcasts, and casual Spotify during work, they do the job perfectly. I did notice the low end is pretty weak, so don't expect much thump, but the mids are clear enough for voice. For the size and price, I'm impressed with how sturdy they feel after daily use. I needed a new headlamp to replace one from a big box store which broke easily. I chose this one because it has a separate switch for the red light. I am an amateur astronomer, and I use a red light when I am observing to protect my night vision when reading star maps and eyepiece focal lengths. It takes about 30 mins for your eyes to become dark-adapted, and thus able to see very faint deep sky objects. A flash of white light ruins night vision for another 20-30 mins, and my previous headlamp had to cycle through 3 white light settings just to get to red, and this was a nuisance to me and anyone who was observing with me. THIS headlamp allows me to switch on the red light without any possibility of turning on the white light, and I liked it so much that I purchased a second one for my wife. Enough about red light, now I'll tell you what I like about the white light. I had to do some work in the attic, and I used this headlamp to see what I was doing in the dark attic. It starts of with the brightest white light setting at first one when you press the white light switch. If you quickly press the switch again it goes to a dimmer setting for longer battery life if you're going to have it on for an extended period. There are 3 brightness levels which can be accessed by pressing the switch again within about 5 seconds. I am very pleased to tell you that you don't have to cycle through all these brightness levels to turn it off, because after being on in any brightness mode for more than 5 seconds results in it simply switching off with ONE press of the switch. All this and a LIFETIME WARRANTY for an incredibly low price. Stop looking now and buy this one -- you won't be disappointed.

I'm a sucker for mysteries that drop you right into the middle of a tight-knit community, and this one nailed the Amish setting without making it feel like a gimmick. The atmosphere is so vivid, you can practically feel the cold morning air and the tension on that porch. I loved how the partnership between Kate and Tomasetti has this understated rhythm; they don't need to overexplain things to each other, and that made their investigation feel grounded and real. The pacing hooked me instantly, and I ended up reading way past my bedtime because I had to know where that abandoned baby thread was going. If you enjoy crime fiction with emotional weight and a strong sense of place, this is a solid pick.

The pros: These snubbers are easy to install; and so far, have helped our 25' 3000# pontoon boat NOT yank the tie-up posts out of the lakebed. We live on a large inland lake and can get waves to 2' - that combined with stiff winds has caused the boat to break the snaps on the end of the tie-up ropes. We've had no problems since installing these; I'm very happy with the performance and would certainly buy these again (they cost a lot less than those sold at our local boating store). The million-dollar question is "how long will these last"? Can't answer that yet - but after 3 months, they still look unaffected by the weather and sun. The cons are minor: what WAS a nice bright yellow is now more like orange. And because these are heavy - they negate the easy line retrieval by using floating rope (everything sinks now) - so we tied empty milk jugs to the ends of the lines to make them easy to hook and grab. Neither "con" affects the overall performance.

I have an Android phone (HTC Evo 3D) and tablet (Nexus 7). The headset works near perfectly on my phone. My issue is that I found that the headset won't work the Netflix app, and I suspect there will be other apps as well that aren't compatible. For example, all the controls work great with Pandora, Stitcher and YouTube, but the pause/play doesn't work with Netflix. Oddly, the headset doesn't work as seamlessly with the Nexus 7. I'm sitting right next to the tablet and the sound sporadically cuts in and out. Now on to the good things. The sound is pretty good, so far nobody has pointed out to me that I must be on a Bluetooth! That is awesome, usually the person on the other end can tell that you're wireless. The distance is good as well. I like that I can walk 20 feet away and it's still connected. I plan on trying a further distance soon. I also like the volume level. I'm glad that it can go very loud if needed. The battery life is pretty decent. I had to charge it after a day and a half of heavy usage. I also noticed that after my second day or wearing it, I often forget it's there. It's not heavy and you get used to it being there really fast. Other than the few issue I pointed out, I have no other complaints. It works well with my phone and that's most important to me. It's a good headset at a good price. As I use the headset longer, if I find more Apps that it won't work with, I'll come back and update my review.

I have no doubt that this is an amazing showerhead. I was confident in this when I got this showerhead because I have other Grohe fixtures in my home, and they are awesome. So, I have every confidence in the quality of this fixture. My problem with it is that while it says "retro-fit," which would seem to indicate that it can be retrofitted to just about any shower out there, assuming that the shower has enough room to fit the unit, which mine did. The problem (for me, anyway) is that the fixture is so heavy, it needs to be anchored into the wall with huge screws both on the top of the unit and the bottom. So, you have to have the structure inside the wall of your shower in order to have something to anchor those screws into. I happen to have an older home, and while my shower was re-done recently, (not by me), the structural integrity just isn't there. Luckily, the plumber I hired to put this unit in, realized this before he got too far into it. So, the bottom line is that, again, while this is a "retro-fit" showerhead, it will not work for every shower, and you need to be very careful to know whether or not your shower can work with this unit...not just in terms of size, but in terms of structural integrity inside the walls...before you buy it. I was unable to install this unit, but I'm still giving this a four star rating. Why? Just based on my previous experience with Grohe products...knowing how great the quality is with this company. I also thoroughly inspected all the parts of this when the plumber opened the package, and all parts for this are heavy, well made, and high-quality. I'm keeping this unit because I plan to re-do my bathroom one day soon, and I am definitely going to use this once I do.

I like and admire cats, but I'm a dog person. And I've never been fond of cleaning up after indoor cats. We had a couple of cats through the years when kids were little, and of course, I did the clean-up. So secretly, I was not thrilled when I agreed to take my daughter's sweet rescued cat to live with me because she had so little room in her NYC apartment. I knew what was in the future. Lots of mess. I don't mind the scooping. To me, the biggest annoyance about cat litter is the gritty cat litter scattered on the floor. There is nothing worse then walking bare-foot into invisible cat litter spread on the floor. We needed a new cat litter box here so after reading more than I wanted to know about the various options, I picked this one instead of the hooded kind, and I am SO glad I did. I chose the open design because it is so much easier to just scoop and clean it more often. There is no odor when you clean it daily and it only takes a minute with this design. A closed litter box is too easy to ignore. This thing is well-engineered: Most of the litter stays in the box. It's effortless to reach down into it to scoop and clean. Very easy to clean. Anti-microbial without any chemical odors. Holds a boatload of litter. Tucks into a corner. Since buying it, the litter mess hasn't vanished but it's 90% better. And I am getting attached to the new feline member of the household too. I recommend this product whole-heartedly!

I really wanted to like the practical creature effects in this one, the makeup team clearly put in some effort on the trolls, and there's a brief swamp sequence where the prosthetics actually look decent. That's about the only bright spot. The rest of the movie feels like a string of disjointed quest scenes with zero emotional weight. Jason Statham is completely miscast as a medieval farmer; every line delivery sounds like he's about to step into a fistfight, not a fantasy drama. The pacing is brutal, with long stretches of muddy nothing happening between underwhelming action beats. By the time the final "twist" rolled around, I was just checking the runtime. Not unwatchable, but definitely not worth your evening.

These shin guards seem to be of decent quality. My daughter has been playing soccer for about nine years now and she's used all different brands and types of shin guards over the years. Her preference is for the Nike and Under Armor slide ins, but she says these will do well in those moments where her good shin guards go missing. The size large in the Franklin brand are pretty much the same size as her Nike slide ins, so I think these run a bit on the small side. My daughter is 5' 3" and the large fit her well and provide good coverage.
These are a game-changer for summer parties. The self-sealing tips actually work, and I had over a hundred balloons ready in minutes. No more wet hands or tying tiny knots, just pure, splashy fun.
I really loved this book - Nora is my favorite author and I have collected almost all her books for my collection

I've had this bag for about four months now, using it on daily commutes and a couple longer weekend rides. It's held up really well, no frayed stitching, zippers still glide smoothly even when it's stuffed. The material shrugs off light rain no problem, though I haven't tested it in a full downpour. I appreciate how the shape tucks neatly under the seat without interfering with pedal stroke. The interior fits my repair kit, lunch, and a light jacket without bulging awkwardly. Only reason I'm not giving five stars is the attachment straps loosened slightly after the first few weeks and needed retightening. Minor gripe, but worth mentioning. Overall, solid bag that's aging nicely.
My daughter uses it constantly for her art projects, and it erases cleanly without smudging or tearing the paper. Great little find for school and home.

Got this as our older router/wireless AP was having difficulty with having XP and Win7 machines connected at the same time. This one has been great for all devices, solid signal strength about 30 feet beyond the perimeter of the house (brick). Setup is easy and the web interface for administrating the device (enter "192.168.0.1" in the address bar) is very intuitive and offers useful metrics as well as security options. One inconvenience is the need to occasionally power cycle the unit (once about every 3 months). Not sure if this is due to an ISP issue though as we need to do this occasionally to the Comcast modem too to resolve a connectivity issue. But sometimes it is just the router (have tested directly from the modem) and both wireless and wired connections all fail. Haven't tried a firmware update yet as honestly... we have just gotten used to having to power cycle it occasionally and it is a pretty quick fix.
A treat for anyone who loves classic cinema and big-band energy, my grandkids even got a kick out of it.
For the price, this little music toy is a sweet deal. Soft tunes calm my baby fast, but I wish the playtime lasted longer.
This stayed inflated for over 2 weeks and was a total hit!!! Much larger than expected, got lots of compliments

This serves the purpose that it was designed to do, and was delivered promptly. It is as described. However, one complaint I have is that the shelves are not re-inforced with any type of material (like cardboard), so they sag in the middle. Imagine thin fabric shelves rather than structured ones. Other than that, it does what it is supposed to.
The bounce is great and my kids love it, but the netting started fraying after just a few backyard sessions. Disappointing durability for something meant to be used outdoors.
Brave is a great kids movie that an adult can actually sit through. This movie has a good story and its told well. The animation is very good and I would recommend this movie.

Took some warming up to. Didn't really understand why or what I was watching it. The beginning sorta just throws you into the time travel with little to no explanation, next thing you know is 1700's. eventually the characters grow on you and your into it. although, still not entirely sure what I am watching but it is entertaining and inf Ronald D. Moore is involved it has to be good.
For the low price, getting a series this addictive feels like a steal. I'm already downloading the next one.

I'm super impressed with this dispenser for the price. I cook daily and constantly had gross raw chicken or sticky dough on my hands, no more messing up my regular soap pump. Setup took maybe a minute, and the sensor works consistently once you find the sweet spot. Soap refills last a surprisingly long time, so it feels really cost-effective. Honestly, it's a small kitchen upgrade that makes daily cleanup way less annoying. Totally worth it.

I honestly didn't expect much at this price point, but the no-spill base is what sold me. I'm clumsy and work from a desk covered in paperwork, so knocking over my coffee used to be a daily disaster. This mug stays put unless you lift it straight up, took me one try to get the hang of it. I've even nudged it hard by accident and it just wobbles a bit, no splash. The lid-less design means I actually enjoy the aroma while I work, which is a small but real pleasure. Cleaning is easy since there's no weird seal to take apart. Solid, simple, and it just works.

I wanted to like these more than I do. The cut is a little off through the hips and they never really softened up after a few washes. I've worn them twice but always end up changing. They're fine in a pinch, just not what I hoped for overall.
Exceeded my hopes, classic episodes look surprisingly sharp.
Staying motivated and boosting productivity are extremely important to achieve your goals in life. This book offers the best tips and techniques for being productive and achieving success in life.

I bought these for a weekend fence project and they barely made it through the morning. The seams split wide open while I was just handling rough lumber. Ended up with splinters anyway. Honestly, I've had better luck with the cheap bulk pack from the dollar store.

These are a total game changer for long listening sessions. I was a little nervous about the modding process, but once I shaved the plastic rings down slightly, the new cushions clicked into place perfectly. The memory foam is super plush and my ears don't get hot anymore. It honestly feels like a premium headphone upgrade for just a few bucks. Absolutely worth the minor effort.

A lot of the reviews said this is smaller than they imagined, and it is. But it still fits quite a lot and I like that all of my makeup is now in one place. Its attractive looking and functional, so I recommend.

This bike does seem sturdy, but came with so many paint chips!! Pretty disappointing. Some chips appear to have already been badly touched up with not-quite-matching touch up paint, and others aren't fixed at all. I read this in other reviews for this bike, so I guess it's quite common. The chipped paint didn't occur in transit, as the bike was very well protected in foam, cardboard and plastic. The bike still functions and went together fine, but don't expect the paint to be in good condition. I snapped a few pictures for examples, but there were a lot more than what's pictured.
Bought this for my nephew's 7th birthday and he won't put it down. Perfect for any little Jedi fan starting their collection.
As good a crimp die for the money you can get.

I've had this in my truck kit for a few months now and finally tested it during a weekend camping trip. It got tossed around in my pack and still held up great. Solid construction, no flimsy parts. Definitely a reliable piece of gear you can count on when things get real.
I use this to lift up a foldable trailer. The rope is pretty rough and gloves are necessary. It provides enough mechanical advantage to lift the tongue of the trailer up to vertical.

I picked this up hoping it would help with the sludge I was getting from my moka pot and French press brews, and honestly, I'm blown away. I use a decent burr grinder but still ended up with those super fine particles that always made the last sip gritty. This filter catches all of that without slowing down the pour or making the coffee taste flat. The first cup was noticeably cleaner, smoother, and just more enjoyable to drink, no more chewing my coffee. It's sturdy, fits perfectly over my mug and carafe, and rinses clean in seconds under the tap. If you're even a little picky about sediment, this is a total game changer. Can't recommend it enough.
awesome product. works perfectly. nothing more to say, we now have five of these scattered in the house. i guess the only negative is that they use up one plug.
A little more narrow than I remember them being years ago.

I'll be honest, I was a little skeptical switching my picky Great Dane to a brand I'd never tried before, but this stuff blew past my expectations. The kibble size is perfect, and the smell isn't that overpowering chemical odor some foods have. Within a week, his coat got noticeably softer and he stopped scratching as much, which was a huge relief. What really surprised me was how excited he gets at mealtime now, he used to just pick at his old food. Energy levels are steady, no stomach issues at all, and cleanup in the yard has been way more manageable. For the price point, I figured it'd be decent at best, but it honestly performs like a much pricier brand. Super happy we took a chance on it.

I bought 2 sets, based on another review! These rings are wonderful and provided hours of fun for 5 and 7 yr old granddaughters, racing each other or trying to get through all 6 hoops with one breath!
I will continue to buy more they are gorgeous and fit is amazing highly recommend

These earbuds sound decent if you're just sitting still at a desk. But if you plan to use them while moving around, skip 'em. The jack gets touchy fast with any slight bump or lean, and the audio cuts out constantly. I'd only recommend these for someone who barely moves while listening.
The bass is decent for movies, but the wireless subwoofer cuts out way too often. I end up having to power cycle it mid-show. Kind of a hassle for the price.

I snagged this to wrangle all the stray earbuds and charging cables on my desk and it instantly tidied things up. The compact size is perfect, the latch feels sturdy, and the subtle design blends right in. Super happy with this little organizer.

I have a confession...this is my first Nicholas Sparks book. It will not be my last. This was such a sweet story, with some good humor, drama and a little scary thrill thrown in, that I was hooked, quite literally, from the first page. I wondered if this would just be a remake of "Sleeping with the Enemy," but Sparks worked his magic and developed beautiful, charming and delightful characters. Can't wait to see the movie, but unless they use the actual book as the script, can it ever be better? I think not! Everyone should read this book!

I love love love this pair in Iridescent/Black! Beautiful shape and stunning texture, comfortable. It is teeny tiny bigger than my Jessica Simpson pumps. so my heels are a little loose but not coming out of the shoes when I walk. but I don't walk a lot in high heels.
For under three bucks, this was an absolute steal. The story grabbed me from page one and didn't let go. Honestly, I've paid way more for books half this entertaining. Total win.

I keep this as a backup in my trunk for spur-of-the-moment lake trips, and it's honestly exceeded expectations. The breakdown design tucks away easily, yet locks together with zero wobble. I'd recommend it to any casual paddler or weekend warrior who wants reliable, no-fuss gear without spending a fortune. Solid little workhorse.
Survived a weekend camping trip with zero issues. The grip feels secure even when wet, and the blade held its edge through heavy use. For this price, it's an absolute steal.
It's not a pretty looking shoe, but they are VERY comfortable. Great for long walks. I bought them for my trip to NY city. I'm so in love with this shoes that I bought another pair.
These are great cloths. A little larger than I prefer, but good quality and thickness. I would recommend them.
Was excited about this at first, but after a few weeks the stitching started coming undone near the clip. Fabric didn't hold up to daily use. Bummed it fell apart so fast.
I own the whole set now.... I absolutely love it and my husband and I sit and watched a couple of series on Sundays, when there does not seem to be any good tv shows... I truly recommend it
For the money, this little gadget punches way above its weight. Simple to use, works right out of the box, and feels solid.
Driver disk has no drivers. Win111 disk installs but fails to find the network usb stick on any USB port in the system. And I wasted overnight mailing from Amazon.

I don't like to wear pantyhose because I don't like the compression around my midsection. However, I had a wedding to go to and it was cool enough that I didn't want bare legs. I had a long skirt, but I wanted stockings longer than knee-highs just to be on the safe side. So I figured I would try these. These fit me pretty well. I am right in that height/weight combination where I can wear either A or B sized pantyhose, and I'm a size 8 or medium in most US-sized pants and skirts. They had a slight reinforced toe, which I appreciate, as I tend to get runs in pantyhose/stockings/etc. These had no holes or runs in them and I did not damage them when I put them on. This is a big plus since I tend to ruin a lot of garments of this type. These seemed particularly sturdy to me. They stayed up. The silicone part is inside the lace at the top and it is clear so it will not show, even if you intend for the tops of these to show (I'm hiding mine well under my skirt, but the option is there for you if you want it). There were a few loose threads at the top but they weren't terribly noticeable. In the end, because these fit and seemed really sturdy, I'm quite happy with them. You can be practical with them if you want, too, if your skirt is long enough, or you can show off the tops for a different look. Product provided by the seller for evaluation purposes.
I've ordered this item before and it worked but....only half the LED's would light. I sent mail to the seller but never heard back...
If you love raw, emotional romance with characters who stick with you long after the last page, this one's for you. I'd hand it to anyone who adored After Midnight and needs a heartfelt fix.
Arrived super fast in sturdy packaging, no damage at all. My pup took to them instantly!

I bought my first set of these headphones about a year ago. I was able to look past the annoyingly long right ear wire because they do have excellent sound quality. I used them mainly at the gym and noticed that after being on the treadmill for a few minutes that the combination of sweat and the weight of the cord would pull the left earpiece out. I tried all 3 rubber sizes but was constantly pushing that left piece back in. Also, when lifting weights I run the cord under my shirt and found that the thick rubber piece where the right and left earphones split would catch my shirt and again pull the left earpiece out, even more often than while running. This was annoying, but I would still have rated these 4 stars because walking my dog or listening in bed these were the best phones I ever heard. I bought 2 other pairs as Christmas presents last year, and now all 3 pairs have failed in one ear. I tried re-soldering the wires and got 2 of them to work again, who knows for how long. I have switched to a pair of Ultimate Ears and the quality is even better, hopefully these will last longer.

These stepping stones have been a huge hit. My toddler uses them daily for obstacle courses and imaginative play. The textured surface gives great grip, and they're light enough for her to rearrange herself. Honestly, they've sparked more creative movement than any other toy we own.
Love Belvin is a BEAST with a pen. I fell in love with Ezra and Lex's story. This is a must read series. Will be waiting for Spring 2016.

I went into this hoping for a deep, insightful look at DFW's life and work, but it didn't quite land for me. The research effort is obvious, lots of letters and fresh interviews, but it often reads more like a data dump than a crafted narrative. I kept waiting for the author to step back and offer real analysis or connect the dots, but that rarely happened. As a reference it's fine, just not the compelling biography I expected. If you want a straightforward timeline of events it works, but don't expect much interpretive depth or elegant storytelling. Decent effort, underwhelming execution.
Arrived fast in a neat little box, no damage. Pulled one out and immediately laughed, these are way more fun than expected.

Our 16-year-old tabby has been on this wet food for about four months now, and it still holds up as the one thing she'll reliably finish. The texture stays consistent can to can, no weird separation or dried-out edges even when I've accidentally left a half-used can in the fridge overnight with a lid. She's missing a few teeth, so the soft shredded chicken and that rich gravy are perfect for her. I also mix her joint supplement powder in, and it dissolves completely without any gritty residue. We've cycled through several flavors and never hit a bad batch. Honestly, after this many weeks of steady use, the quality hasn't dipped once. It's been a relief finding something so dependable for a picky senior cat.
A birthday gfit for my great niece....she loved it! Good price,came fast in the mail also. She is enjoying playing with it!

For us men with big fingers, hitting the keys on the tiny keypad on my iPhone is a huge challenge. Also, I'm 56 and never learned to "thumb type". Every time I type something, there's a mistake, and then a bizarre autocorrect, that can cause a LOT of embarrassment. Yikes. This keyboard is flawless. It paired up instantly with my iPhone, and boom. I was typing on my iPhone in by just pairing the device in Settings. Yes, that easy. It is charged via a USB port, so good to have one of those USB-to-electric adapters(which are super cheap). Or you can charge it on any USB port anywhere. Not exactly sure how long the charge holds for, as I never let it get to that point. This device is combined with my iPhone to be charged overnight which works for my purposes (again, I'm 56) It is VERY, VERY light. It is is compact, as you can see from my pic, but still MUCH easier than the native iOS keyboard. Plus the keyboard has a bunch of cool special features. Why do I find out about great products like this so late? I could have used this 5 years ago.

I wasn't sure what to expect for such a low price, but this novella turned out to be a total steal. It's a quick, feel-good read that easily filled a lazy Sunday afternoon without dragging on. The chemistry between the grumpy Scottish earl and the headstrong English heroine had me smiling like an idiot more than once. The pacing is snappy, the banter is sharp, and the setting feels cozy without trying too hard. Honestly, I've paid more for coffee that gave me less joy than this little escape. If you're on the fence, just grab it, the entertainment-to-cost ratio is ridiculous. I'll definitely check out more from this author when I need another cheap, cheerful pick-me-up.

'Nefarious', 'Ruthless' and 'T Wave' were all full of deceit, suspense, thrilling scenarios, romance and an abundance of characters who fit the role of 'bad guys'. Thought these would be a gimmick but they actually keep leftover caulk fresh way longer than a nail or tape ever did. The cap seals tight and pops off clean even weeks later. Totally beats my expectations for something so simple.

We got this at a garage sale a year and a half ago for my two boys(now almost 2 and almost 4 & yep it's pink, but they don't care at all). They have LOVED playing with this kitchen. The woman we bought it from had three kids and my kids have used it for a year and a half and you can hardly tell because the kitchen looks as good as new. I said that the company was great because when I bought the kitchen it was missing the sink. I went to the website to see about ordering a replacement sink. I filled out a form and said that the sink had been lost and within a few days a brand new sink was sitting on my front porch. This tells me that the company stands behind their product. Purchased these stickers for the kids play with while we were out at dinner or on a long car ride. All 3 kids loved them. Children ages 8, 3 and 2. I ended up using some on the kids lunch notes I write and put in their lunch box. They came home and said how much they loved them and requested that I surprise them with the Peppa stickers on their notes all the time. Needless to say I'm going to need to restock very soon:) Great product!

I was intimidated by Shakespeare until I tried this layout, having the modern text right next to the original is a game changer. It's like training wheels for Elizabethan English, and honestly, I caught on way faster than I expected. Perfect for students or casual readers who don't want to feel lost.
This cage is very flimsy. Cheap material. Door latch barely works. Roof not secured. Spend a little more for a better quality cage!
Survival kit and emergency kit in case of disaster.. As of today, I never used it and hope to never use it... But what's inside is pretty much what you need when you will need it.

Bought this to keep in the truck for occasional tire top-offs and pool floats, figured for the price it was worth a shot. The build feels flimsy but I wasn't expecting industrial quality. It's fine for a basketball or bike tire, but anything bigger and it struggles hard. Tried to bring a car tire from 28 to 35 psi and it gave up halfway through, motor got scary hot and started smelling like burnt plastic. The included adapters are a nice touch but don't make up for the lack of real power. For twenty bucks I guess you get what you pay for, just don't count on it when you actually need it.
Arrived a day early in simple recyclable packaging. Slipped them on and instantly forgot I was wearing shoes. Crazy light but solid underfoot.

I went in expecting a decent sci-fi spin on Greek myth, but this blew past those expectations. The blend of ancient lore with corporate genetic engineering feels seamless, not forced. Jason's enhancements aren't just surface-level gimmicks, they shape his identity in ways that kept me thinking long after I finished. Medea's genomancer abilities add a creepy, fascinating layer I didn't see coming. The pacing is relentless, but somehow the world still feels lived-in and detailed, like you could step off the Argo and explore. It's rare to find a retelling that respects the source material while building something this original. Easily one of my favorite impulse reads this year.
Love it. Can't wait to read another story from this author
So worth it, my kid plays with this every single day.

I've been using these straps for a couple of months now, mostly on weekend backpacking trips, and they've held up without any fraying or stretching. I've hung my hammock on some rough-barked pines and the material still looks fresh. The stitching hasn't budged at all, even after a few rainy nights and some serious tension. Definitely a solid upgrade from my old suspension setup.
I really appreciated how the narrator's tone made the content feel like a conversation rather than a lecture. It turned my commute into something I actually look forward to.
I returned this dress because it was too tight. It was beautiful, just didn't have enough time to get the right size before my event.

The book arrived fast and in perfect shape thanks to the tight, no-fuss packaging. No dents or scuffs at all. Flipping through, the typesetting feels clean and easy on the eyes. So far, a promising, thoughtful read that makes a solid first impression.

It's tough to imagine someone writing a hilarious recounting of her struggles with OCD, scrupulousity and anorexia, but crafty girl Jennifer Traig has done just that. The humor here is burst-out-loud funny. Ms. Traig has a true ear and eye for finding the humor in any story. And - that's the thing...some of these stories are - humor stripped away - pretty darn bleak. When Jen's parents yank her out of school before the end of her junior year, you know things are pretty out of control. The author - thankfully able to look back with perspective, sanity and health intact - is cognizant enough to concede the point. Ms. Traig gives a lot of credit and support to her family for putting up with her over the years. My favorite passage in that regard is this one: "...but as I grew older, crazier and more religious, I felt as though I didn't blend in anywhere. I was just so weird. I didn't even fit in my own family. This was largely my doing. I'm the one who caused it...My parents had done everything right, ruling the house by dictatorship, a method that works so well for much of the Third World. It didn't work for me. Every day, I was stirring up insurgencies, issuing fatwas. declaring holy war on the whole...family." Now, that's a chick who can seriously write. Excellent stuff, Jen. One quibble about the industry reviews at the top of this page...where Publisher's Weekly says "In this 1970s memoir, Traig describes how, from the age of 12 until her freshman year at Brandeis...". This is incorrect. The author makes clear in the book that she went (at least Freshman year) to UC Berkeley. Her PhD is from Brandeis.

I was a little skeptical these would be bright enough for my hallway since they're so thin, but they completely surprised me. They throw a clean, soft light that's perfect for navigating at night without blinding you. The real standout for me is the center-mounted sensor, my old ones were useless behind the coffee maker or under a shelf because the sensor would stay dark, but these kick on reliably no matter what's around the outlet. I've got one tucked behind a trash can in the kitchen and it still works flawlessly. They also sit flush against the wall, so furniture doesn't bump them. Way better than I expected for the price.

This one kept me turning pages even though I saw the twist coming early. The writing flows nicely and the pacing is just right for a lazy weekend binge. I had the controller pegged the moment he showed up, but honestly it didn't ruin things for me, the character dynamics still pulled me along. The whole setup with Ruby has me genuinely curious, especially that messy tangle with Paddy and Eddie. The teaser for her book actually made me preorder it on the spot, which I rarely do. Knocking off one star only because the mystery lacked real surprise, but the vibe and storytelling are solid. Definitely worth the read.
My step son LOVES these pajamas... he requests them specifically... he especially loves the cape (but we always take it off before he goes to sleep)

I'm 5'11, 180 lbs and the large fits spot-on for a relaxed but not baggy feel. Material has a nice stretch and the length works well for longer rides. I mainly use it for weekend gravel loops and coffee stops, so I appreciate that it looks decent off the bike too. For the price, you're getting solid build quality and thoughtful pocket placement, holds a phone and snacks without sagging. I do wish the inner face was a bit softer for cooler mornings, but layering fixes that fast. Overall, it punches above its cost compared to bigger brands. Four stars because nothing's perfect, but it's really close for everyday riding.

I've had this radio for about six months now, flying weekly, and it's held up like a champ. A few clumsy drops on concrete and one splash at the field, still works perfectly, no sticky gimbals or glitchy switches. The build quality really shines after some real-world abuse. I was nervous switching from a basic setup, but the solid feel and reliable link gave me confidence fast. Battery life is solid too; I've done full morning sessions without a recharge. The programming takes a little learning, but once it clicks, you appreciate how flexible it is. I've bumped it, packed it in tight bags, and it just keeps going. If you want something that'll survive actual use and grow with you, this is it.

The mesh screen actually keeps seeds and pulp out of my sips, which I didn't expect from something this affordable. My go-to lately is frozen mango with a few mint leaves, and the flavor stays strong through a couple refills. The lid seals tight too; I've tossed it in my gym bag sideways with zero leaks. Only tiny gripe is the carry loop feels a little flimsy, but it's held up fine so far. Honestly, I'm drinking way more water now just to experiment with combos.

I have started lifting again after taking several years off do to a back injury. When I lifted before I never used gloves. So far using these gloves has made a big difference.
